msgstr " stats"

msgid " counters"
msgstr " counters"

msgid " sniff"
msgstr " sniff"

msgid " Override"
msgstr " Override"

msgid "Override destination"
msgstr "Override destination"

msgid " Timeout"
msgstr " Timeout"

msgid "Sniff timeout in seconds"
msgstr "Sniff timeout in seconds"

msgid " Enabled"
msgstr " Enabled"

msgid " destinations"
msgstr " destinations"

msgid " source_ip"
msgstr " source_ip"

msgid " source_port"
msgstr " source_port"

msgid " source_port_range"
msgstr " source_port_range"

msgid " Destination Override"
msgstr " Destination Override"

msgid "Override destination with sniffed domain"
msgstr "Override destination with sniffed domain"

msgid " Store Selected"
msgstr " Store Selected"

msgid "Remember selected outbound"
msgstr "Remember selected outbound"

msgid " Store Failed"
msgstr " Store Failed"

msgid "Remember failed outbound"
msgstr "Remember failed outbound"

msgid " Disable UDP"
msgstr " Disable UDP"

msgid " Default"
msgstr " Default"

msgid "Load Balance"
msgstr "Load Balance"

msgid " Selector"
msgstr " Selector"

msgid " URL Test"
msgstr " URL Test"

msgid "Unexpected"
msgstr "Unexpected"

msgid " head"
msgstr " head"

msgid " Payload"
msgstr " Payload"

msgid " payload"
msgstr " payload"

msgid " V2Ray"
msgstr " V2Ray"

msgid " V2Ray HTTP Upgrade"
msgstr " V2Ray HTTP Upgrade"

msgid " Path"
msgstr " Path"

msgid " Headers"
msgstr " Headers"

msgid " Method"
msgstr " Method"

msgid "Early Data"
msgstr "Early Data"

msgid " QUIC"
msgstr " QUIC"

msgid " GRPC"
msgstr " GRPC"

msgid " Service Name"
msgstr " Service Name"

msgid " Ping Timeout"
msgstr " Ping Timeout"

msgid " Permissive"
msgstr " Permissive"

msgid " Max Version"
msgstr " Max Version"

msgid " Bind Interface"
msgstr " Bind Interface"

msgid " Routing Mark"
msgstr " Routing Mark"

msgid "Reuse Addr"
msgstr "Reuse Addr"

msgid "TCP Keep Alive"
msgstr "TCP Keep Alive"

msgid "TCP Keep Alive Interval"
msgstr "TCP Keep Alive Interval"

msgid " Date"
msgstr " Date"

msgid " Size"
msgstr " Size"

msgid " Actions"
msgstr " Actions"

msgid " Restore"
msgstr " Restore"

msgid " Delete Backup"
msgstr " Delete Backup"

msgid " Format"
msgstr " Format"

msgid " Parse"
msgstr " Parse"

msgid " Import"
msgstr " Import"

msgid " Apply Config"
msgstr " Apply Config"

msgid " Rules Dir"
msgstr " Rules Dir"

msgid " Out Dir"
msgstr " Out Dir"

msgid " Tun"
msgstr " Tun"

msgid " Stats"
msgstr " Stats"

msgid " Multiplexor"
msgstr " Multiplexor"

msgid " Level"
msgstr " Level"

msgid " Output"
msgstr " Output"

msgid " Timestamp"
msgstr " Timestamp"

msgid " Console"
msgstr " Console"

msgstr "Protocol"



~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {Sing-box-for-OPNsense/src/opnsense/mvc/app/models/OPNsense/SingBox/i18n/ru_RU.po} ~~~~
msgid ""
msgstr ""
"Project-Id-Version: OPNsense Sing-box Plugin 3.0.0\n"
"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
"POT-Creation-Date: 2024-01-01 00:00+0000\n"
"PO-Revision-Date: 2024-01-01 00:00+0000\n"
"Last-Translator: \n"
"Language: ru_RU\n"
"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"
"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"
"Plural-Forms: nplurals=3; plural=(n%10==1 && n%100!=11 ? 0 : n%10>=2 && n%10<=4 && (n%100<10 || n%100>=20) ? 1 : 2);\n"

# Tab names
msgid "Dashboard"
msgstr "Панель управления"

msgid "Outbounds"
msgstr "Исходящие подключения"

msgid "Inbounds"
msgstr "Входящие подключения"

msgid "Rules"
msgstr "Правила маршрутизации"

msgid "DNS"
msgstr "DNS"

msgid "TUN/Network"
msgstr "TUN/Сеть"

msgid "Log"
msgstr "Журнал"

msgid "Settings"
msgstr "Настройки"

# Button labels
msgid "Sing-box"
msgstr "Sing-box"

msgid "Save"
msgstr "Сохранить"

msgid "Apply"
msgstr "Применить"

msgid "Cancel"
msgstr "Отмена"

msgid "Delete"
msgstr "Удалить"

msgid "Edit"
msgstr "Редактировать"

msgid "Add"
msgstr "Добавить"

msgid "Test"
msgstr "Проверить"

msgid "Test All"
msgstr "Проверить все"

msgid "Enable"
msgstr "Включить"

msgid "Disable"
msgstr "Отключить"

msgid "Import"
msgstr "Импорт"

msgid "Export"
msgstr "Экспорт"

msgid "Backup"
msgstr "Резервная копия"

msgid "Rollback"
msgstr "Откат"

msgid "Refresh"
msgstr "Обновить"

msgid "Close"
msgstr "Закрыть"

msgid "Reset"
msgstr "Сброс"

msgid "Search"
msgstr "Поиск"

msgid "Filter"
msgstr "Фильтр"

msgid "Clear"
msgstr "Очистить"

msgid "Upload"
msgstr "Загрузить"

msgid "Download"
msgstr "Скачать"

msgid "Copy"
msgstr "Копировать"

msgid "Clone"
msgstr "Клонировать"

msgid "Move Up"
msgstr "Вверх"

msgid "Move Down"
msgstr "Вниз"

msgid "Drag to reorder"
msgstr "Перетащите для изменения порядка"

# Status messages
msgid "Actions"
msgstr "Действия"

msgid "Running"
msgstr "Работает"

msgid "Stopped"
msgstr "Остановлен"

msgid "Enabled"
msgstr "Включено"

msgid "Disabled"
msgstr "Отключено"

msgid "Active"
msgstr "Активно"

msgid "Inactive"
msgstr "Неактивно"

msgid "Pending"
msgstr "В ожидании"

msgid "Success"
msgstr "Успешно"

msgid "Failed"
msgstr "Ошибка"

msgid "Error"
msgstr "Ошибка"

msgid "Warning"
msgstr "Предупреждение"

msgid "Info"
msgstr "Информация"

msgid "Unknown"
msgstr "Неизвестно"

msgid "Loading"
msgstr "Загрузка"

msgid "Not configured"
msgstr "Не настроено"

msgid "Configured"
msgstr "Настроено"

msgid "Online"
msgstr "В сети"

msgid "Offline"
msgstr "Не в сети"

msgid "Latency"
msgstr "Задержка"

# General form labels
msgid "ms"
msgstr "мс"

msgid "General Settings"
msgstr "Основные настройки"

msgid "Plugin Enabled"
msgstr "Плагин включен"

msgid "Enable or disable the sing-box plugin"
msgstr "Включить или отключить плагин sing-box"

msgid "Log Level"
msgstr "Уровень журнала"

msgid "Select the log verbosity level"
msgstr "Выберите уровень детализации журнала"

msgid "Log Output"
msgstr "Вывод журнала"

msgid "Path to the log file"
msgstr "Путь к файлу журнала"

msgid "Log Timestamp"
msgstr "Метка времени"

msgid "Include timestamps in log entries"
msgstr "Включить метки времени в записи журнала"

msgid "Experimental API"
msgstr "Экспериментальный API"

msgid "Enable the sing-box experimental REST API"
msgstr "Включить экспериментальный REST API sing-box"

msgid "API Port"
msgstr "Порт API"

msgid "Port for the experimental API endpoint"
msgstr "Порт для экспериментальной конечной точки API"

msgid "API Secret"
msgstr "Секретный ключ API"

# Log levels
msgid "Optional secret token for API authentication"
msgstr "Дополнительный секретный токен для аутентификации API"

msgid "trace"
msgstr "трассировка"

msgid "debug"
msgstr "отладка"

msgid "info"
msgstr "информация"

msgid "warn"
msgstr "предупреждение"

msgid "error"
msgstr "ошибка"

msgid "fatal"
msgstr "критическая ошибка"

# Outbound fields
msgid "panic"
msgstr "паника"

msgid "Outbound Name"
msgstr "Название исходящего подключения"

msgid "Unique name for this outbound configuration"
msgstr "Уникальное название для этой конфигурации"

msgid "Protocol Type"
msgstr "Тип протокола"

msgid "Select the proxy protocol type"
msgstr "Выберите тип прокси-протокола"

msgid "Server Address"
msgstr "Адрес сервера"

msgid "Hostname or IP address of the proxy server"
msgstr "Имя хоста или IP-адрес прокси-сервера"

msgid "Server Port"
msgstr "Порт сервера"

msgid "Port number of the proxy server"
msgstr "Номер порта прокси-сервера"

msgid "UUID"
msgstr "UUID"

msgid "User UUID for VLESS/VMess authentication"
msgstr "UUID пользователя для аутентификации VLESS/VMess"

msgid "Flow"
msgstr "Поток"

msgid "Flow control for VLESS (e.g. xtls-rprx-vision)"
msgstr "Управление потоком для VLESS (например, xtls-rprx-vision)"

msgid "Packet Encoding"
msgstr "Кодирование пакетов"

msgid "Alter ID"
msgstr "Alter ID"

msgid "Security"
msgstr "Безопасность"

msgid "Encryption method"
msgstr "Метод шифрования"

msgid "Password"
msgstr "Пароль"

msgid "Authentication password"
msgstr "Пароль аутентификации"

msgid "Method"
msgstr "Метод"

msgid "Cipher method for Shadowsocks"
msgstr "Метод шифрования для Shadowsocks"

msgid "OBFS"
msgstr "OBFS"

msgid "Obfuscation type"
msgstr "Тип обфускации"

msgid "OBFS Password"
msgstr "Пароль OBFS"

msgid "Obfuscation password"
msgstr "Пароль обфускации"

msgid "Upload Mbps"
msgstr "Отдача Мбит/с"

msgid "Configured upload bandwidth in Mbps"
msgstr "Настроенная скорость отдачи в Мбит/с"

msgid "Download Mbps"
msgstr "Загрузка Мбит/с"

# WireGuard fields
msgid "Configured download bandwidth in Mbps"
msgstr "Настроенная скорость загрузки в Мбит/с"

msgid "Local Address"
msgstr "Локальный адрес"

msgid "WireGuard local IP addresses (comma-separated)"
msgstr "Локальные IP-адреса WireGuard (через запятую)"

msgid "Private Key"
msgstr "Приватный ключ"

msgid "WireGuard private key"
msgstr "Приватный ключ WireGuard"

msgid "Peer Public Key"
msgstr "Публичный ключ пира"

msgid "WireGuard peer public key"
msgstr "Публичный ключ пира WireGuard"

msgid "Peer Preshared Key"
msgstr "Общий ключ пира"

msgid "WireGuard peer preshared key (optional)"
msgstr "Общий ключ пира WireGuard (необязательно)"

msgid "Peer Endpoint"
msgstr "Конечная точка пира"

msgid "WireGuard peer endpoint address"
msgstr "Адрес конечной точки пира WireGuard"

msgid "Allowed IPs"
msgstr "Разрешенные IP"

msgid "Allowed IP addresses for the peer"
msgstr "Разрешенные IP-адреса для пира"

msgid "Persistent Keepalive"
msgstr "Постоянный keepalive"

# TLS fields
msgid "Keepalive interval in seconds"
msgstr "Интервал keepalive в секундах"

msgid "TLS Enabled"
msgstr "TLS включен"

msgid "Enable TLS encryption"
msgstr "Включить шифрование TLS"

msgid "TLS Server Name"
msgstr "Имя TLS сервера"

msgid "Server Name Indication (SNI) for TLS"
msgstr "Индикация имени сервера (SNI) для TLS"

msgid "TLS Insecure"
msgstr "TLS без проверки"

msgid "Skip TLS certificate verification (insecure)"
msgstr "Пропустить проверку TLS сертификата (небезопасно)"

msgid "ALPN"
msgstr "ALPN"

# Transport fields
msgid "Application-Layer Protocol Negotiation"
msgstr "Согласование протокола прикладного уровня"

msgid "Transport Type"
msgstr "Тип транспорта"

msgid "Underlying transport protocol"
msgstr "Базовый транспортный протокол"

msgid "Transport Path"
msgstr "Путь транспорта"

msgid "WebSocket/HTTP path"
msgstr "Путь WebSocket/HTTP"

msgid "Transport Host"
msgstr "Хост транспорта"

# Group fields
msgid "WebSocket/HTTP host header"
msgstr "Заголовок хоста WebSocket/HTTP"

msgid "Group Outbounds"
msgstr "Группа исходящих"

msgid "Comma-separated list of outbound tags"
msgstr "Список тегов исходящих подключений через запятую"

msgid "Test URL"
msgstr "URL для проверки"

msgid "URL for testing outbound connectivity"
msgstr "URL для проверки подключения"

msgid "Test Interval"
msgstr "Интервал проверки"

msgid "Health check interval in seconds"
msgstr "Интервал проверки состояния в секундах"

msgid "Test Tolerance"
msgstr "Допустимая задержка"

# Outbound types (keep protocol names in English)
msgid "Latency tolerance in milliseconds"
msgstr "Допустимая задержка в миллисекундах"

msgid "vless"
msgstr "vless"

msgid "vmess"
msgstr "vmess"

msgid "trojan"
msgstr "trojan"

msgid "shadowsocks"
msgstr "shadowsocks"

msgid "hysteria2"
msgstr "hysteria2"

msgid "wireguard"
msgstr "wireguard"

msgid "direct"
msgstr "прямое"

msgid "block"
msgstr "блокировка"

msgid "selector"
msgstr "селектор"

msgid "urltest"
msgstr "urltest"

# Inbound fields
msgid "load-balance"
msgstr "балансировка"

msgid "Inbound Name"
msgstr "Название входящего подключения"

msgid "Unique name for this inbound configuration"
msgstr "Уникальное название для этой конфигурации"

msgid "Listen Address"
msgstr "Адрес прослушивания"

msgid "Address to listen on (0.0.0.0 for all interfaces)"
msgstr "Адрес для прослушивания (0.0.0.0 для всех интерфейсов)"

msgid "Listen Port"
msgstr "Порт прослушивания"

msgid "Port number to listen on"
msgstr "Номер порта для прослушивания"

msgid "Username"
msgstr "Имя пользователя"

msgid "Authentication username"
msgstr "Имя пользователя для аутентификации"

msgid "Set System Proxy"
msgstr "Установить системный прокси"

msgid "Automatically configure system proxy"
msgstr "Автоматически настроить системный прокси"

msgid "Users"
msgstr "Пользователи"

msgid "JSON array of user credentials"
msgstr "Массив JSON с учетными данными пользователей"

msgid "Interface Name"
msgstr "Имя интерфейса"

msgid "TUN interface name"
msgstr "Имя TUN интерфейса"

msgid "MTU"
msgstr "MTU"

msgid "Maximum Transmission Unit"
msgstr "Максимальный размер передаваемого блока"

msgid "GSO"
msgstr "GSO"

msgid "Generic Segmentation Offload"
msgstr "Общая разгрузка сегментации"

msgid "Auto Route"
msgstr "Автоматическая маршрутизация"

msgid "Automatically configure routing rules"
msgstr "Автоматически настроить правила маршрутизации"

msgid "Strict Route"
msgstr "Строгая маршрутизация"

msgid "Enforce strict routing for transparent proxy"
msgstr "Принудительная строгая маршрутизация для прозрачного прокси"

msgid "Endpoint Independent NAT"
msgstr "Независимый от конечной точки NAT"

msgid "Enable endpoint-independent NAT"
msgstr "Включить NAT независимый от конечной точки"

msgid "Stack"
msgstr "Стек"

msgid "TUN implementation stack"
msgstr "Стек реализации TUN"

msgid "system"
msgstr "системный"

msgid "gvisor"
msgstr "gvisor"

msgid "mixed"
msgstr "смешанный"

msgid "tcp"
msgstr "tcp"

msgid "ws"
msgstr "ws"

msgid "grpc"
msgstr "grpc"

# Rule fields
msgid "httpupgrade"
msgstr "httpupgrade"

msgid "Rule Priority"
msgstr "Приоритет правила"

msgid "Priority order for rule matching (lower = first)"
msgstr "Порядок приоритета для сопоставления правил (меньше = раньше)"

msgid "Description"
msgstr "Описание"

msgid "Optional description for this rule"
msgstr "Дополнительное описание этого правила"

msgid "Rule Type"
msgstr "Тип правила"

msgid "Type of matching condition"
msgstr "Тип условия сопоставления"

msgid "Rule Value"
msgstr "Значение правила"

msgid "Value to match against"
msgstr "Значение для сопоставления"

msgid "Action"
msgstr "Действие"

msgid "Action to take when rule matches"
msgstr "Действие при совпадении правила"

msgid "Action Outbound"
msgstr "Исходящее подключение для действия"

msgid "Target outbound tag (when action is outbound)"
msgstr "Целевой тег исходящего подключения (когда действие - outbound)"

msgid "Invert"
msgstr "Инвертировать"

# Rule types
msgid "Invert the match condition"
msgstr "Инвертировать условие сопоставления"

msgid "domain"
msgstr "домен"

msgid "domain_suffix"
msgstr "суффикс_домена"

msgid "domain_keyword"
msgstr "ключевое_слово_домена"

msgid "ip_cidr"
msgstr "cidr_ip"

msgid "port"
msgstr "порт"

msgid "protocol"
msgstr "протокол"

msgid "process_name"
msgstr "имя_процесса"

msgid "rule_set"
msgstr "набор_правил"

msgid "geoip"
msgstr "geoip"

# Rule actions
msgid "geosite"
msgstr "geosite"

msgid "reject"
msgstr "отклонить"

# DNS fields
msgid "outbound"
msgstr "исходящее"

msgid "DNS Servers"
msgstr "DNS-серверы"

msgid "DNS Rules"
msgstr "Правила DNS"

msgid "DNS Server Tag"
msgstr "Тег DNS-сервера"

msgid "Tag for referencing this DNS server"
msgstr "Тег для ссылки на этот DNS-сервер"

msgid "DNS Server Address"
msgstr "Адрес DNS-сервера"

msgid "DNS server address (e.g. https://1.1.1.1/dns-query)"
msgstr "Адрес DNS-сервера (например, https://1.1.1.1/dns-query)"

msgid "Address Resolver"
msgstr "Резолвер адресов"

msgid "Tag of another DNS server to resolve this server's address"
msgstr "Тег другого DNS-сервера для разрешения адреса этого сервера"

msgid "Address Strategy"
msgstr "Стратегия адресов"

msgid "IP address resolution strategy for the server address"
msgstr "Стратегия разрешения IP-адресов для адреса сервера"

msgid "Resolution Strategy"
msgstr "Стратегия разрешения"

msgid "IP address resolution strategy for DNS queries"
msgstr "Стратегия разрешения IP-адресов для DNS-запросов"

msgid "Detour"
msgstr "Обход"

msgid "Outbound tag for DNS queries"
msgstr "Тег исходящего подключения для DNS-запросов"

msgid "ipv4_only"
msgstr "только_ipv4"

msgid "ipv6_only"
msgstr "только_ipv6"

msgid "prefer_ipv4"
msgstr "предпочитать_ipv4"

msgid "prefer_ipv6"
msgstr "предпочитать_ipv6"

msgid "FakeIP Enabled"
msgstr "FakeIP включен"

msgid "Enable FakeIP DNS response"
msgstr "Включить DNS-ответы FakeIP"

msgid "FakeIP IPv4 Range"
msgstr "Диапазон FakeIP IPv4"

msgid "IPv4 address range for FakeIP"
msgstr "Диапазон IPv4-адресов для FakeIP"

msgid "FakeIP IPv6 Range"
msgstr "Диапазон FakeIP IPv6"

msgid "IPv6 address range for FakeIP"
msgstr "Диапазон IPv6-адресов для FakeIP"

msgid "Hosts"
msgstr "Хосты"

msgid "Static DNS hosts entries (hosts file format)"
msgstr "Статические записи DNS-хостов (формат файла hosts)"

msgid "DNS Rule Type"
msgstr "Тип правила DNS"

msgid "Type of DNS routing condition"
msgstr "Тип условия маршрутизации DNS"

msgid "DNS Rule Value"
msgstr "Значение правила DNS"

msgid "DNS Server"
msgstr "DNS-сервер"

# TUN fields
msgid "Target DNS server tag for matching queries"
msgstr "Целевой тег DNS-сервера для сопоставляемых запросов"

msgid "TUN Enabled"
msgstr "TUN включен"

msgid "Enable TUN interface for transparent proxy"
msgstr "Включить TUN интерфейс для прозрачного прокси"

msgid "TUN Interface Name"
msgstr "Имя TUN интерфейса"

msgid "Name of the TUN virtual interface"
msgstr "Имя виртуального TUN интерфейса"

msgid "TUN MTU"
msgstr "MTU TUN"

msgid "MTU for the TUN interface"
msgstr "MTU для TUN интерфейса"

msgid "TUN GSO"
msgstr "GSO TUN"

msgid "Enable Generic Segmentation Offload"
msgstr "Включить общую разгрузку сегментации"

msgid "TUN Auto Route"
msgstr "Автоматическая маршрутизация TUN"

msgid "Automatically set up routing table entries"
msgstr "Автоматически настроить записи таблицы маршрутизации"

msgid "TUN Strict Route"
msgstr "Строгая маршрутизация TUN"

msgid "Enforce strict routing to prevent DNS leaks"
msgstr "Принудительная строгая маршрутизация для предотвращения утечек DNS"

msgid "TUN Endpoint Independent NAT"
msgstr "NAT TUN независимый от конечной точки"

msgid "TUN Stack"
msgstr "Стек TUN"

msgid "TCP/IP stack implementation for TUN"
msgstr "Реализация стека TCP/IP для TUN"

msgid "IPv4 Address"
msgstr "IPv4 адрес"

msgid "IPv4 address and prefix for TUN interface"
msgstr "IPv4 адрес и префикс для TUN интерфейса"

msgid "IPv6 Address"
msgstr "IPv6 адрес"

# Rule Sets
msgid "IPv6 address and prefix for TUN interface"
msgstr "IPv6 адрес и префикс для TUN интерфейса"

msgid "Rule Sets"
msgstr "Наборы правил"

msgid "Rule Set Tag"
msgstr "Тег набора правил"

msgid "Tag for referencing this rule set"
msgstr "Тег для ссылки на этот набор правил"

msgid "Rule Set Type"
msgstr "Тип набора правил"

msgid "remote"
msgstr "удаленный"

msgid "local"
msgstr "локальный"

msgid "Format"
msgstr "Формат"

msgid "Rule set file format"
msgstr "Формат файла набора правил"

msgid "source"
msgstr "исходный"

msgid "binary"
msgstr "бинарный"

msgid "URL"
msgstr "URL"

msgid "Remote URL for rule set download"
msgstr "Удаленный URL для загрузки набора правил"

msgid "Local Path"
msgstr "Локальный путь"

msgid "Local file path for rule set"
msgstr "Локальный путь к файлу набора правил"

msgid "Update Interval"
msgstr "Интервал обновления"

# Dashboard
msgid "Automatic update interval (e.g. 1d, 24h)"
msgstr "Интервал автоматического обновления (например, 1d, 24h)"

msgid "Service Status"
msgstr "Статус службы"

msgid "Start Service"
msgstr "Запустить службу"

msgid "Stop Service"
msgstr "Остановить службу"

msgid "Restart Service"
msgstr "Перезапустить службу"

msgid "Reload Configuration"
msgstr "Перезагрузить конфигурацию"

msgid "Traffic Statistics"
msgstr "Статистика трафика"

msgid "Upload Traffic"
msgstr "Исходящий трафик"

msgid "Download Traffic"
msgstr "Входящий трафик"

msgid "Total Traffic"
msgstr "Общий трафик"

msgid "Active Connections"
msgstr "Активные подключения"

msgid "Outbound Health"
msgstr "Состояние исходящих"

msgid "Service Uptime"
msgstr "Время работы"

msgid "Memory Usage"
msgstr "Использование памяти"

msgid "CPU Usage"
msgstr "Использование CPU"

msgid "Real-time Traffic"
msgstr "Трафик в реальном времени"

msgid "Traffic Graph"
msgstr "График трафика"

msgid "Connections"
msgstr "Подключения"

msgid "Source"
msgstr "Источник"

msgid "Destination"
msgstr "Назначение"

msgid "Process"
msgstr "Процесс"

# Log viewer
msgid "Duration"
msgstr "Длительность"

msgid "Log Viewer"
msgstr "Просмотр журнала"

msgid "Auto Refresh"
msgstr "Автообновление"

msgid "Auto Scroll"
msgstr "Автопрокрутка"

msgid "Clear Log"
msgstr "Очистить журнал"

msgid "Log Level Filter"
msgstr "Фильтр уровня журнала"

msgid "Search Log"
msgstr "Поиск в журнале"

msgid "No log entries found"
msgstr "Записи журнала не найдены"

msgid "Connection Monitor"
msgstr "Монитор подключений"

# Settings page
msgid "Kill Connection"
msgstr "Разорвать подключение"

msgid "Configuration"
msgstr "Конфигурация"

msgid "Import Configuration"
msgstr "Импорт конфигурации"

msgid "Export Configuration"
msgstr "Экспорт конфигурации"

msgid "Backup Configuration"
msgstr "Создать резервную копию"

msgid "Restore Previous Version"
msgstr "Восстановить предыдущую версию"

msgid "Update sing-box Binary"
msgstr "Обновить бинарный файл sing-box"

msgid "Update Rule Sets"
msgstr "Обновить наборы правил"

msgid "Clear DNS Cache"
msgstr "Очистить DNS-кэш"

msgid "Current Version"
msgstr "Текущая версия"

msgid "Latest Version"
msgstr "Последняя версия"

msgid "Check for Updates"
msgstr "Проверить обновления"

msgid "Configuration valid"
msgstr "Конфигурация действительна"

msgid "Configuration invalid"
msgstr "Конфигурация недействительна"

# Messages
msgid "Validation errors"
msgstr "Ошибки проверки"

msgid "Are you sure?"
msgstr "Вы уверены?"

msgid "This action cannot be undone."
msgstr "Это действие нельзя отменить."

msgid "Settings saved successfully."
msgstr "Настройки успешно сохранены."

msgid "Failed to save settings."
msgstr "Не удалось сохранить настройки."

msgid "Configuration generated successfully."
msgstr "Конфигурация успешно создана."

msgid "Failed to generate configuration."
msgstr "Не удалось создать конфигурацию."

msgid "Service started successfully."
msgstr "Служба успешно запущена."

msgid "Service stopped successfully."
msgstr "Служба успешно остановлена."

msgid "Service restarted successfully."
msgstr "Служба успешно перезапущена."

msgid "Configuration reloaded successfully."
msgstr "Конфигурация успешно перезагружена."

msgid "Backup created successfully."
msgstr "Резервная копия успешно создана."

msgid "Rollback completed successfully."
msgstr "Откат успешно выполнен."

msgid "Connection test passed."
msgstr "Проверка подключения пройдена."

msgid "Connection test failed."
msgstr "Проверка подключения не пройдена."

msgid "All tests completed."
msgstr "Все проверки завершены."

msgid "DNS cache cleared."
msgstr "DNS-кэш очищен."

msgid "Item added successfully."
msgstr "Элемент успешно добавлен."

msgid "Item updated successfully."
msgstr "Элемент успешно обновлен."

msgid "Item deleted successfully."
msgstr "Элемент успешно удален."

msgid "Please enter a valid name."
msgstr "Введите корректное имя."

msgid "Name must be unique."
msgstr "Имя должно быть уникальным."

msgid "Required field."
msgstr "Обязательное поле."

msgid "Invalid format."
msgstr "Неверный формат."

msgid "Only alphanumeric, underscore, hyphen allowed"
msgstr "Допускаются только буквы, цифры, подчеркивание и дефис"

msgid "Value out of range."
msgstr "Значение вне диапазона."

msgid "Port must be between 1 and 65535."
msgstr "Порт должен быть в диапазоне от 1 до 65535."

msgid "Invalid IP address."
msgstr "Неверный IP-адрес."

msgid "Invalid CIDR notation."
msgstr "Неверная нотация CIDR."

msgid "Invalid URL format."
msgstr "Неверный формат URL."

msgid "Invalid UUID format."
msgstr "Неверный формат UUID."

msgid "No items configured."
msgstr "Элементы не настроены."

msgid "Add your first item to get started."
msgstr "Добавьте первый элемент для начала работы."

msgid "No outbounds configured."
msgstr "Исходящие подключения не настроены."

msgid "No inbounds configured."
msgstr "Входящие подключения не настроены."

msgid "No rules configured."
msgstr "Правила не настроены."

msgid "No DNS servers configured."
msgstr "DNS-серверы не настроены."

msgid "No rule sets configured."
msgstr "Наборы правил не настроены."

msgid "Select an outbound type to configure options."
msgstr "Выберите тип исходящего подключения для настройки параметров."

msgid "Drag to reorder rules"
msgstr "Перетащите для изменения порядка правил"

msgid "Higher priority rules are evaluated first."
msgstr "Правила с более высоким приоритетом оцениваются первыми."

msgid "Built-in outbounds (direct, block) are always available."
msgstr "Встроенные исходящие подключения (direct, block) всегда доступны."

msgid "Default outbound"
msgstr "Исходящее по умолчанию"

msgid "Route all traffic through this outbound by default"
msgstr "По умолчанию направлять весь трафик через это исходящее подключение"

msgid "Final"
msgstr "Финальное"

msgid "Final action when no rules match"
msgstr "Финальное действие, когда правила не совпадают"

msgid "Geolocation"
msgstr "Геолокация"

msgid "GeoIP country code"
msgstr "Код страны GeoIP"

msgid "Geosite category"
msgstr "Категория Geosite"

msgid "All proxy types"
msgstr "Все типы прокси"

msgid "Individual proxy servers"
msgstr "Индивидуальные прокси-серверы"

msgid "Proxy groups"
msgstr "Группы прокси"

msgid "Health check"
msgstr "Проверка состояния"

msgid "Update available"
msgstr "Доступно обновление"

msgid "Up to date"
msgstr "Актуальная версия"

msgid "Bytes"
msgstr "Байт"

msgid "KB"
msgstr "КБ"

msgid "MB"
msgstr "МБ"

msgid "GB"
msgstr "ГБ"

msgid "TB"
msgstr "ТБ"

msgid " packets"
msgstr " пакетов"

msgid " errors"
msgstr " ошибок"

msgid " restart"
msgstr " перезапуск"

msgid " apply"
msgstr " применить"

msgid " cancel"
msgstr " отменить"

msgid "minutes"
msgstr "минут"

msgid "hours"
msgstr "часов"

msgid "days"
msgstr "дней"

msgid "Cron Schedule"
msgstr "Расписание Cron"

msgid "Schedule for automatic config updates"
msgstr "Расписание автоматических обновлений конфигурации"

msgid "Subscription URL"
msgstr "URL подписки"

msgid "URL for proxy subscription"
msgstr "URL для подписки на прокси"

msgid "User Agent"
msgstr "User-Agent"

msgid "HTTP User-Agent header for requests"
msgstr "HTTP заголовок User-Agent для запросов"

msgid "Connect Timeout"
msgstr "Таймаут подключения"

msgid "Connection timeout in seconds"
msgstr "Таймаут подключения в секундах"

msgid "Idle Timeout"
msgstr "Таймаут бездействия"

msgid "Idle connection timeout in seconds"
msgstr "Таймаут неактивного подключения в секундах"

msgid "UDP Timeout"
msgstr "Таймаут UDP"

msgid "UDP session timeout in seconds"
msgstr "Таймаут UDP-сессии в секундах"

msgid "TCP Fast Open"
msgstr "TCP Fast Open"

msgid "Enable TCP Fast Open"
msgstr "Включить TCP Fast Open"

msgid "TCP Multi Path"
msgstr "TCP Multi Path"

msgid "Enable TCP multi-path"
msgstr "Включить TCP multi-path"

msgid "UDP Fragment"
msgstr "Фрагментация UDP"

msgid "Enable UDP fragmentation"
msgstr "Включить фрагментацию UDP"

msgid "Domain Strategy"
msgstr "Стратегия доменов"

msgid "Domain resolution strategy"
msgstr "Стратегия разрешения доменов"

msgid "Fallback Delay"
msgstr "Задержка fallback"

msgid "Delay for fallback in milliseconds"
msgstr "Задержка fallback в миллисекундах"

msgid "Cache Size"
msgstr "Размер кэша"

msgid "DNS cache size"
msgstr "Размер DNS-кэша"

msgid "Cache TTL"
msgstr "TTL кэша"

msgid "DNS cache TTL in seconds"
msgstr "TTL DNS-кэша в секундах"

msgid "Independent Cache"
msgstr "Независимый кэш"

msgid "Enable independent cache per DNS server"
msgstr "Включить независимый кэш для каждого DNS-сервера"

msgid "Client Subnet"
msgstr "Подсеть клиента"

msgid "EDNS Client Subnet"
msgstr "EDNS Client Subnet"

msgid "Disable Cache"
msgstr "Отключить кэш"

msgid "Disable DNS caching"
msgstr "Отключить кэширование DNS"

msgid "Disable Expire"
msgstr "Отключить истечение"

msgid "Disable cache expiration"
msgstr "Отключить истечение срока кэша"

msgid "Rules Directory"
msgstr "Директория правил"

msgid "Directory for rule set files"
msgstr "Директория для файлов наборов правил"

msgid "Outbounds Directory"
msgstr "Директория исходящих"

msgid "Directory for outbound configuration files"
msgstr "Директория для файлов конфигурации исходящих подключений"

msgid "Inbound Tag"
msgstr "Тег входящего"

msgid "Tag for this inbound"
msgstr "Тег для этого входящего подключения"

msgid "Outbound Tag"
msgstr "Тег исходящего"

msgid "Tag for this outbound"
msgstr "Тег для этого исходящего подключения"

msgid "Tag"
msgstr "Тег"

msgid "Unique identifier tag"
msgstr "Уникальный идентификатор-тег"

msgid "Network"
msgstr "Сеть"

msgid "Network type (tcp/udp/both)"
msgstr "Тип сети (tcp/udp/оба)"

msgid "Listen"
msgstr "Прослушивание"

msgid "Listen network address"
msgstr "Адрес прослушивания сети"

msgid "Listen Network"
msgstr "Сеть прослушивания"

msgid "TCP Redirect Port"
msgstr "Порт TCP-редиректа"

msgid "Port for transparent TCP redirect"
msgstr "Порт для прозрачного TCP-редиректа"

msgid "TProxy Port"
msgstr "Порт TProxy"

msgid "Port for TProxy"
msgstr "Порт для TProxy"

msgid "Auto Redirect"
msgstr "Авто-редирект"

msgid "Automatically configure iptables/nftables redirect"
msgstr "Автоматически настроить iptables/nftables редирект"

msgid "Auto Redirect Input Mark"
msgstr "Метка входа авто-редиректа"

msgid "Firewall mark for auto redirect input"
msgstr "Метка файрвола для входа авто-редиректа"

msgid "Auto Redirect Output Mark"
msgstr "Метка файрвола для выхода авто-редиректа"

msgid "Platform"
msgstr "Платформа"

msgid "Platform-specific settings"
msgstr "Настройки для конкретной платформы"

msgid "HTTP Proxy"
msgstr "HTTP-прокси"

msgid "HTTP proxy settings"
msgstr "Настройки HTTP-прокси"

msgid "Server Bind"
msgstr "Привязка сервера"

msgid "Bind server to specific interface"
msgstr "Привязать сервер к конкретному интерфейсу"

msgid "Connect Bind"
msgstr "Привязка подключения"

msgid "Bind outbound connections to specific interface"
msgstr "Привязать исходящие подключения к конкретному интерфейсу"

msgid "Routing Mark"
msgstr "Метка маршрутизации"

msgid "Firewall routing mark"
msgstr "Метка маршрутизации файрвола"

msgid "Default Interface"
msgstr "Интерфейс по умолчанию"

msgid "Default network interface"
msgstr "Сетевой интерфейс по умолчанию"

msgid "Find Process"
msgstr "Поиск процесса"

msgid "Enable process name lookup"
msgstr "Включить определение имени процесса"

msgid "Default Tolerance"
msgstr "Допуск по умолчанию"

msgid "Default tolerance for URLTest in milliseconds"
msgstr "Допуск по умолчанию для URLTest в миллисекундах"

msgid "Default URL"
msgstr "URL по умолчанию"

msgid "Default test URL for URLTest"
msgstr "URL для проверки по умолчанию для URLTest"

msgid "Interval"
msgstr "Интервал"

msgid "Health check interval"
msgstr "Интервал проверки состояния"

msgid "Tolerance"
msgstr "Допуск"

msgid "Latency tolerance in ms"
msgstr "Допустимая задержка в мс"

msgid "URL Test"
msgstr "URL-тест"

msgid "URL test settings for groups"
msgstr "Настройки URL-теста для групп"

msgid "Interrupt Group"
msgstr "Группа прерываний"

msgid "Group to interrupt on switch"
msgstr "Группа для прерывания при переключении"

msgid "Idle Timeout (seconds)"
msgstr "Таймаут бездействия (секунды)"

msgid "Timeout for idle connections"
msgstr "Таймаут для неактивных подключений"

msgid "Disable UDP"
msgstr "Отключить UDP"

msgid "Disable UDP for this outbound"
msgstr "Отключить UDP для этого исходящего подключения"

msgid "Disable DNS Round Robin"
msgstr "Отключить Round Robin DNS"

msgid "Disable DNS round-robin selection"
msgstr "Отключить round-robin выбор DNS"

msgid "Server Ports"
msgstr "Порты сервера"

msgid "Additional server ports"
msgstr "Дополнительные порты сервера"

msgid "Hop Interval"
msgstr "Интервал хопов"

msgid "Port hopping interval in seconds"
msgstr "Интервал смены портов (hopping) в секундах"

msgid "Up Mbps"
msgstr "Отдача Мбит/с"

msgid "Obfs"
msgstr "Obfs"

msgid "Obfuscation type for Hysteria2"
msgstr "Тип обфускации для Hysteria2"

msgid "Obfs Password"
msgstr "Пароль обфускации"

msgid "Password for obfuscation"
msgstr "Пароль для обфускации"

msgid "Receive Window Conn"
msgstr "Окно приёма соединения"

msgid "QUIC receive window per connection"
msgstr "Окно приёма QUIC на соединение"

msgid "Receive Window"
msgstr "Окно приёма"

msgid "QUIC receive window total"
msgstr "Общее окно приёма QUIC"

msgid "Disable MTU Discovery"
msgstr "Отключить обнаружение MTU"

msgid "Disable QUIC path MTU discovery"
msgstr "Отключить обнаружение MTU пути QUIC"

msgid "Fast Open"
msgstr "Быстрое открытие"

msgid "Enable TCP fast open"
msgstr "Включить быстрое открытие TCP"

msgid "Lazy Start"
msgstr "Отложенный старт"

msgid "Start connection on first use"
msgstr "Запускать подключение при первом использовании"

msgid "Health Check URL"
msgstr "URL проверки состояния"

msgid "URL for health checking"
msgstr "URL для проверки состояния"

msgid "Health Check Interval"
msgstr "Интервал проверки состояния"

msgid "Interval between health checks"
msgstr "Интервал между проверками состояния"

msgid "Health Check Tolerance"
msgstr "Допуск проверки состояния"

msgid "Health check latency tolerance"
msgstr "Допустимая задержка проверки состояния"

msgid "Expected Nodes"
msgstr "Ожидаемые узлы"

msgid "Expected number of healthy nodes"
msgstr "Ожидаемое количество работающих узлов"

msgid "Max History"
msgstr "Макс. история"

msgid "Maximum history size for latency tracking"
msgstr "Максимальный размер истории отслеживания задержки"

msgid "Serve Still"
msgstr "Продолжать обслуживание"

msgid "Continue serving with stale data"
msgstr "Продолжать обслуживание с устаревшими данными"

msgid "Salamander"
msgstr "Salamander"

msgid "Salamander padding"
msgstr "Salamander padding"

msgid "Padding"
msgstr "Padding"

msgstr "Padding подключения"

msgid "Pin SHA256"
msgstr "SHA256 pin"

msgstr "SHA256 pin сертификата"

msgid "Certificate"
msgstr "Сертификат"

msgstr "Путь к TLS-сертификату"

msgid "Private Key Path"
msgstr "Путь к приватному ключу"

msgid "Path to TLS private key"
msgstr "Путь к приватному ключу TLS"

msgid "Trusted Cert"
msgstr "Доверенный сертификат"

msgid "Path to trusted CA certificate"
msgstr "Путь к доверенному CA-сертификату"

msgstr "uTLS"

msgstr "uTLS fingerprint"

msgstr "ECH"

msgstr "Включить Encrypted Client Hello"

msgid "ECH Config"
msgstr "Конфиг ECH"

msgid "ECH configuration"
msgstr "Конфигурация ECH"

msgstr "Reality включен"

msgid "Enable REALITY protocol"
msgstr "Включить протокол REALITY"

msgid "Reality Public Key"
msgstr "Публичный ключ Reality"

msgstr "Публичный ключ REALITY"

msgstr "Короткий ID Reality"

msgstr "Короткий ID REALITY"

msgstr "Reality SpiderX"

msgstr "Значение REALITY SpiderX"

msgid "Reality Server Name"
msgstr "Имя сервера Reality"

msgstr "Имя сервера REALITY"

msgid "Reality Private Key"
msgstr "Приватный ключ Reality"

msgstr "Приватный ключ REALITY"

msgstr "Сервер handshake"

msgstr "Адрес сервера handshake"

msgstr "Порт handshake"

msgstr "Порт сервера handshake"

msgstr "Макс. ранних данных"

msgstr "Максимальный размер ранних данных"

msgstr "Заголовок ранних данных"

msgstr "Имя заголовка ранних данных"

msgstr "Поддержание соединения"

msgstr "Интервал поддержания соединения"

msgstr "Разрешить прозрачный"

msgstr "Разрешить прозрачный прокси"

msgstr "Предпочтение разрешения"

msgstr "Предпочтение разрешения IP"

msgstr "Предпочитать IPv6"

msgstr "Пользовательская команда прокси"

msgstr "Интерфейс"

msgstr "Сетевой интерфейс"

msgstr "Дайлер"

msgstr "Настройки сетевого дайлера"

msgstr "Mux включен"

msgstr "Включить мультиплексирование"

msgstr "Протокол Mux"

msgstr "Протокол мультиплексирования"

msgstr "Макс. потоков Mux"

msgstr "Включить padding Mux"

msgstr "Включить режим отладки Brutal"

msgstr "Переопределить назначение обнаруженным доменом"

msgstr " Сохранить выбор"

msgstr "Запомнить выбранное исходящее подключение"

msgstr " Сохранить неудачные"

msgstr "Запомнить неудачное исходящее подключение"

msgstr " Отключить UDP"

msgstr " По умолчанию"

msgstr "Балансировка нагрузки"

msgstr "Непредвиденный"

msgstr " Полезная нагрузка"

msgstr " Путь"

msgstr " Заголовки"

msgstr " Метод"

msgstr "Ранние данные"

msgstr " Имя сервиса"

msgstr " Разрешительный"

msgstr " Макс. версия"

~~~~ {Sing-box-for-OPNsense/src/opnsense/mvc/app/models/OPNsense/SingBox/SingBox.php} ~~~~
 (string)$this->general->enabled,
            'loglevel'                   => (string)$this->general->loglevel,
            'logoutput'                  => (string)$this->general->logoutput,
            'logtimestamp'               => (string)$this->general->logtimestamp,
            'experimental_api_enabled'   => (string)$this->general->experimental_api_enabled,
            'experimental_api_port'      => (string)$this->general->experimental_api_port,
            'experimental_api_secret'    => (string)$this->general->experimental_api_secret,
        ];

        // ---- outbounds ----
        $result['outbounds'] = [];
        foreach ($this->outbounds->outbound->iterateItems() as $uuid => $outbound) {
            $result['outbounds'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($outbound);
        }

        // ---- inbounds ----
        $result['inbounds'] = [];
        foreach ($this->inbounds->inbound->iterateItems() as $uuid => $inbound) {
            $result['inbounds'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($inbound);
        }

        // ---- rules ----
        $result['rules'] = [];
        foreach ($this->rules->rule->iterateItems() as $uuid => $rule) {
            $result['rules'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($rule);
        }

        // ---- dns ----
        $result['dns'] = [
            'servers'           => [],
            'rules'             => [],
            'fakeip_enabled'    => (string)$this->dns->fakeip_enabled,
            'fakeip_inet4_range'=> (string)$this->dns->fakeip_inet4_range,
            'fakeip_inet6_range'=> (string)$this->dns->fakeip_inet6_range,
            'hosts'             => (string)$this->dns->hosts,
        ];
        foreach ($this->dns->servers->server->iterateItems() as $uuid => $server) {
            $result['dns']['servers'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($server);
        }
        foreach ($this->dns->rules->dns_rule->iterateItems() as $uuid => $rule) {
            $result['dns']['rules'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($rule);
        }

        // ---- tun ----
        $result['tun'] = [
            'enabled'                     => (string)$this->tun->enabled,
            'interface_name'              => (string)$this->tun->interface_name,
            'mtu'                         => (string)$this->tun->mtu,
            'gso'                         => (string)$this->tun->gso,
            'auto_route'                  => (string)$this->tun->auto_route,
            'strict_route'                => (string)$this->tun->strict_route,
            'endpoint_independent_nat'    => (string)$this->tun->endpoint_independent_nat,
            'stack'                       => (string)$this->tun->stack,
            'inet4_address'              => (string)$this->tun->inet4_address,
            'inet6_address'              => (string)$this->tun->inet6_address,
        ];

        // ---- rule_sets ----
        $result['rule_sets'] = [];
        foreach ($this->rule_sets->rule_set->iterateItems() as $uuid => $ruleSet) {
            $result['rule_sets'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($ruleSet);
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * Generate a sing-box compatible config.json structure.
     *
     * @return array The configuration array ready for json_encode()
     */
    public function generateConfigJson(): array
    {
        $cfg = [];

        // ---- log ----
        $cfg['log'] = [
            'level'        => (string)$this->general->loglevel ?: 'info',
            'output'       => (string)$this->general->logoutput ?: '/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log',
            'timestamp'    => (bool)(int)$this->general->logtimestamp,
        ];

        // ---- experimental API ----
        if ((bool)(int)$this->general->experimental_api_enabled) {
            $cfg['experimental'] = [
                'clash_api' => [
                    'external_controller' => '0.0.0.0:' . ((int)$this->general->experimental_api_port ?: 9090),
                    'secret'              => (string)$this->general->experimental_api_secret,
                    'store_selected'      => true,
                ],
            ];
        }

        // ---- DNS ----
        $cfg['dns'] = $this->buildDnsConfig();

        // ---- inbounds ----
        $cfg['inbounds'] = $this->buildInboundsConfig();

        // ---- outbounds ----
        $cfg['outbounds'] = $this->buildOutboundsConfig();

        // ---- route ----
        $cfg['route'] = $this->buildRouteConfig();

        return $cfg;
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Private builders
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * Build DNS configuration section.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildDnsConfig(): array
    {
        $dns = [
            'servers' => [],
            'rules'   => [],
        ];

        // DNS servers
        foreach ($this->dns->servers->server->iterateItems() as $server) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$server->enabled) {
                continue;
            }
            $s = [
                'tag'     => (string)$server->tag,
                'address' => (string)$server->address,
            ];
            if ((string)$server->address_resolver !== '') {
                $s['address_resolver'] = (string)$server->address_resolver;
            }
            if ((string)$server->address_strategy !== '') {
                $s['address_strategy'] = (string)$server->address_strategy;
            }
            if ((string)$server->strategy !== '') {
                $s['strategy'] = (string)$server->strategy;
            }
            if ((string)$server->detour !== '') {
                $s['detour'] = (string)$server->detour;
            }
            $dns['servers'][] = $s;
        }

        // DNS rules
        foreach ($this->dns->rules->dns_rule->iterateItems() as $rule) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$rule->enabled) {
                continue;
            }
            $r = [];
            $type  = (string)$rule->rule_type;
            $value = (string)$rule->value;
            if ($type !== '' && $value !== '') {
                $r[$type] = $this->parseCommaList($value);
            }
            if ((string)$rule->server !== '') {
                $r['server'] = (string)$rule->server;
            }
            if (!empty($r)) {
                $dns['rules'][] = $r;
            }
        }

        // FakeIP
        if ((bool)(int)$this->dns->fakeip_enabled) {
            $dns['fakeip'] = [
                'enabled'    => true,
                'inet4_range'=> (string)$this->dns->fakeip_inet4_range ?: '198.18.0.0/15',
                'inet6_range'=> (string)$this->dns->fakeip_inet6_range ?: 'fc00::/18',
            ];
        }

        return $dns;
    }

    /**
     * Build inbounds configuration section.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildInboundsConfig(): array
    {
        $inbounds = [];

        foreach ($this->inbounds->inbound->iterateItems() as $inbound) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$inbound->enabled) {
                continue;
            }

            $type = (string)$inbound->type;
            $item = [
                'type' => $type,
                'tag'  => (string)$inbound->name,
            ];

            // Common listen settings
            if (!in_array($type, ['tun'], true)) {
                $item['listen']      = (string)$inbound->listen ?: '0.0.0.0';
                $item['listen_port'] = (int)(string)$inbound->listen_port;
            }

            switch ($type) {
                case 'tun':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildTunInbound($inbound));
                    break;

                case 'mixed':
                case 'socks':
                case 'http':
                    if ((string)$inbound->auth_username !== '') {
                        $item['users'] = [[
                            'username' => (string)$inbound->auth_username,
                            'password' => (string)$inbound->auth_password,
                        ]];
                    }
                    if ($type === 'mixed') {
                        $item['set_system_proxy'] = (bool)(int)$inbound->set_system_proxy;
                    }
                    break;

                case 'shadowsocks':
                    $item['method']   = (string)$inbound->ss_method;
                    $item['password'] = (string)$inbound->ss_password;
                    break;

                case 'vmess':
                case 'vless':
                case 'trojan':
                    $users = $this->parseUsersJson((string)$inbound->users);
                    if (!empty($users)) {
                        $item['users'] = $users;
                    }
                    break;

                case 'hysteria2':
                    if ((string)$inbound->h2_obfs !== '') {
                        $item['obfs'] = [
                            'type'     => (string)$inbound->h2_obfs,
                            'password' => (string)$inbound->h2_obfs_password,
                        ];
                    }
                    $users = $this->parseUsersJson((string)$inbound->users);
                    if (!empty($users)) {
                        $item['users'] = $users;
                    }
                    break;
            }

            $inbounds[] = $item;
        }

        return $inbounds;
    }

    /**
     * Build TUN-specific inbound settings.
     *
     * @param mixed $inbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildTunInbound($inbound): array
    {
        $tun = [
            'interface_name'              => (string)$inbound->tun_interface_name ?: (string)$this->tun->interface_name ?: 'sing0',
            'mtu'                         => (int)((string)$inbound->tun_mtu ?: (string)$this->tun->mtu ?: 9000),
            'gso'                         => (bool)(int)($inbound->tun_gso ?: $this->tun->gso ?: 0),
            'auto_route'                  => (bool)(int)($inbound->tun_auto_route ?: $this->tun->auto_route ?: 1),
            'strict_route'                => (bool)(int)($inbound->tun_strict_route ?: $this->tun->strict_route ?: 1),
            'endpoint_independent_nat'    => (bool)(int)($inbound->tun_endpoint_independent_nat ?: $this->tun->endpoint_independent_nat ?: 0),
            'stack'                       => (string)$inbound->tun_stack ?: (string)$this->tun->stack ?: 'system',
            'inet4_address'              => (string)$this->tun->inet4_address ?: '172.19.0.1/30',
            'inet6_address'              => (string)$this->tun->inet6_address ?: 'fdfe:dcba:9876::1/126',
        ];
        return $tun;
    }

    /**
     * Build outbounds configuration section.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildOutboundsConfig(): array
    {
        $outbounds = [];

        foreach ($this->outbounds->outbound->iterateItems() as $outbound) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$outbound->enabled) {
                continue;
            }

            $type = (string)$outbound->type;
            $item = [
                'type' => $type,
                'tag'  => (string)$outbound->name,
            ];

            switch ($type) {
                case 'vless':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildVlessOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'vmess':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildVmessOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'trojan':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildTrojanOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'shadowsocks':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildShadowsocksOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'hysteria2':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildHysteria2Outbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'wireguard':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildWireGuardOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'selector':
                case 'urltest':
                case 'load-balance':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildGroupOutbound($outbound, $type));
                    break;

                case 'direct':
                    // direct has no extra settings
                    break;

                case 'block':
                    // block has no extra settings
                    break;
            }

            $outbounds[] = $item;
        }

        // Ensure 'direct' and 'block' outbounds exist if referenced
        $this->ensureDefaultOutbounds($outbounds);

        return $outbounds;
    }

    /**
     * Build VLESS outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildVlessOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'         => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port'    => (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'uuid'           => (string)$outbound->uuid,
            'flow'           => (string)$outbound->flow,
            'packet_encoding'=> (string)$outbound->packet_encoding ?: 'xudp',
        ];

        // Remove empty optional fields
        if ($item['flow'] === '') {
            unset($item['flow']);
        }

        // TLS
        $tls = $this->buildTlsConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($tls)) {
            $item['tls'] = $tls;
        }

        // Transport
        $transport = $this->buildTransportConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($transport)) {
            $item['transport'] = $transport;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build VMess outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildVmessOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'    => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port'=> (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'uuid'      => (string)$outbound->uuid,
            'security'  => (string)$outbound->security ?: 'auto',
            'alter_id'  => (int)(string)$outbound->alterId,
        ];

        // TLS
        $tls = $this->buildTlsConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($tls)) {
            $item['tls'] = $tls;
        }

        // Transport
        $transport = $this->buildTransportConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($transport)) {
            $item['transport'] = $transport;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build Trojan outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildTrojanOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'      => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port' => (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'password'    => (string)$outbound->password,
        ];

        // TLS
        $tls = $this->buildTlsConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($tls)) {
            $item['tls'] = $tls;
        }

        // Transport
        $transport = $this->buildTransportConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($transport)) {
            $item['transport'] = $transport;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build Shadowsocks outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildShadowsocksOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'      => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port' => (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'method'      => (string)$outbound->method,
            'password'    => (string)$outbound->password,
        ];

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build Hysteria2 outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildHysteria2Outbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'      => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port' => (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'password'    => (string)$outbound->password,
        ];

        if ((string)$outbound->obfs !== '') {
            $item['obfs'] = [
                'type'     => (string)$outbound->obfs,
                'password' => (string)$outbound->obfs_password,
            ];
        }

        if ((string)$outbound->up_mbps !== '') {
            $item['up_mbps'] = (int)(string)$outbound->up_mbps;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->down_mbps !== '') {
            $item['down_mbps'] = (int)(string)$outbound->down_mbps;
        }

        // TLS
        $tls = $this->buildTlsConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($tls)) {
            $item['tls'] = $tls;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build WireGuard outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildWireGuardOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'local_address'  => $this->parseCommaList((string)$outbound->local_address),
            'private_key'    => (string)$outbound->private_key,
            'peers'          => [],
        ];

        $peer = [];
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_public_key !== '') {
            $peer['public_key'] = (string)$outbound->peer_public_key;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_preshared_key !== '') {
            $peer['pre_shared_key'] = (string)$outbound->peer_preshared_key;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_endpoint !== '') {
            $peer['endpoint'] = (string)$outbound->peer_endpoint;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_allowed_ips !== '') {
            $peer['allowed_ips'] = $this->parseCommaList((string)$outbound->peer_allowed_ips);
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_persistent_keepalive !== '') {
            $peer['persistent_keepalive_interval'] = (int)(string)$outbound->peer_persistent_keepalive;
        }

        if (!empty($peer)) {
            $item['peers'][] = $peer;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build group outbound (selector/urltest/load-balance) configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @param string $type
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildGroupOutbound($outbound, string $type): array
    {
        $item = [];

        $groupOutbounds = $this->parseCommaList((string)$outbound->group_outbounds);
        if (!empty($groupOutbounds)) {
            $item['outbounds'] = $groupOutbounds;
        } else {
            $item['outbounds'] = ['direct'];
        }

        if ($type === 'urltest' || $type === 'load-balance') {
            $item['url']      = (string)$outbound->group_url ?: 'https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204';
            $item['interval'] = (string)$outbound->group_interval . 's' ?: '300s';
            if ($type === 'urltest') {
                $item['tolerance'] = (int)(string)$outbound->group_tolerance ?: 50;
            }
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build TLS configuration from outbound fields.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array|null
     */
    private function buildTlsConfig($outbound): ?array
    {
        if (!(bool)(int)$outbound->tls_enabled) {
            return null;
        }

        $tls = [
            'enabled' => true,
        ];

        if ((string)$outbound->tls_server_name !== '') {
            $tls['server_name'] = (string)$outbound->tls_server_name;
        }
        if ((bool)(int)$outbound->tls_insecure) {
            $tls['insecure'] = true;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->tls_alpn !== '') {
            $tls['alpn'] = $this->parseCommaList((string)$outbound->tls_alpn);
        }

        return $tls;
    }

    /**
     * Build transport configuration from outbound fields.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array|null
     */
    private function buildTransportConfig($outbound): ?array
    {
        $transportType = (string)$outbound->transport_type;
        if ($transportType === '') {
            return null;
        }

        $transport = [
            'type' => $transportType,
        ];

        switch ($transportType) {
            case 'ws':
            case 'httpupgrade':
                if ((string)$outbound->transport_path !== '') {
                    $transport['path'] = (string)$outbound->transport_path;
                }
                if ((string)$outbound->transport_host !== '') {
                    $transport['host'] = (string)$outbound->transport_host;
                }
                break;

            case 'grpc':
                if ((string)$outbound->transport_path !== '') {
                    $transport['service_name'] = (string)$outbound->transport_path;
                }
                break;
        }

        return $transport;
    }

    /**
     * Build route configuration section.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildRouteConfig(): array
    {
        $route = [];

        // Collect rule sets
        $ruleSetTags = [];
        foreach ($this->rule_sets->rule_set->iterateItems() as $ruleSet) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$ruleSet->enabled) {
                continue;
            }
            $tag = (string)$ruleSet->tag;
            $ruleSetTags[] = $tag;
            if (!isset($route['rule_set'])) {
                $route['rule_set'] = [];
            }
            $rs = [
                'tag'      => $tag,
                'type'     => (string)$ruleSet->type,
                'format'   => (string)$ruleSet->format ?: 'source',
            ];
            if ((string)$ruleSet->type === 'remote') {
                if ((string)$ruleSet->url !== '') {
                    $rs['url'] = (string)$ruleSet->url;
                }
                if ((string)$ruleSet->update_interval !== '') {
                    $rs['update_interval'] = (string)$ruleSet->update_interval;
                }
            } else {
                if ((string)$ruleSet->path !== '') {
                    $rs['path'] = (string)$ruleSet->path;
                }
            }
            $route['rule_set'][] = $rs;
        }

        // Route rules
        $route['rules'] = [];
        $sortedRules = [];
        foreach ($this->rules->rule->iterateItems() as $rule) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$rule->enabled) {
                continue;
            }
            $sortedRules[] = $rule;
        }

        // Sort by priority ascending (lower number = higher priority)
        usort($sortedRules, function ($a, $b) {
            return (int)(string)$a->priority - (int)(string)$b->priority;
        });

        foreach ($sortedRules as $rule) {
            $r = [];

            $ruleType = (string)$rule->rule_type;
            $value    = (string)$rule->value;
            $action   = (string)$rule->action;

            // Rule condition
            if (in_array($ruleType, ['geoip', 'geosite'], true)) {
                $r[$ruleType] = $this->parseCommaList($value);
            } elseif ($ruleType === 'rule_set') {
                $r['rule_set'] = $this->parseCommaList($value);
            } elseif ($ruleType === 'port') {
                $r['port'] = array_map('intval', $this->parseCommaList($value));
            } elseif ($ruleType !== '') {
                $r[$ruleType] = $this->parseCommaList($value);
            }

            // Invert
            if ((bool)(int)$rule->invert) {
                $r['invert'] = true;
            }

            // Action
            if ($action === 'outbound') {
                $outboundTag = (string)$rule->action_outbound;
                $r['outbound'] = $outboundTag !== '' ? $outboundTag : 'direct';
            } elseif ($action === 'reject') {
                $r['outbound'] = 'block';
            } else {
                $r['outbound'] = $action;
            }

            if (!empty($r)) {
                $route['rules'][] = $r;
            }
        }

        // Auto route from TUN settings
        $route['auto_detect_interface'] = true;

        return $route;
    }

    /**
     * Ensure default 'direct' and 'block' outbounds exist.
     *
     * @param array &$outbounds
     * @return void
     */
    private function ensureDefaultOutbounds(array &$outbounds): void
    {
        $hasDirect = false;
        $hasBlock  = false;
        foreach ($outbounds as $o) {
            if ($o['type'] === 'direct') {
                $hasDirect = true;
            }
            if ($o['type'] === 'block') {
                $hasBlock = true;
            }
        }
        if (!$hasDirect) {
            $outbounds[] = ['type' => 'direct', 'tag' => 'direct'];
        }
        if (!$hasBlock) {
            $outbounds[] = ['type' => 'block', 'tag' => 'block'];
        }
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Utility helpers
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * Flatten a model item (ArrayField child) into a plain array.
     *
     * @param mixed $item
     * @return array
     */
    private function flattenItem($item): array
    {
        $result = [];
        foreach ($item->iterateItems() as $key => $value) {
            $result[$key] = (string)$value;
        }
        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * Parse a comma-separated string into an array of trimmed values.
     *
     * @param string $input
     * @return array
     */
    private function parseCommaList(string $input): array
    {
        if ($input === '') {
            return [];
        }
        return array_values(array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $input))));
    }

    /**
     * Parse a JSON users string into an array.
     *
     * @param string $json
     * @return array
     */
    private function parseUsersJson(string $json): array
    {
        if ($json === '') {
            return [];
        }
        $decoded = json_decode($json, true);
        return is_array($decoded) ? $decoded : [];
    }

    /**
     * Get the final outbound tag for routing.
     *
     * @param string $action The action type (direct, reject, outbound)
     * @param string $outboundTag The outbound tag when action is 'outbound'
     * @return string The tag to use in route rules
     */
    public function resolveOutboundTag(string $action, string $outboundTag = ''): string
    {
        switch ($action) {
            case 'direct':
                return 'direct';
            case 'reject':
                return 'block';
            case 'outbound':
                return $outboundTag !== '' ? $outboundTag : 'direct';
            default:
                return $action;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Check if the sing-box service is currently running.
     *
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isServiceRunning(): bool
    {
        $pidFile = '/var/run/sing-box.pid';
        if (!file_exists($pidFile)) {
            return false;
        }
        $pid = (int)trim(file_get_contents($pidFile));
        if ($pid <= 0) {
            return false;
        }
        return posix_kill($pid, 0);
    }

    /**
     * Get the path to the generated sing-box config.json.
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getConfigJsonPath(): string
    {
        return '/usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json';
    }

    /**
     * Get the path to the sing-box log file.
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getLogFilePath(): string
    {
        return (string)$this->general->logoutput ?: '/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log';
    }
}


~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Create your first backup using the "Backup Now" button.') }}

The latest 10 backups are kept automatically.') }}

~~~~ {Sing-box-for-OPNsense/src/opnsense/scripts/OPNsense/SingBox/setup.sh} ~~~~
#!/bin/sh
# setup.sh -- OPNsense plugin initialization hook
# Called by rc.configure_plugins after install

# Ensure runtime directories exist
mkdir -p /var/log/sing-box
mkdir -p /var/db/sing-box
mkdir -p /usr/local/etc/sing-box/rule-sets

# Set permissions
chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/sing-box 2>/dev/null || true
chmod 755 /usr/local/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
chmod 755 /usr/local/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/*.py 2>/dev/null || true

# Generate initial config if missing
if [ ! -f /usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json ]; then
    if [ -f /usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json.sample ]; then
        cp /usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json.sample /usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json
    fi
fi

exit 0


~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {Sing-box-for-OPNsense/src/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/backup.sh} ~~~~
#!/bin/sh
# sing-box OPNsense Plugin v3.0.0 - Backup Script
#
# Creates a timestamped backup of sing-box configuration and binary.
# Backup format: /root/sing-box-backup/sing-box-backup-YYYYMMDDhhmmss/
# Usage: backup.sh [--full]

CONFIG_JSON="/usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json"
SING_BOX_BIN="/usr/local/bin/sing-box"
OPNSENSE_CONFIG="/conf/config.xml"
RULE_SETS_DIR="/usr/local/etc/sing-box/rule-sets"

# Generate timestamp (consistent format: YYYYMMDDhhmmss, no dashes)
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)
BACKUP_DIR="/root/sing-box-backup/sing-box-backup-$TIMESTAMP"

FULL_BACKUP=0
for arg in "$@"; do
    case "$arg" in
        --full|-f) FULL_BACKUP=1 ;;
    esac
done

echo "=========================================="
echo "sing-box Backup"
echo "=========================================="
echo "Timestamp: $TIMESTAMP"
echo "Destination: $BACKUP_DIR"
echo ""

# Create backup directory
mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"

backed_count=0

# --- Backup config.json ---
if [ -f "$CONFIG_JSON" ]; then
    cp -f "$CONFIG_JSON" "$BACKUP_DIR/config.json"
    backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
    echo "[OK] config.json"
else
    echo "[--] config.json not found"
fi

# --- Backup sing-box binary ---
if [ -f "$SING_BOX_BIN" ]; then
    cp -f "$SING_BOX_BIN" "$BACKUP_DIR/sing-box"
    backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
    echo "[OK] sing-box binary"
    "$SING_BOX_BIN" version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true
else
    echo "[--] sing-box binary not found"
fi

# --- Backup SingBox section from config.xml ---
if [ -f "$OPNSENSE_CONFIG" ]; then
    if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        # Use python3 to extract SingBox XML section and track success
        py_ok=0
        python3 -c "
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
import sys
try:
    tree = ET.parse('$OPNSENSE_CONFIG')
    root = tree.getroot()
    sb = root.find('.//SingBox')
    if sb is not None:
        ET.ElementTree(sb).write('$BACKUP_DIR/config.xml.singbox', encoding='unicode')
        print('[OK] config.xml SingBox section')
        sys.exit(0)
    else:
        print('[--] No SingBox section in config.xml')
        sys.exit(1)
except Exception as e:
    print(f'[!!] Error extracting config.xml: {e}')
    sys.exit(2)
"
        py_exit=$?
        if [ "$py_exit" -eq 0 ]; then
            backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
        fi
    else
        # Fallback: copy full config.xml
        cp -f "$OPNSENSE_CONFIG" "$BACKUP_DIR/config.xml.full"
        echo "[OK] Full config.xml (python3 not available for extraction)"
        backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
    fi
else
    echo "[--] OPNsense config.xml not found"
fi

# --- Backup rule-sets ---
if [ -d "$RULE_SETS_DIR" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR/rule-sets"
    cp -f "$RULE_SETS_DIR/"*.json "$RULE_SETS_DIR/"*.srs "$BACKUP_DIR/rule-sets/" 2>/dev/null || true
    set_count=$(ls "$BACKUP_DIR/rule-sets/" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    if [ "$set_count" -gt 0 ]; then
        backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
        echo "[OK] rule-sets ($set_count files)"
    else
        echo "[--] No rule-set files found"
    fi
else
    echo "[--] rule-sets directory not found"
fi

# --- Full backup: include logs ---
if [ "$FULL_BACKUP" -eq 1 ]; then
    LOG_DIR="/var/log/sing-box"
    if [ -d "$LOG_DIR" ]; then
        mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR/logs"
        cp -f "$LOG_DIR/"* "$BACKUP_DIR/logs/" 2>/dev/null || true
        echo "[OK] Log files"
    fi
fi

echo ""
echo "=========================================="
if [ "$backed_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "Backup complete: $BACKUP_DIR"
    echo "Items backed up: $backed_count"
else
    echo "Warning: Nothing was backed up"
fi
echo "=========================================="

# --- Cleanup old backups (keep last 10) ---
if [ -d "/root/sing-box-backup" ]; then
    backup_count=$(ls -1 /root/sing-box-backup 2>/dev/null | grep '^sing-box-backup-' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    if [ "$backup_count" -gt 10 ]; then
        to_delete=$((backup_count - 10))
        echo "Cleaning up $to_delete old backup(s)..."
        ls -1t /root/sing-box-backup | grep '^sing-box-backup-' | tail -n "$to_delete" | while read -r d; do
            rm -rf "/root/sing-box-backup/$d"
        done
    fi
fi

exit 0


~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {Sing-box-for-OPNsense/src/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/generate-config.py} ~~~~
#!/usr/local/bin/python3
"""
sing-box OPNsense Plugin v3.0.0 - Configuration Generator

Reads OPNsense config.xml, parses the SingBox section, and generates
a valid sing-box config.json. Validates with 'sing-box check' before
committing. Rolls back on validation failure.

Usage: generate-config.py [--dry-run] [--output /path/to/config.json]
"""

import argparse
import copy
import json
import os
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
import tempfile
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Paths
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
OPNSENSE_CONFIG = "/conf/config.xml"
CONFIG_JSON_PATH = "/usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json"
BACKUP_DIR = "/root/sing-box-backup"
RULE_SETS_DIR = "/usr/local/etc/sing-box/rule-sets"
SING_BOX_BINARY = "/usr/local/bin/sing-box"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# XML helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def xml_text(element: Optional[ET.Element], default: str = "") -> str:
    """Return stripped text content of an XML element."""
    if element is not None and element.text:
        return element.text.strip()
    return default


def xml_bool(element: Optional[ET.Element], default: bool = False) -> bool:
    """Parse an XML element value as boolean."""
    if element is None:
        return default
    val = xml_text(element, "")
    if val.lower() in ("1", "true", "yes", "on"):
        return True
    if val.lower() in ("0", "false", "no", "off", ""):
        return False
    return default


def xml_int(element: Optional[ET.Element], default: int = 0) -> int:
    """Parse an XML element value as integer."""
    val = xml_text(element, "")
    try:
        return int(val)
    except (ValueError, TypeError):
        return default


def find_child(parent: ET.Element, tag: str) -> Optional[ET.Element]:
    """Find direct child element by tag."""
    return parent.find(tag)


def find_all_children(parent: ET.Element, tag: str) -> List[ET.Element]:
    """Find all direct child elements by tag."""
    return parent.findall(tag)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Section builders
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def build_log_section(singbox_el: ET.Element) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Build the sing-box log section from general settings."""
    general = find_child(singbox_el, "general")
    if general is None:
        return {"level": "info", "output": "/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log", "timestamp": True}

    level = xml_text(find_child(general, "loglevel"), "info")
    output = xml_text(find_child(general, "logoutput"), "/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log")
    timestamp = xml_bool(find_child(general, "logtimestamp"), True)

    log_section: Dict[str, Any] = {"level": level, "timestamp": timestamp}
    if output:
        log_section["output"] = output

    return log_section


def build_experimental_section(singbox_el: ET.Element) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Build the experimental section with clash_api."""
    general = find_child(singbox_el, "general")
    if general is None:
        return {"clash_api": {"external_controller": "127.0.0.1:9090", "store_selected": True}}

    api_enabled = xml_bool(find_child(general, "experimental_api_enabled"), True)
    if not api_enabled:
        return {}

    api_port = xml_int(find_child(general, "experimental_api_port"), 9090)
    api_secret = xml_text(find_child(general, "experimental_api_secret"), "")

    clash_api: Dict[str, Any] = {
        "external_controller": f"127.0.0.1:{api_port}",
        "store_selected": True,
    }
    if api_secret:
        clash_api["secret"] = api_secret

    return {"clash_api": clash_api}


def build_tls(outbound_el: ET.Element) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Build TLS object for an outbound if enabled."""
    tls_enabled = xml_bool(find_child(outbound_el, "tls_enabled"), True)
    if not tls_enabled:
        return None

    tls: Dict[str, Any] = {"enabled": True}

    server_name = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "tls_server_name"), "")
    if server_name:
        tls["server_name"] = server_name

    insecure = xml_bool(find_child(outbound_el, "tls_insecure"), False)
    if insecure:
        tls["insecure"] = True

    alpn = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "tls_alpn"), "")
    if alpn:
        tls["alpn"] = [a.strip() for a in alpn.split(",") if a.strip()]

    return tls


def build_transport(outbound_el: ET.Element) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Build transport object for an outbound if configured."""
    transport_type = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "transport_type"), "")
    if not transport_type:
        return None

    transport: Dict[str, Any] = {"type": transport_type}

    path = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "transport_path"), "")
    if path:
        transport["path"] = path

    host = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "transport_host"), "")
    if host:
        transport["headers"] = {"Host": host}
        if transport_type in ("ws", "httpupgrade"):
            transport["host"] = host

    return transport


def build_outbound(outbound_el: ET.Element) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Build a single outbound object from XML."""
    enabled = xml_bool(find_child(outbound_el, "enabled"), True)
    if not enabled:
        return None

    name = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "name"), "")
    otype = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "type"), "")
    if not name or not otype:
        return None

    out: Dict[str, Any] = {"tag": name, "type": otype}

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Proxy outbounds with server / port
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    if otype in ("vless", "vmess", "trojan", "shadowsocks", "hysteria2"):
        server = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "server"), "")
        server_port = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "server_port"), 0)
        if server:
            out["server"] = server
        if server_port:
            out["server_port"] = server_port

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Type-specific fields
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    if otype == "vless":
        uuid_val = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "uuid"), "")
        if uuid_val:
            out["uuid"] = uuid_val
        flow = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "flow"), "")
        if flow:
            out["flow"] = flow
        packet_encoding = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "packet_encoding"), "xudp")
        if packet_encoding:
            out["packet_encoding"] = packet_encoding

    elif otype == "vmess":
        uuid_val = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "uuid"), "")
        if uuid_val:
            out["uuid"] = uuid_val
        alter_id = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "alterId"), 0)
        if alter_id:
            out["alter_id"] = alter_id
        security = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "security"), "auto")
        if security:
            out["security"] = security

    elif otype == "trojan":
        password = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "password"), "")
        if password:
            out["password"] = password

    elif otype == "shadowsocks":
        method = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "method"), "")
        password = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "password"), "")
        if method:
            out["method"] = method
        if password:
            out["password"] = password

    elif otype == "hysteria2":
        password = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "password"), "")
        if password:
            out["password"] = password
        obfs = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "obfs"), "")
        obfs_password = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "obfs_password"), "")
        if obfs:
            out["obfs"] = {"type": obfs}
            if obfs_password:
                out["obfs"]["password"] = obfs_password
        up_mbps = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "up_mbps"), 0)
        down_mbps = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "down_mbps"), 0)
        if up_mbps:
            out["up_mbps"] = up_mbps
        if down_mbps:
            out["down_mbps"] = down_mbps

    elif otype == "wireguard":
        local_address = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "local_address"), "")
        if local_address:
            out["local_address"] = [a.strip() for a in local_address.split(",") if a.strip()]
        private_key = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "private_key"), "")
        if private_key:
            out["private_key"] = private_key

        # WireGuard server/port at top level (required by sing-box)
        server = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "server"), "")
        server_port = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "server_port"), 0)
        if server:
            out["server"] = server
        if server_port:
            out["server_port"] = server_port

        peer: Dict[str, Any] = {}
        peer_public_key = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_public_key"), "")
        peer_preshared_key = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_preshared_key"), "")
        peer_endpoint = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_endpoint"), "")
        peer_allowed_ips = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_allowed_ips"), "")
        peer_persistent_keepalive = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_persistent_keepalive"), 0)

        if peer_public_key:
            peer["public_key"] = peer_public_key
        if peer_preshared_key:
            peer["pre_shared_key"] = peer_preshared_key
        if peer_endpoint:
            peer["address"] = peer_endpoint
        if peer_allowed_ips:
            peer["allowed_ips"] = [a.strip() for a in peer_allowed_ips.split(",") if a.strip()]
        if peer_persistent_keepalive:
            peer["persistent_keepalive_interval"] = peer_persistent_keepalive

        if peer:
            out["peers"] = [peer]
