                                    {{ lang._('Description') }}
                                    {{ lang._('Schedule') }}
                                    {{ lang._('Command') }}
                                    {{ lang._('Actions') }}
                                

                            
                            
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('Update rule sets') }}
                                    0 4 * * * ({{ lang._('Daily at 4 AM') }})
                                    update-rule-sets.py
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                

                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('Backup configuration') }}
                                    0 2 * * 0 ({{ lang._('Weekly on Sunday') }})
                                    backup.sh
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                

                            
                        

                    

                

            

        


        {# Import / Export Section #}
        

            

                

                    

                        
 {{ lang._('Import Configuration') }}

                    

                    

                        

                            

                                
                                
                            

                            

                                
                                
                            

                            
                        

                        

                    

                

            

            

                

                    

                        
 {{ lang._('Export Configuration') }}

                    

                    

                        

                            
                            

                                
{{ lang._('Click "Load Config" to preview.') }}

                            

                        

                        
                        
                    

                

            

        

    




{# ================================================================ #}
{#  Backups List Modal                                               #}
{# ================================================================ #}


    

        

            

                
                

                     {{ lang._('Available Backups') }}
                

            

            

                

                    
                    
{{ lang._('Loading backups...') }}

                

                

                    

                         {{ lang._('No backups found. Create your first backup using the "Backup Now" button.') }}
                    

                

                

                     
                

                

                    

                        
                            

                                {{ lang._('Date') }}
                                {{ lang._('Timestamp') }}
                                {{ lang._('Size') }}
                                {{ lang._('Contents') }}
                                {{ lang._('Actions') }}
                            

                        
                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                            
                            {{ lang._('Backups are stored in /root/sing-box-backup/. The latest 10 backups are kept automatically.') }}
                        
                    

                

            

            

                
                
            

        

    








~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/opnsense/mvc/app/views/OPNsense/SingBox/tun.volt} ~~~~
{# tun.volt - sing-box TUN Interface Configuration #}



    

        {# Page Header #}
        

            

                
{{ lang._('TUN Interface') }}

                
{{ lang._('Configure the TUN (virtual network) interface for transparent proxy.') }}

            

        


        {# TUN Settings Form #}
        

            

                

                    

                        
{{ lang._('TUN Settings') }}

                    

                    

                        

                            {# Enable Toggle #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('Enable the TUN interface for transparent proxying.') }}
                                

                            


                            


                            {# Interface Name #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('Name of the TUN interface device.') }}
                                

                            


                            {# MTU #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('Maximum Transmission Unit for the TUN interface.') }}
                                

                            


                            {# Stack #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    
                                        system: {{ lang._('Use system TCP/IP stack (best performance)') }}

                                        gvisor: {{ lang._('Use gVisor netstack (better compatibility)') }}

                                        mixed: {{ lang._('TCP via system, UDP via gVisor') }}
                                    
                                

                            


                            


                            {# Auto Route #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('Add routes automatically so traffic goes through TUN.') }}
                                

                            


                            {# Strict Route #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('Force DNS and routing through sing-box to prevent leaks.') }}
                                

                            


                            {# GSO #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('Improves performance on supported systems.') }}
                                

                            


                            {# Endpoint Independent NAT #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('Helps with some UDP applications (gaming, VoIP).') }}
                                

                            


                            


                            {# IPv4 Address #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('IPv4 address and prefix for the TUN interface.') }}
                                

                            


                            {# IPv6 Address #}
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                    {{ lang._('IPv6 address and prefix for the TUN interface.') }}
                                

                            


                            


                            {# Save Button #}
                            

                                

                                    
                                

                            

                        

                    

                

            

        


        {# Firewall Integration Notes #}
        

            

                

                    

                        
 {{ lang._('Firewall Integration Notes') }}

                    

                    

                        
    
                            
  • {{ lang._('The TUN interface will be created as a virtual network interface on the system.') }}
    • 
                            
  • {{ lang._('Firewall rules may need to be adjusted to allow traffic through the TUN interface.') }}
    • 
                            
  • {{ lang._('When Auto Route is enabled, sing-box manages the routing table automatically.') }}
    • 
                            
  • {{ lang._('DNS queries are handled by sing-box when Strict Route is enabled.') }}
    • 
                            
  • {{ lang._('IPv4 NAT may be required:') }} iptables -t nat -A POSTROUTING -o {{ lang._('wan') }} -j MASQUERADE ({{ lang._('or equivalent in OPNsense firewall rules') }})
    • 
                        

                    

                

            

        


        {# Transparent Proxy Notes #}
        

            

                

                    

                        
{{ lang._('Transparent Proxy Status') }}

                    

                    

                        

                            

                                {{ lang._('Interface') }}
                                --
                            

                            

                                {{ lang._('IPv4') }}
                                --
                            

                            

                                {{ lang._('IPv6') }}
                                --
                            

                            

                                {{ lang._('Running') }}
                                {{ lang._('Unknown') }}
                            

                        

                        
                    

                

            

        

    








~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/backup.sh} ~~~~
#!/bin/sh
# sing-box OPNsense Plugin v3.0.0 - Backup Script
#
# Creates a timestamped backup of sing-box configuration and binary.
# Backup format: /root/sing-box-backup/sing-box-backup-YYYYMMDDhhmmss/
# Usage: backup.sh [--full]

CONFIG_JSON="/usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json"
SING_BOX_BIN="/usr/local/bin/sing-box"
OPNSENSE_CONFIG="/conf/config.xml"
RULE_SETS_DIR="/usr/local/etc/sing-box/rule-sets"

# Generate timestamp (consistent format: YYYYMMDDhhmmss, no dashes)
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)
BACKUP_DIR="/root/sing-box-backup/sing-box-backup-$TIMESTAMP"

FULL_BACKUP=0
for arg in "$@"; do
    case "$arg" in
        --full|-f) FULL_BACKUP=1 ;;
    esac
done

echo "=========================================="
echo "sing-box Backup"
echo "=========================================="
echo "Timestamp: $TIMESTAMP"
echo "Destination: $BACKUP_DIR"
echo ""

# Create backup directory
mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"

backed_count=0

# --- Backup config.json ---
if [ -f "$CONFIG_JSON" ]; then
    cp -f "$CONFIG_JSON" "$BACKUP_DIR/config.json"
    backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
    echo "[OK] config.json"
else
    echo "[--] config.json not found"
fi

# --- Backup sing-box binary ---
if [ -f "$SING_BOX_BIN" ]; then
    cp -f "$SING_BOX_BIN" "$BACKUP_DIR/sing-box"
    backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
    echo "[OK] sing-box binary"
    "$SING_BOX_BIN" version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true
else
    echo "[--] sing-box binary not found"
fi

# --- Backup SingBox section from config.xml ---
if [ -f "$OPNSENSE_CONFIG" ]; then
    if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        # Use python3 to extract SingBox XML section and track success
        py_ok=0
        python3 -c "
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
import sys
try:
    tree = ET.parse('$OPNSENSE_CONFIG')
    root = tree.getroot()
    sb = root.find('.//SingBox')
    if sb is not None:
        ET.ElementTree(sb).write('$BACKUP_DIR/config.xml.singbox', encoding='unicode')
        print('[OK] config.xml SingBox section')
        sys.exit(0)
    else:
        print('[--] No SingBox section in config.xml')
        sys.exit(1)
except Exception as e:
    print(f'[!!] Error extracting config.xml: {e}')
    sys.exit(2)
"
        py_exit=$?
        if [ "$py_exit" -eq 0 ]; then
            backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
        fi
    else
        # Fallback: copy full config.xml
        cp -f "$OPNSENSE_CONFIG" "$BACKUP_DIR/config.xml.full"
        echo "[OK] Full config.xml (python3 not available for extraction)"
        backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
    fi
else
    echo "[--] OPNsense config.xml not found"
fi

# --- Backup rule-sets ---
if [ -d "$RULE_SETS_DIR" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR/rule-sets"
    cp -f "$RULE_SETS_DIR/"*.json "$RULE_SETS_DIR/"*.srs "$BACKUP_DIR/rule-sets/" 2>/dev/null || true
    set_count=$(ls "$BACKUP_DIR/rule-sets/" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    if [ "$set_count" -gt 0 ]; then
        backed_count=$((backed_count + 1))
        echo "[OK] rule-sets ($set_count files)"
    else
        echo "[--] No rule-set files found"
    fi
else
    echo "[--] rule-sets directory not found"
fi

# --- Full backup: include logs ---
if [ "$FULL_BACKUP" -eq 1 ]; then
    LOG_DIR="/var/log/sing-box"
    if [ -d "$LOG_DIR" ]; then
        mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR/logs"
        cp -f "$LOG_DIR/"* "$BACKUP_DIR/logs/" 2>/dev/null || true
        echo "[OK] Log files"
    fi
fi

echo ""
echo "=========================================="
if [ "$backed_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "Backup complete: $BACKUP_DIR"
    echo "Items backed up: $backed_count"
else
    echo "Warning: Nothing was backed up"
fi
echo "=========================================="

# --- Cleanup old backups (keep last 10) ---
if [ -d "/root/sing-box-backup" ]; then
    backup_count=$(ls -1 /root/sing-box-backup 2>/dev/null | grep '^sing-box-backup-' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    if [ "$backup_count" -gt 10 ]; then
        to_delete=$((backup_count - 10))
        echo "Cleaning up $to_delete old backup(s)..."
        ls -1t /root/sing-box-backup | grep '^sing-box-backup-' | tail -n "$to_delete" | while read -r d; do
            rm -rf "/root/sing-box-backup/$d"
        done
    fi
fi

exit 0

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/generate-config.py} ~~~~
#!/usr/local/bin/python3
"""
sing-box OPNsense Plugin v3.0.0 - Configuration Generator

Reads OPNsense config.xml, parses the SingBox section, and generates
a valid sing-box config.json. Validates with 'sing-box check' before
committing. Rolls back on validation failure.

Usage: generate-config.py [--dry-run] [--output /path/to/config.json]
"""

import argparse
import copy
import json
import os
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
import tempfile
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Paths
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
OPNSENSE_CONFIG = "/conf/config.xml"
CONFIG_JSON_PATH = "/usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json"
BACKUP_DIR = "/root/sing-box-backup"
RULE_SETS_DIR = "/usr/local/etc/sing-box/rule-sets"
SING_BOX_BINARY = "/usr/local/bin/sing-box"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# XML helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def xml_text(element: Optional[ET.Element], default: str = "") -> str:
    """Return stripped text content of an XML element."""
    if element is not None and element.text:
        return element.text.strip()
    return default


def xml_bool(element: Optional[ET.Element], default: bool = False) -> bool:
    """Parse an XML element value as boolean."""
    if element is None:
        return default
    val = xml_text(element, "")
    if val.lower() in ("1", "true", "yes", "on"):
        return True
    if val.lower() in ("0", "false", "no", "off", ""):
        return False
    return default


def xml_int(element: Optional[ET.Element], default: int = 0) -> int:
    """Parse an XML element value as integer."""
    val = xml_text(element, "")
    try:
        return int(val)
    except (ValueError, TypeError):
        return default


def find_child(parent: ET.Element, tag: str) -> Optional[ET.Element]:
    """Find direct child element by tag."""
    return parent.find(tag)


def find_all_children(parent: ET.Element, tag: str) -> List[ET.Element]:
    """Find all direct child elements by tag."""
    return parent.findall(tag)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Section builders
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def build_log_section(singbox_el: ET.Element) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Build the sing-box log section from general settings."""
    general = find_child(singbox_el, "general")
    if general is None:
        return {"level": "info", "output": "/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log", "timestamp": True}

    level = xml_text(find_child(general, "loglevel"), "info")
    output = xml_text(find_child(general, "logoutput"), "/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log")
    timestamp = xml_bool(find_child(general, "logtimestamp"), True)

    log_section: Dict[str, Any] = {"level": level, "timestamp": timestamp}
    if output:
        log_section["output"] = output

    return log_section


def build_experimental_section(singbox_el: ET.Element) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Build the experimental section with clash_api."""
    general = find_child(singbox_el, "general")
    if general is None:
        return {"clash_api": {"external_controller": "127.0.0.1:9090", "store_selected": True}}

    api_enabled = xml_bool(find_child(general, "experimental_api_enabled"), True)
    if not api_enabled:
        return {}

    api_port = xml_int(find_child(general, "experimental_api_port"), 9090)
    api_secret = xml_text(find_child(general, "experimental_api_secret"), "")

    clash_api: Dict[str, Any] = {
        "external_controller": f"127.0.0.1:{api_port}",
        "store_selected": True,
    }
    if api_secret:
        clash_api["secret"] = api_secret

    return {"clash_api": clash_api}


def build_tls(outbound_el: ET.Element) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Build TLS object for an outbound if enabled."""
    tls_enabled = xml_bool(find_child(outbound_el, "tls_enabled"), True)
    if not tls_enabled:
        return None

    tls: Dict[str, Any] = {"enabled": True}

    server_name = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "tls_server_name"), "")
    if server_name:
        tls["server_name"] = server_name

    insecure = xml_bool(find_child(outbound_el, "tls_insecure"), False)
    if insecure:
        tls["insecure"] = True

    alpn = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "tls_alpn"), "")
    if alpn:
        tls["alpn"] = [a.strip() for a in alpn.split(",") if a.strip()]

    return tls


def build_transport(outbound_el: ET.Element) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Build transport object for an outbound if configured."""
    transport_type = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "transport_type"), "")
    if not transport_type:
        return None

    transport: Dict[str, Any] = {"type": transport_type}

    path = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "transport_path"), "")
    if path:
        transport["path"] = path

    host = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "transport_host"), "")
    if host:
        transport["headers"] = {"Host": host}
        if transport_type in ("ws", "httpupgrade"):
            transport["host"] = host

    return transport


def build_outbound(outbound_el: ET.Element) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Build a single outbound object from XML."""
    enabled = xml_bool(find_child(outbound_el, "enabled"), True)
    if not enabled:
        return None

    name = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "name"), "")
    otype = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "type"), "")
    if not name or not otype:
        return None

    out: Dict[str, Any] = {"tag": name, "type": otype}

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Proxy outbounds with server / port
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    if otype in ("vless", "vmess", "trojan", "shadowsocks", "hysteria2"):
        server = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "server"), "")
        server_port = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "server_port"), 0)
        if server:
            out["server"] = server
        if server_port:
            out["server_port"] = server_port

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Type-specific fields
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    if otype == "vless":
        uuid_val = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "uuid"), "")
        if uuid_val:
            out["uuid"] = uuid_val
        flow = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "flow"), "")
        if flow:
            out["flow"] = flow
        packet_encoding = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "packet_encoding"), "xudp")
        if packet_encoding:
            out["packet_encoding"] = packet_encoding

    elif otype == "vmess":
        uuid_val = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "uuid"), "")
        if uuid_val:
            out["uuid"] = uuid_val
        alter_id = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "alterId"), 0)
        if alter_id:
            out["alter_id"] = alter_id
        security = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "security"), "auto")
        if security:
            out["security"] = security

    elif otype == "trojan":
        password = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "password"), "")
        if password:
            out["password"] = password

    elif otype == "shadowsocks":
        method = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "method"), "")
        password = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "password"), "")
        if method:
            out["method"] = method
        if password:
            out["password"] = password

    elif otype == "hysteria2":
        password = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "password"), "")
        if password:
            out["password"] = password
        obfs = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "obfs"), "")
        obfs_password = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "obfs_password"), "")
        if obfs:
            out["obfs"] = {"type": obfs}
            if obfs_password:
                out["obfs"]["password"] = obfs_password
        up_mbps = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "up_mbps"), 0)
        down_mbps = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "down_mbps"), 0)
        if up_mbps:
            out["up_mbps"] = up_mbps
        if down_mbps:
            out["down_mbps"] = down_mbps

    elif otype == "wireguard":
        local_address = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "local_address"), "")
        if local_address:
            out["local_address"] = [a.strip() for a in local_address.split(",") if a.strip()]
        private_key = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "private_key"), "")
        if private_key:
            out["private_key"] = private_key

        # WireGuard server/port at top level (required by sing-box)
        server = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "server"), "")
        server_port = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "server_port"), 0)
        if server:
            out["server"] = server
        if server_port:
            out["server_port"] = server_port

        peer: Dict[str, Any] = {}
        peer_public_key = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_public_key"), "")
        peer_preshared_key = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_preshared_key"), "")
        peer_endpoint = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_endpoint"), "")
        peer_allowed_ips = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_allowed_ips"), "")
        peer_persistent_keepalive = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "peer_persistent_keepalive"), 0)

        if peer_public_key:
            peer["public_key"] = peer_public_key
        if peer_preshared_key:
            peer["pre_shared_key"] = peer_preshared_key
        if peer_endpoint:
            peer["address"] = peer_endpoint
        if peer_allowed_ips:
            peer["allowed_ips"] = [a.strip() for a in peer_allowed_ips.split(",") if a.strip()]
        if peer_persistent_keepalive:
            peer["persistent_keepalive_interval"] = peer_persistent_keepalive

        if peer:
            out["peers"] = [peer]

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Group outbounds
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    elif otype in ("selector", "urltest", "load-balance"):
        group_outbounds = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "group_outbounds"), "")
        if group_outbounds:
            out["outbounds"] = [o.strip() for o in group_outbounds.split(",") if o.strip()]
        else:
            out["outbounds"] = []

        if otype == "selector":
            pass  # selector just needs outbounds

        elif otype == "urltest":
            url = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "group_url"),
                           "https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204")
            interval = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "group_interval"), 300)
            tolerance = xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "group_tolerance"), 50)
            out["url"] = url
            out["interval"] = interval
            out["tolerance"] = tolerance

        elif otype == "load-balance":
            out["check"] = {
                "interval": xml_int(find_child(outbound_el, "group_interval"), 300)
            }
            url = xml_text(find_child(outbound_el, "group_url"),
                           "https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204")
            out["check"]["url"] = url

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # TLS (for proxy types)
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    if otype in ("vless", "vmess", "trojan", "hysteria2"):
        tls = build_tls(outbound_el)
        if tls:
            out["tls"] = tls

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Transport (for proxy types)
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    if otype in ("vless", "vmess", "trojan", "shadowsocks"):
        transport = build_transport(outbound_el)
        if transport:
            out["transport"] = transport

    return out


def build_outbounds_section(singbox_el: ET.Element) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Build the complete outbounds list including direct/block as fallbacks."""
    outbounds: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []

    # Always include direct and block as first entries
    outbounds.append({"type": "direct", "tag": "direct"})
    outbounds.append({"type": "block", "tag": "block"})

    outbounds_el = find_child(singbox_el, "outbounds")
    if outbounds_el is not None:
        for ob_el in find_all_children(outbounds_el, "outbound"):
            ob = build_outbound(ob_el)
            if ob is not None:
                outbounds.append(ob)

    return outbounds


def build_inbound(inbound_el: ET.Element) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Build a single inbound object from XML."""
    enabled = xml_bool(find_child(inbound_el, "enabled"), True)
    if not enabled:
        return None

    name = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "name"), "")
    itype = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "type"), "")
    listen = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "listen"), "0.0.0.0")
    listen_port = xml_int(find_child(inbound_el, "listen_port"), 0)

    if not name or not itype or listen_port < 0:
        return None

    inbound: Dict[str, Any] = {
        "type": itype,
        "tag": name,
        "listen": listen,
        "listen_port": listen_port,
    }

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Type-specific fields
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    if itype == "tun":
        interface_name = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "tun_interface_name"), "")
        mtu = xml_int(find_child(inbound_el, "tun_mtu"), 9000)
        gso = xml_bool(find_child(inbound_el, "tun_gso"), False)
        auto_route = xml_bool(find_child(inbound_el, "tun_auto_route"), True)
        strict_route = xml_bool(find_child(inbound_el, "tun_strict_route"), True)
        einat = xml_bool(find_child(inbound_el, "tun_endpoint_independent_nat"), False)
        stack = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "tun_stack"), "system")

        if interface_name:
            inbound["interface_name"] = interface_name
        inbound["mtu"] = mtu
        if gso:
            inbound["gso"] = True
        inbound["auto_route"] = auto_route
        inbound["strict_route"] = strict_route
        inbound["endpoint_independent_nat"] = einat
        inbound["stack"] = stack
        inbound["inet4_address"] = "172.19.0.1/30"
        inbound["inet6_address"] = "fdfe:dcba:9876::1/126"

    elif itype in ("mixed", "socks", "http"):
        auth_username = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "auth_username"), "")
        auth_password = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "auth_password"), "")
        if auth_username:
            inbound["users"] = [{"username": auth_username, "password": auth_password}]
        set_system_proxy = xml_bool(find_child(inbound_el, "set_system_proxy"), False)
        if set_system_proxy:
            inbound["set_system_proxy"] = True

    elif itype == "shadowsocks":
        ss_method = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "ss_method"), "")
        ss_password = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "ss_password"), "")
        if ss_method:
            inbound["method"] = ss_method
        if ss_password:
            inbound["password"] = ss_password

    elif itype in ("vmess", "vless", "trojan"):
        users_str = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "users"), "")
        if users_str:
            # Expect JSON array or comma-separated UUIDs
            try:
                parsed = json.loads(users_str)
                inbound["users"] = parsed
            except json.JSONDecodeError:
                # Treat as comma-separated UUIDs
                uuids = [u.strip() for u in users_str.split(",") if u.strip()]
                inbound["users"] = [{"uuid": u} for u in uuids]

    elif itype == "hysteria2":
        h2_obfs = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "h2_obfs"), "")
        h2_obfs_password = xml_text(find_child(inbound_el, "h2_obfs_password"), "")
        if h2_obfs:
            inbound["obfs"] = {"type": h2_obfs}
            if h2_obfs_password:
                inbound["obfs"]["password"] = h2_obfs_password

    return inbound


def build_inbounds_section(singbox_el: ET.Element) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Build the complete inbounds list."""
    inbounds: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []

    inbounds_el = find_child(singbox_el, "inbounds")
    if inbounds_el is not None:
        for ib_el in find_all_children(inbounds_el, "inbound"):
            ib = build_inbound(ib_el)
            if ib is not None:
                inbounds.append(ib)

    return inbounds


def build_route_section(singbox_el: ET.Element) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Build the route section including rules and rule-sets."""
    route: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    rules: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Rule-sets
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    rule_sets_out: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
    rule_sets_el = find_child(singbox_el, "rule_sets")
    if rule_sets_el is not None:
        for rs_el in find_all_children(rule_sets_el, "rule_set"):
            rs_enabled = xml_bool(find_child(rs_el, "enabled"), True)
            if not rs_enabled:
                continue

            rs_tag = xml_text(find_child(rs_el, "tag"), "")
            rs_type = xml_text(find_child(rs_el, "type"), "remote")
            rs_format = xml_text(find_child(rs_el, "format"), "source")
            rs_url = xml_text(find_child(rs_el, "url"), "")
            rs_path = xml_text(find_child(rs_el, "path"), "")
            rs_update = xml_text(find_child(rs_el, "update_interval"), "1d")

            if not rs_tag:
                continue

            rs_obj: Dict[str, Any] = {
                "tag": rs_tag,
                "type": rs_type,
                "format": rs_format,
            }
            if rs_type == "remote" and rs_url:
                rs_obj["url"] = rs_url
                rs_obj["download_detour"] = "direct"
                if rs_update:
                    rs_obj["update_interval"] = rs_update
            elif rs_type == "local" and rs_path:
                rs_obj["path"] = rs_path

            rule_sets_out.append(rs_obj)

    if rule_sets_out:
        route["rule_set"] = rule_sets_out

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Route rules
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    rules_el = find_child(singbox_el, "rules")
    if rules_el is not None:
        for rule_el in find_all_children(rules_el, "rule"):
            enabled = xml_bool(find_child(rule_el, "enabled"), True)
            if not enabled:
                continue

            rule_type = xml_text(find_child(rule_el, "rule_type"), "")
            value = xml_text(find_child(rule_el, "value"), "")
            action = xml_text(find_child(rule_el, "action"), "")
            action_outbound = xml_text(find_child(rule_el, "action_outbound"), "")
            invert = xml_bool(find_child(rule_el, "invert"), False)

            if not rule_type or not value:
                continue

            sb_rule: Dict[str, Any] = {}

            # Map plugin rule_type to sing-box rule field
            if rule_type == "domain":
                sb_rule["domain"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "domain_suffix":
                sb_rule["domain_suffix"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "domain_keyword":
                sb_rule["domain_keyword"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "ip_cidr":
                sb_rule["ip_cidr"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "port":
                ports = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
                sb_rule["port"] = [int(p) for p in ports]
            elif rule_type == "protocol":
                sb_rule["protocol"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "process_name":
                sb_rule["process_name"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "rule_set":
                sb_rule["rule_set"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "geoip":
                sb_rule["geoip"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "geosite":
                sb_rule["geosite"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]

            if invert:
                sb_rule["invert"] = True

            # Determine outbound / action
            if action == "direct":
                sb_rule["outbound"] = "direct"
            elif action == "reject":
                sb_rule["action"] = "reject"
            elif action == "outbound" and action_outbound:
                sb_rule["outbound"] = action_outbound
            else:
                sb_rule["outbound"] = "direct"

            rules.append(sb_rule)

    # Auto-add default route: if no match, go direct
    if rules:
        rules.append({"outbound": "direct"})
        route["rules"] = rules
    else:
        route["rules"] = [{"outbound": "direct"}]

    # Auto_detect_interface for FreeBSD/OPNsense
    route["auto_detect_interface"] = True

    return route


def build_dns_section(singbox_el: ET.Element) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Build the DNS section including servers, rules, and fakeip."""
    dns: Dict[str, Any] = {}

    dns_el = find_child(singbox_el, "dns")
    if dns_el is None:
        # Minimal defaults
        return {
            "servers": [{"tag": "default", "address": "8.8.8.8", "detour": "direct"}],
            "rules": [],
        }

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # DNS Servers
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    servers: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
    servers_el = find_child(dns_el, "servers")
    if servers_el is not None:
        for srv_el in find_all_children(servers_el, "server"):
            enabled = xml_bool(find_child(srv_el, "enabled"), True)
            if not enabled:
                continue

            tag = xml_text(find_child(srv_el, "tag"), "")
            address = xml_text(find_child(srv_el, "address"), "")
            if not address:
                continue

            srv: Dict[str, Any] = {"address": address}
            if tag:
                srv["tag"] = tag

            address_resolver = xml_text(find_child(srv_el, "address_resolver"), "")
            if address_resolver:
                srv["address_resolver"] = address_resolver

            address_strategy = xml_text(find_child(srv_el, "address_strategy"), "")
            if address_strategy:
                srv["address_strategy"] = address_strategy

            strategy = xml_text(find_child(srv_el, "strategy"), "")
            if strategy:
                srv["strategy"] = strategy

            detour = xml_text(find_child(srv_el, "detour"), "")
            if detour:
                srv["detour"] = detour

            servers.append(srv)

    if not servers:
        servers = [{"tag": "default", "address": "8.8.8.8", "detour": "direct"}]

    dns["servers"] = servers

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # DNS Rules
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    dns_rules: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
    dns_rules_el = find_child(dns_el, "rules")
    if dns_rules_el is not None:
        for dr_el in find_all_children(dns_rules_el, "dns_rule"):
            enabled = xml_bool(find_child(dr_el, "enabled"), True)
            if not enabled:
                continue

            rule_type = xml_text(find_child(dr_el, "rule_type"), "")
            value = xml_text(find_child(dr_el, "value"), "")
            server = xml_text(find_child(dr_el, "server"), "")

            if not rule_type or not value:
                continue

            dr: Dict[str, Any] = {}
            if rule_type == "domain":
                dr["domain"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "domain_suffix":
                dr["domain_suffix"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "domain_keyword":
                dr["domain_keyword"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]
            elif rule_type == "geosite":
                dr["geosite"] = [v.strip() for v in value.split(",") if v.strip()]

            if server:
                dr["server"] = server

            dns_rules.append(dr)

    if dns_rules:
        dns["rules"] = dns_rules

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # FakeIP
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    fakeip_enabled = xml_bool(find_child(dns_el, "fakeip_enabled"), False)
    if fakeip_enabled:
        fakeip_inet4 = xml_text(find_child(dns_el, "fakeip_inet4_range"), "198.18.0.0/15")
        fakeip_inet6 = xml_text(find_child(dns_el, "fakeip_inet6_range"), "fc00::/18")
        dns["fakeip"] = {
            "enabled": True,
            "inet4_range": fakeip_inet4,
            "inet6_range": fakeip_inet6,
        }

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Hosts
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    hosts_str = xml_text(find_child(dns_el, "hosts"), "")
    if hosts_str:
        try:
            dns["hosts"] = json.loads(hosts_str)
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            pass

    return dns


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Main
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def parse_opnsense_config(path: str) -> ET.Element:
    """Parse OPNsense config.xml and return the root element."""
    if not os.path.isfile(path):
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"OPNsense config not found: {path}")
    tree = ET.parse(path)
    return tree.getroot()


def find_singbox_element(root: ET.Element) -> Optional[ET.Element]:
    """Find the //OPNsense/SingBox XML element."""
    opnsense = root.find("OPNsense")
    if opnsense is None:
        return None
    return opnsense.find("SingBox")


def generate_config(singbox_el: ET.Element) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Generate complete sing-box config from XML."""
    config: Dict[str, Any] = {}

    # Log
    config["log"] = build_log_section(singbox_el)

    # Experimental (clash_api)
    experimental = build_experimental_section(singbox_el)
    if experimental:
        config["experimental"] = experimental

    # DNS
    config["dns"] = build_dns_section(singbox_el)

    # Inbounds
    inbounds = build_inbounds_section(singbox_el)
    if inbounds:
        config["inbounds"] = inbounds

    # Outbounds
    config["outbounds"] = build_outbounds_section(singbox_el)

    # Route
    config["route"] = build_route_section(singbox_el)

    return config


def validate_config(config_path: str) -> bool:
    """Run sing-box check -c against the config file."""
    if not os.path.isfile(SING_BOX_BINARY):
        print("Warning: sing-box binary not found, skipping validation", file=sys.stderr)
        return True

    try:
        result = subprocess.run(
            [SING_BOX_BINARY, "check", "-c", config_path],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=30,
        )
        if result.returncode != 0:
            if result.stderr:
                print(result.stderr, file=sys.stderr)
            if result.stdout:
                print(result.stdout, file=sys.stderr)
            return False
        return True
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        print("Validation timed out after 30 seconds", file=sys.stderr)
        return False
    except FileNotFoundError:
        print("Warning: sing-box binary not found, skipping validation", file=sys.stderr)
        return True


def backup_existing_config(config_path: str) -> Optional[str]:
    """Create a backup of the existing config.json if it exists."""
    if not os.path.isfile(config_path):
        return None

    ts = subprocess.check_output(["date", "+%Y%m%d%H%M%S"]).decode().strip()
    backup_subdir = os.path.join(BACKUP_DIR, f"config-{ts}")
    os.makedirs(backup_subdir, exist_ok=True)
    backup_path = os.path.join(backup_subdir, "config.json")
    shutil.copy2(config_path, backup_path)
    return backup_path


def restore_config(backup_path: str, config_path: str) -> None:
    """Restore config.json from backup."""
    shutil.copy2(backup_path, config_path)


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Generate sing-box config.json from OPNsense config.xml"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true",
                        help="Print config to stdout instead of writing")
    parser.add_argument("--output", default=CONFIG_JSON_PATH,
                        help=f"Output path (default: {CONFIG_JSON_PATH})")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Read OPNsense config
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    try:
        root = parse_opnsense_config(OPNSENSE_CONFIG)
    except FileNotFoundError as exc:
        print(f"Error: {exc}", file=sys.stderr)
        return 1
    except ET.ParseError as exc:
        print(f"Error parsing config.xml: {exc}", file=sys.stderr)
        return 1

    singbox_el = find_singbox_element(root)
    if singbox_el is None:
        print("Error: No //OPNsense/SingBox section found in config.xml", file=sys.stderr)
        return 1

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Check if plugin is enabled
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    general_el = find_child(singbox_el, "general")
    if general_el is not None:
        enabled = xml_bool(find_child(general_el, "enabled"), False)
        if not enabled:
            print("sing-box plugin is disabled in OPNsense settings")
            # Write a minimal config that does nothing
            minimal_config = {
                "log": {"level": "warn"},
                "outbounds": [{"type": "direct", "tag": "direct"}],
            }
            if args.dry_run:
                print(json.dumps(minimal_config, indent=2))
                return 0
            os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(args.output), exist_ok=True)
            with open(args.output, "w") as fh:
                json.dump(minimal_config, fh, indent=2)
            print("Minimal placeholder config written")
            return 0

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Generate config
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    try:
        config = generate_config(singbox_el)
    except Exception as exc:
        print(f"Error generating config: {exc}", file=sys.stderr)
        return 1

    if args.dry_run:
        print(json.dumps(config, indent=2))
        return 0

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Backup existing config
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    backup_path = backup_existing_config(args.output)

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Write to temp, validate, then commit
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(args.output), exist_ok=True)

    fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(suffix=".json", prefix="sing-box-config-",
                                     dir=os.path.dirname(args.output))
    try:
        with os.fdopen(fd, "w") as fh:
            json.dump(config, fh, indent=2)
    except Exception:
        os.unlink(tmp_path)
        raise

    # Validate
    if not validate_config(tmp_path):
        os.unlink(tmp_path)
        print("Config validation FAILED", file=sys.stderr)
        if backup_path:
            restore_config(backup_path, args.output)
            print(f"Previous config restored from {backup_path}", file=sys.stderr)
        return 1

    # Commit: move temp to final
    shutil.move(tmp_path, args.output)
    os.chmod(args.output, 0o644)
    print("Config generated successfully")
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/rollback.sh} ~~~~
#!/bin/sh
# sing-box OPNsense Plugin v3.0.0 - Rollback Script
#
# Restores sing-box binary, config, and plugin files from the latest backup.
# Supports backups created by both +PRE_INSTALL and backup.sh.
#
# Usage: rollback.sh [--list] [backup_timestamp]
#   --list, -l    List available backups and exit
#   backup_timestamp  Restore specific backup (e.g., 20250625143022)

BACKUP_BASE="/root/sing-box-backup"
CONFIG_JSON="/usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json"
SING_BOX_BIN="/usr/local/bin/sing-box"
SING_BOX_ETC="/usr/local/etc/sing-box"

# --- Functions ---

list_backups() {
    if [ ! -d "$BACKUP_BASE" ]; then
        echo "No backup directory found: $BACKUP_BASE"
        return 1
    fi
    echo "Available backups:"
    echo "TIMESTAMP           | SIZE     | CONTENTS"
    echo "--------------------+----------+------------------------------"
    for d in "$BACKUP_BASE"/sing-box-backup-*; do
        [ -d "$d" ] || continue
        ts=$(basename "$d" | sed 's/sing-box-backup-//')
        size=$(du -sh "$d" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
        contents=""
        [ -f "$d/config.json" ]         && contents="${contents}config "
        [ -f "$d/sing-box" ]            && contents="${contents}binary "
        [ -f "$d/config.xml.singbox" ]  && contents="${contents}xml "
        [ -f "$d/config.xml.backup" ]   && contents="${contents}full-xml "
        [ -d "$d/rule-sets" ]           && contents="${contents}rulesets "
        [ -d "$d/controllers" ]         && contents="${contents}plugin-files "
        printf "%-19s | %-8s | %s\n" "$ts" "$size" "$contents"
    done | sort -r
}

find_latest_backup() {
    if [ ! -d "$BACKUP_BASE" ]; then
        echo ""
        return
    fi
    latest=""
    for d in "$BACKUP_BASE"/sing-box-backup-*; do
        [ -d "$d" ] || continue
        if [ -z "$latest" ] || [ "$d" -nt "$latest" ]; then
            latest="$d"
        fi
    done
    echo "$latest"
}

# --- Main ---

# Parse arguments
REQUESTED_TS=""
LIST_MODE=0

for arg in "$@"; do
    case "$arg" in
        --list|-l)
            LIST_MODE=1
            ;;
        *)
            REQUESTED_TS="$arg"
            ;;
    esac
done

if [ "$LIST_MODE" -eq 1 ]; then
    list_backups
    exit 0
fi

# Determine backup to restore
if [ -n "$REQUESTED_TS" ]; then
    BACKUP_DIR="$BACKUP_BASE/sing-box-backup-$REQUESTED_TS"
    if [ ! -d "$BACKUP_DIR" ]; then
        echo "Error: Backup not found: $BACKUP_DIR" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
else
    BACKUP_DIR=$(find_latest_backup)
    if [ -z "$BACKUP_DIR" ] || [ ! -d "$BACKUP_DIR" ]; then
        echo "Error: No backup found in $BACKUP_BASE" >&2
        echo "Run 'backup.sh' first to create a backup, or check /root/ for old backups." >&2
        exit 1
    fi
fi

echo "=========================================="
echo "sing-box Rollback"
echo "=========================================="
echo "Backup source: $BACKUP_DIR"
echo "Timestamp:     $(basename "$BACKUP_DIR" | sed 's/sing-box-backup-//')"
echo ""

# Stop service before restore
echo "Stopping sing-box service..."
if service sing-box stop >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "[OK] Service stopped"
else
    echo "[--] Service was not running or stop failed"
fi
echo ""

restored_something=0
errors=0

# --- Restore sing-box binary ---
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/sing-box" ]; then
    cp -f "$BACKUP_DIR/sing-box" "$SING_BOX_BIN" 2>/dev/null
    if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
        chmod +x "$SING_BOX_BIN"
        restored_something=1
        echo "[OK] Restored sing-box binary"
        "$SING_BOX_BIN" version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo "    (version check failed)"
    else
        echo "[!!] Failed to restore sing-box binary (permission denied?)" >&2
        errors=$((errors + 1))
    fi
else
    echo "[--] sing-box binary backup not found"
fi

# --- Restore config.json ---
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/config.json" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$(dirname "$CONFIG_JSON")"
    cp -f "$BACKUP_DIR/config.json" "$CONFIG_JSON" 2>/dev/null
    if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
        restored_something=1
        echo "[OK] Restored config.json"
    else
        echo "[!!] Failed to restore config.json" >&2
        errors=$((errors + 1))
    fi
else
    echo "[--] config.json backup not found"
fi

# --- Restore config.xml snippet (for reference) ---
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/config.xml.singbox" ]; then
    echo "[OK] Found config.xml SingBox section backup (for reference):"
    echo "     $BACKUP_DIR/config.xml.singbox"
    restored_something=1
fi

# --- Restore full config.xml backup (from +PRE_INSTALL) ---
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/config.xml.backup" ]; then
    echo "[OK] Found full config.xml backup:"
    echo "     $BACKUP_DIR/config.xml.backup"
    echo "     NOTE: Manual merge of SingBox section into /conf/config.xml may be required."
    restored_something=1
fi

# --- Restore rule-sets ---
if [ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/rule-sets" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$SING_BOX_ETC/rule-sets"
    cp -f "$BACKUP_DIR/rule-sets/"* "$SING_BOX_ETC/rule-sets/" 2>/dev/null || true
    rs_count=$(ls "$SING_BOX_ETC/rule-sets/" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    if [ "$rs_count" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "[OK] Restored rule-sets ($rs_count files)"
        restored_something=1
    else
        echo "[--] No rule-set files to restore"
    fi
fi

# --- Restore plugin MVC files (from +PRE_INSTALL backup) ---
if [ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/controllers/SingBox" ]; then
    echo "[OK] Restoring plugin controller files..."
    mkdir -p /usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/controllers/OPNsense/SingBox
    cp -rf "$BACKUP_DIR/controllers/SingBox/"* /usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/controllers/OPNsense/SingBox/ 2>/dev/null || true
    restored_something=1
fi

if [ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/models/SingBox" ]; then
    echo "[OK] Restoring plugin model files..."
    mkdir -p /usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/models/OPNsense/SingBox
    cp -rf "$BACKUP_DIR/models/SingBox/"* /usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/models/OPNsense/SingBox/ 2>/dev/null || true
    restored_something=1
fi

if [ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/views/SingBox" ]; then
    echo "[OK] Restoring plugin view files..."
    mkdir -p /usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/views/OPNsense/SingBox
    cp -rf "$BACKUP_DIR/views/SingBox/"* /usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/views/OPNsense/SingBox/ 2>/dev/null || true
    restored_something=1
fi

if [ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/scripts/SingBox" ]; then
    echo "[OK] Restoring plugin script files..."
    mkdir -p /usr/local/opnsense/scripts/SingBox
    cp -rf "$BACKUP_DIR/scripts/SingBox/"* /usr/local/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/ 2>/dev/null || true
    restored_something=1
fi

echo ""

# --- Validate results ---
if [ "$restored_something" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Warning: Nothing was restored. Backup may be incomplete."
    exit 1
fi

if [ "$errors" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "Warning: $errors error(s) occurred during restore."
fi

# --- Restart service ---
echo ""
echo "Restarting sing-box service..."
if service sing-box restart >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "[OK] Service restarted successfully"
else
    # Try alternative: start if restart failed
    if service sing-box start >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "[OK] Service started successfully"
    else
        echo "[!!] Service restart failed - check 'service sing-box status' and /var/log/sing-box/" >&2
        exit 2
    fi
fi

echo ""
echo "=========================================="
echo "Rollback complete"
echo "=========================================="
exit 0

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/test-connection.py} ~~~~
#!/usr/local/bin/python3
"""
sing-box OPNsense Plugin v3.0.0 - Connection Test Script

Tests a specific outbound by its tag using the sing-box experimental API.
Returns latency and status in JSON format.

Usage: test-connection.py  [--timeout 10] [--url https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204]
"""

import argparse
import json
import socket
import sys
import time
import urllib.request
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Configuration
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEFAULT_API_HOST = "127.0.0.1"
DEFAULT_API_PORT = 9090
DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 10
DEFAULT_TEST_URL = "https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204"


def read_api_secret() -> Optional[str]:
    """Read API secret from config.xml if configured."""
    import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

    config_path = "/conf/config.xml"
    try:
        tree = ET.parse(config_path)
        root = tree.getroot()
        secret_el = root.find(".//SingBox/general/experimental_api_secret")
        if secret_el is not None and secret_el.text:
            return secret_el.text.strip()
    except Exception:
        pass
    return None


def read_api_port() -> int:
    """Read API port from config.xml."""
    import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

    config_path = "/conf/config.xml"
    try:
        tree = ET.parse(config_path)
        root = tree.getroot()
        port_el = root.find(".//SingBox/general/experimental_api_port")
        if port_el is not None and port_el.text:
            return int(port_el.text.strip())
    except Exception:
        pass
    return DEFAULT_API_PORT


def api_request(path: str, timeout: float = 10.0, secret: Optional[str] = None) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Make a request to the sing-box experimental API."""
    port = read_api_port()
    url = f"http://{DEFAULT_API_HOST}:{port}{path}"

    req = urllib.request.Request(url)
    if secret:
        req.add_header("Authorization", f"Bearer {secret}")

    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=timeout) as resp:
            data = resp.read().decode("utf-8")
            return json.loads(data)
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as exc:
        return {"_error": f"HTTP {exc.code}: {exc.reason}"}
    except urllib.error.URLError as exc:
        return {"_error": f"Connection failed: {exc.reason}"}
    except socket.timeout:
        return {"_error": "Request timed out"}
    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
        return {"_error": f"Invalid JSON response: {exc}"}
    except Exception as exc:
        return {"_error": str(exc)}


def test_outbound(tag: str, timeout: float = 10.0, test_url: str = DEFAULT_TEST_URL) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Test a specific outbound by its tag.

    Uses the sing-box API /proxies endpoint to check latency for an outbound.
    Falls back to direct TCP connection test if API is unavailable.
    """
    secret = read_api_secret()
    result: Dict[str, Any] = {
        "tag": tag,
        "timestamp": time.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z"),
        "timeout": timeout,
    }

    # Attempt 1: Use sing-box API /proxies endpoint
    api_data = api_request("/proxies", timeout=timeout, secret=secret)

    if api_data and "_error" not in api_data:
        # sing-box API returns proxy info
        proxies = api_data if isinstance(api_data, dict) else {}
        proxy = proxies.get(tag) if isinstance(proxies, dict) else None

        if proxy:
            result["method"] = "sing-box-api"
            result["type"] = proxy.get("type", "unknown")
            result["udp"] = proxy.get("udp", False)

            # Check history for latency
            history = proxy.get("history", [])
            if history:
                latest = history[-1]
                delay = latest.get("delay", -1)
                if delay >= 0:
                    result["status"] = "ok"
                    result["latency_ms"] = delay
                else:
                    result["status"] = "error"
                    result["error"] = "Negative latency reported"
            else:
                # Try to test via API
                test_result = api_request(f"/proxies/{tag}/delay?url={test_url}&timeout={int(timeout * 1000)}",
                                          timeout=timeout, secret=secret)
                if test_result and "_error" not in test_result:
                    delay = test_result.get("delay", -1)
                    if delay >= 0:
                        result["status"] = "ok"
                        result["latency_ms"] = delay
                    else:
                        result["status"] = "timeout"
                        result["error"] = "No response within timeout"
                else:
                    result["status"] = "untested"
                    result["error"] = test_result.get("_error", "Test endpoint returned no data") if test_result else "No response"
        else:
            # Outbound not found in API
            result["status"] = "not_found"
            result["error"] = f"Outbound '{tag}' not found in sing-box API"
            # List available outbounds
            result["available_outbounds"] = list(proxies.keys()) if isinstance(proxies, dict) else []
    else:
        # API unavailable - fallback
        api_error = api_data.get("_error", "Unknown error") if api_data else "No response"
        result["api_error"] = api_error
        result["status"] = "api_unavailable"
        result["method"] = "fallback"

    return result


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Test sing-box outbound connection latency"
    )
    parser.add_argument("tag", help="Outbound tag to test")
    parser.add_argument("--timeout", type=float, default=DEFAULT_TIMEOUT,
                        help=f"Timeout in seconds (default: {DEFAULT_TIMEOUT})")
    parser.add_argument("--url", default=DEFAULT_TEST_URL,
                        help=f"Test URL (default: {DEFAULT_TEST_URL})")
    parser.add_argument("--format", choices=["json", "pretty"], default="json",
                        help="Output format")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    result = test_outbound(args.tag, timeout=args.timeout, test_url=args.url)

    if args.format == "pretty":
        print(json.dumps(result, indent=2))
    else:
        print(json.dumps(result))

    # Exit with non-zero if test failed
    status = result.get("status", "unknown")
    if status in ("error", "timeout", "not_found", "api_unavailable"):
        return 1
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/opnsense/scripts/SingBox/test_generate_config.py} ~~~~
#!/usr/local/bin/python3
"""
Comprehensive tests for generate-config.py

Usage: python3 test_generate_config.py [-v]
"""
import importlib.util
import json
import os
import sys
import tempfile
import unittest
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Import generate-config.py (file has a hyphen, so use importlib)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
SCRIPT_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
SPEC = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("generate_config",
                                               os.path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "generate-config.py"))
gc = importlib.util.module_from_spec(SPEC)
SPEC.loader.exec_module(gc)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# XML helper for tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def make_xml_root() -> ET.Element:
    """Create a minimal OPNsense config XML root with SingBox section."""
    root = ET.Element("opnsense")
    opnsense = ET.SubElement(root, "OPNsense")
    singbox = ET.SubElement(opnsense, "SingBox")
    general = ET.SubElement(singbox, "general")
    ET.SubElement(general, "enabled").text = "1"
    # loglevel intentionally omitted so tests can add without duplicates
    ET.SubElement(general, "logoutput").text = "/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log"
    ET.SubElement(general, "logtimestamp").text = "1"
    # Note: experimental_api_enabled and port intentionally omitted here
    # so tests can add them as needed without duplicate elements.
    return root, singbox


def add_outbound(singbox: ET.Element, **kwargs) -> ET.Element:
    """Add an outbound entry to the SingBox XML section."""
    outbounds = singbox.find("outbounds")
    if outbounds is None:
        outbounds = ET.SubElement(singbox, "outbounds")
    ob = ET.SubElement(outbounds, "outbound")
    for key, val in kwargs.items():
        el = ET.SubElement(ob, key)
        el.text = str(val) if val is not None else ""
    return ob


def add_inbound(singbox: ET.Element, **kwargs) -> ET.Element:
    """Add an inbound entry to the SingBox XML section."""
    inbounds = singbox.find("inbounds")
    if inbounds is None:
        inbounds = ET.SubElement(singbox, "inbounds")
    ib = ET.SubElement(inbounds, "inbound")
    for key, val in kwargs.items():
        el = ET.SubElement(ib, key)
        el.text = str(val) if val is not None else ""
    return ib


def add_route_rule(singbox: ET.Element, **kwargs) -> ET.Element:
    """Add a route rule entry."""
    rules = singbox.find("rules")
    if rules is None:
        rules = ET.SubElement(singbox, "rules")
    rule = ET.SubElement(rules, "rule")
    for key, val in kwargs.items():
        el = ET.SubElement(rule, key)
        el.text = str(val) if val is not None else ""
    return rule


def add_dns_server(singbox: ET.Element, **kwargs) -> ET.Element:
    """Add a DNS server entry."""
    dns = singbox.find("dns")
    if dns is None:
        dns = ET.SubElement(singbox, "dns")
    servers = dns.find("servers")
    if servers is None:
        servers = ET.SubElement(dns, "servers")
    srv = ET.SubElement(servers, "server")
    for key, val in kwargs.items():
        el = ET.SubElement(srv, key)
        el.text = str(val) if val is not None else ""
    return srv


def add_dns_rule(singbox: ET.Element, **kwargs) -> ET.Element:
    """Add a DNS rule entry."""
    dns = singbox.find("dns")
    if dns is None:
        dns = ET.SubElement(singbox, "dns")
    rules = dns.find("rules")
    if rules is None:
        rules = ET.SubElement(dns, "rules")
    dr = ET.SubElement(rules, "dns_rule")
    for key, val in kwargs.items():
        el = ET.SubElement(dr, key)
        el.text = str(val) if val is not None else ""
    return dr


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Test: XML helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestXmlHelpers(unittest.TestCase):

    def test_xml_text(self):
        el = ET.Element("test")
        el.text = "  hello  "
        self.assertEqual(gc.xml_text(el), "hello")

    def test_xml_text_none(self):
        self.assertEqual(gc.xml_text(None, "default"), "default")

    def test_xml_text_empty(self):
        el = ET.Element("test")
        el.text = "   "
        # Stripping whitespace-only yields empty string, not default
        self.assertEqual(gc.xml_text(el, "default"), "")

    def test_xml_bool_true_values(self):
        for val in ("1", "true", "yes", "on"):
            el = ET.Element("t"); el.text = val
            self.assertTrue(gc.xml_bool(el), f"'{val}' should be True")

    def test_xml_bool_false_values(self):
        for val in ("0", "false", "no", "off", ""):
            el = ET.Element("t"); el.text = val
            self.assertFalse(gc.xml_bool(el), f"'{val}' should be False")

    def test_xml_bool_none(self):
        self.assertFalse(gc.xml_bool(None, False))
        # xml_bool(None) falls through to default because xml_text returns ""
        # and "" is in false_values, so it returns default (False when not specified)
        self.assertFalse(gc.xml_bool(None))

    def test_xml_int_valid(self):
        el = ET.Element("t"); el.text = "443"
        self.assertEqual(gc.xml_int(el), 443)

    def test_xml_int_invalid(self):
        el = ET.Element("t"); el.text = "abc"
        self.assertEqual(gc.xml_int(el, 0), 0)

    def test_xml_int_none(self):
        self.assertEqual(gc.xml_int(None, 42), 42)

    def test_find_child(self):
        parent = ET.Element("parent")
        child = ET.SubElement(parent, "child")
        child.text = "found"
        self.assertIsNotNone(gc.find_child(parent, "child"))
        self.assertIsNone(gc.find_child(parent, "missing"))

    def test_find_all_children(self):
        parent = ET.Element("parent")
        ET.SubElement(parent, "child")
        ET.SubElement(parent, "child")
        ET.SubElement(parent, "other")
        self.assertEqual(len(gc.find_all_children(parent, "child")), 2)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Test: Log section
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestLogSection(unittest.TestCase):

    def test_default_log(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        log = gc.build_log_section(singbox)
        self.assertEqual(log["level"], "info")
        self.assertEqual(log["output"], "/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log")
        self.assertTrue(log["timestamp"])

    def test_custom_loglevel(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        general = singbox.find("general")
        ET.SubElement(general, "loglevel").text = "debug"
        log = gc.build_log_section(singbox)
        self.assertEqual(log["level"], "debug")

    def test_log_without_general(self):
        """Log section should have defaults when  is missing."""
        singbox = ET.Element("SingBox")
        log = gc.build_log_section(singbox)
        self.assertEqual(log["level"], "info")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Test: Experimental section
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestExperimentalSection(unittest.TestCase):

    def test_default_experimental(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        exp = gc.build_experimental_section(singbox)
        self.assertIn("clash_api", exp)
        self.assertEqual(exp["clash_api"]["external_controller"], "127.0.0.1:9090")
        self.assertTrue(exp["clash_api"]["store_selected"])

    def test_experimental_disabled(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        general = singbox.find("general")
        ET.SubElement(general, "experimental_api_enabled").text = "0"
        exp = gc.build_experimental_section(singbox)
        self.assertEqual(exp, {})

    def test_experimental_custom_port_and_secret(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        general = singbox.find("general")
        ET.SubElement(general, "experimental_api_port").text = "8080"
        ET.SubElement(general, "experimental_api_secret").text = "mysecret"
        exp = gc.build_experimental_section(singbox)
        self.assertEqual(exp["clash_api"]["external_controller"], "127.0.0.1:8080")
        self.assertEqual(exp["clash_api"]["secret"], "mysecret")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Test: Outbounds
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestOutbounds(unittest.TestCase):

    def test_vless_outbound(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="vless-node", type="vless",
                     server="example.com", server_port="443",
                     uuid="test-uuid-1234", flow="xtls-rprx-vision",
                     packet_encoding="xudp", tls_enabled="1",
                     tls_server_name="example.com")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        tags = [o["tag"] for o in outbounds]
        self.assertIn("vless-node", tags)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "vless-node"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["type"], "vless")
        self.assertEqual(ob["server"], "example.com")
        self.assertEqual(ob["server_port"], 443)
        self.assertEqual(ob["uuid"], "test-uuid-1234")
        self.assertEqual(ob["flow"], "xtls-rprx-vision")
        self.assertEqual(ob["packet_encoding"], "xudp")
        self.assertIn("tls", ob)
        self.assertTrue(ob["tls"]["enabled"])
        self.assertEqual(ob["tls"]["server_name"], "example.com")

    def test_vmess_outbound(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="vmess-node", type="vmess",
                     server="vmess.example.com", server_port="443",
                     uuid="vmess-uuid", alterId="1", security="auto",
                     tls_enabled="1")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "vmess-node"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["type"], "vmess")
        self.assertEqual(ob["uuid"], "vmess-uuid")
        self.assertEqual(ob["alter_id"], 1)
        self.assertEqual(ob["security"], "auto")

    def test_trojan_outbound(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="trojan-node", type="trojan",
                     server="trojan.example.com", server_port="443",
                     password="trojan-pass", tls_enabled="1")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "trojan-node"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["type"], "trojan")
        self.assertEqual(ob["password"], "trojan-pass")

    def test_shadowsocks_outbound(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="ss-node", type="shadowsocks",
                     server="ss.example.com", server_port="8388",
                     method="aes-256-gcm", password="ss-password")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "ss-node"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["type"], "shadowsocks")
        self.assertEqual(ob["method"], "aes-256-gcm")
        self.assertEqual(ob["password"], "ss-password")

    def test_hysteria2_outbound(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="h2-node", type="hysteria2",
                     server="h2.example.com", server_port="443",
                     password="h2-pass", obfs="salamander",
                     obfs_password="obfs-secret", up_mbps="100", down_mbps="50",
                     tls_enabled="1")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "h2-node"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["type"], "hysteria2")
        self.assertEqual(ob["password"], "h2-pass")
        self.assertEqual(ob["obfs"]["type"], "salamander")
        self.assertEqual(ob["obfs"]["password"], "obfs-secret")
        self.assertEqual(ob["up_mbps"], 100)
        self.assertEqual(ob["down_mbps"], 50)

    def test_wireguard_outbound(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="wg-node", type="wireguard",
                     server="wg.example.com", server_port="51820",
                     local_address="10.0.0.2/32,fd00::2/128",
                     private_key="wg-priv-key",
                     peer_public_key="peer-pub-key",
                     peer_preshared_key="psk",
                     peer_endpoint="wg.example.com:51820",
                     peer_allowed_ips="0.0.0.0/0,::/0",
                     peer_persistent_keepalive="25")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "wg-node"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["type"], "wireguard")
        self.assertEqual(ob["server"], "wg.example.com")
        self.assertEqual(ob["server_port"], 51820)
        self.assertEqual(ob["local_address"], ["10.0.0.2/32", "fd00::2/128"])
        self.assertEqual(ob["private_key"], "wg-priv-key")
        self.assertIn("peers", ob)
        peer = ob["peers"][0]
        self.assertEqual(peer["public_key"], "peer-pub-key")
        self.assertEqual(peer["pre_shared_key"], "psk")
        self.assertEqual(peer["address"], "wg.example.com:51820")
        self.assertEqual(peer["allowed_ips"], ["0.0.0.0/0", "::/0"])
        self.assertEqual(peer["persistent_keepalive_interval"], 25)

    def test_direct_block(self):
        """direct and block outbounds are always present."""
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        tags = [o["tag"] for o in outbounds]
        self.assertIn("direct", tags)
        self.assertIn("block", tags)
        direct = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "direct"][0]
        self.assertEqual(direct["type"], "direct")
        block = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "block"][0]
        self.assertEqual(block["type"], "block")

    def test_selector_group(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="proxy-selector", type="selector",
                     group_outbounds="vless-node,vmess-node,direct")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "proxy-selector"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["type"], "selector")
        self.assertEqual(ob["outbounds"], ["vless-node", "vmess-node", "direct"])

    def test_urltest_group(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="auto-proxy", type="urltest",
                     group_outbounds="vless-node,vmess-node",
                     group_url="https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204",
                     group_interval="300", group_tolerance="50")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "auto-proxy"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["type"], "urltest")
        self.assertEqual(ob["url"], "https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204")
        self.assertEqual(ob["interval"], 300)
        self.assertEqual(ob["tolerance"], 50)
        self.assertIsInstance(ob["interval"], int)

    def test_urltest_interval_is_number(self):
        """urltest interval must be a number, not a string with 's' suffix."""
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="auto-test", type="urltest",
                     group_outbounds="direct",
                     group_interval="600")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "auto-test"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["interval"], 600)
        self.assertIsInstance(ob["interval"], int)

    def test_loadbalance_group(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="lb-proxy", type="load-balance",
                     group_outbounds="vless-node,vmess-node",
                     group_url="https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204",
                     group_interval="300")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        ob = [o for o in outbounds if o["tag"] == "lb-proxy"][0]
        self.assertEqual(ob["type"], "load-balance")
        self.assertIn("check", ob)
        self.assertEqual(ob["check"]["url"], "https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204")
        self.assertEqual(ob["check"]["interval"], 300)
        self.assertIsInstance(ob["check"]["interval"], int)

    def test_disabled_outbound_skipped(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="0", name="disabled-node", type="vless",
                     server="example.com", server_port="443")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        tags = [o["tag"] for o in outbounds]
        self.assertNotIn("disabled-node", tags)

    def test_outbound_without_name_or_type(self):
        """Outbounds without name or type should be skipped."""
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="", type="vless",
                     server="example.com")
        outbounds = gc.build_outbounds_section(singbox)
        # Should only have direct and block
        self.assertEqual(len([o for o in outbounds if o["type"] == "vless"]), 0)

    def test_vless_transport(self):
        root, singbox = make_xml_root()
        add_outbound(singbox, enabled="1", name="vless-ws", type="vless",
