                group_outbounds: '',
                group_url: 'https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204',
                group_interval: 300,
                group_tolerance: 50
            };
        },
        mergeForm: function(outbound) {
            var defaults = this.getDefaultForm();
            var merged = {};
            for (var key in defaults) {
                merged[key] = outbound[key] !== undefined ? outbound[key] : defaults[key];
            }
            // Handle boolean strings
            merged.enabled = outbound.enabled === '1' || outbound.enabled === true || outbound.enabled === 'true';
            merged.tls_enabled = outbound.tls_enabled === '1' || outbound.tls_enabled === true || outbound.tls_enabled === 'true';
            merged.tls_insecure = outbound.tls_insecure === '1' || outbound.tls_insecure === true || outbound.tls_insecure === 'true';
            return merged;
        },
        onTypeChange: function() {
            // Reset type-specific fields when type changes
            this.form.uuid = '';
            this.form.password = '';
            this.form.flow = '';
        },
        onSubmit: function() {
            // Build clean data object
            var data = this.buildPayload();

            // Validate
            var errors = this.validate(data);
            if (errors.length > 0) {
                SingBoxAPI.showError(errors.join('\n'));
                return;
            }

            this.$emit('save', data);
        },
        buildPayload: function() {
            var data = {
                enabled: this.form.enabled ? '1' : '0',
                name: this.form.name.trim(),
                type: this.form.type
            };

            // Only include relevant fields based on type
            if (this.showServerField) {
                data.server = this.form.server.trim();
                data.server_port = this.form.server_port;
            }

            if (this.type === 'vless') {
                data.uuid = this.form.uuid.trim();
                data.flow = this.form.flow;
                data.packet_encoding = this.form.packet_encoding;
            }

            if (this.type === 'vmess') {
                data.uuid = this.form.uuid.trim();
                data.alterId = this.form.alterId;
                data.security = this.form.security;
            }

            if (this.type === 'trojan') {
                data.password = this.form.password;
            }

            if (this.type === 'shadowsocks') {
                data.method = this.form.method;
                data.password = this.form.password;
            }

            if (this.type === 'hysteria2') {
                data.obfs = this.form.obfs.trim();
                data.obfs_password = this.form.obfs_password;
                data.up_mbps = this.form.up_mbps;
                data.down_mbps = this.form.down_mbps;
            }

            if (this.type === 'wireguard') {
                data.local_address = this.form.local_address.trim();
                data.private_key = this.form.private_key.trim();
                data.peer_public_key = this.form.peer_public_key.trim();
                data.peer_preshared_key = this.form.peer_preshared_key.trim();
                data.peer_endpoint = this.form.peer_endpoint.trim();
                data.peer_allowed_ips = this.form.peer_allowed_ips.trim();
                data.peer_persistent_keepalive = this.form.peer_persistent_keepalive;
            }

            if (this.showTlsSection) {
                data.tls_enabled = this.form.tls_enabled ? '1' : '0';
                data.tls_server_name = this.form.tls_server_name.trim();
                data.tls_insecure = this.form.tls_insecure ? '1' : '0';
                data.tls_alpn = this.form.tls_alpn.trim();
            }

            if (this.showTransportSection && this.form.transport_type) {
                data.transport_type = this.form.transport_type;
                data.transport_path = this.form.transport_path.trim();
                data.transport_host = this.form.transport_host.trim();
            }

            if (this.showGroupSection) {
                data.group_outbounds = this.form.group_outbounds.trim();
                if (this.type === 'urltest') {
                    data.group_url = this.form.group_url.trim();
                    data.group_interval = this.form.group_interval;
                    data.group_tolerance = this.form.group_tolerance;
                }
            }

            return data;
        },
        validate: function(data) {
            var errors = [];

            if (!data.name || data.name.length < 1) {
                errors.push('Name is required');
            }
            if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,64}$/.test(data.name)) {
                errors.push('Name must be 1-64 alphanumeric characters, underscores, or hyphens');
            }

            if (this.showServerField) {
                if (!data.server) errors.push('Server is required');
                if (!data.server_port) errors.push('Server port is required');
            }

            if (data.type === 'vless' && !data.uuid) errors.push('UUID is required for VLESS');
            if (data.type === 'vmess' && !data.uuid) errors.push('UUID is required for VMess');
            if (data.type === 'trojan' && !data.password) errors.push('Password is required for Trojan');
            if (data.type === 'shadowsocks' && !data.password) errors.push('Password is required for Shadowsocks');

            if (data.type === 'wireguard') {
                if (!data.local_address) errors.push('Local address is required for WireGuard');
                if (!data.private_key) errors.push('Private key is required for WireGuard');
                if (!data.peer_public_key) errors.push('Peer public key is required for WireGuard');
                if (!data.peer_endpoint) errors.push('Peer endpoint is required for WireGuard');
            }

            if (this.showGroupSection && !data.group_outbounds) {
                errors.push('At least one outbound must be specified for the group');
            }

            return errors;
        }
    }
};

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/www/js/sing-box/components/RuleEditor.vue.js} ~~~~
/**
 * RuleEditor.vue.js - Vue.js 3 Component for Visual Rule Editing
 * Provides a visual rule list with drag-and-drop reordering.
 *
 * Usage:
 *   
 */

var RuleEditor = {
    name: 'RuleEditor',
    props: {
        rules: {
            type: Array,
            default: function() { return []; }
        }
    },
    emits: ['save', 'reorder'],
    template: `
        

            
            

                
                
{{ t('No rules to display') }}

            


            
            
    
                
  • 

                    
                    
    
                        
                    
    

                    
                    
    {{ index + 1 }}
    

                    
                    
    
                        
    
                            
                                {{ rule.rule_type }}
                            
                            {{ rule.value }}
                            
                                 {{ rule.description }}
                            
                        
    
                        
    
                            
                                {{ rule.action }}
                            
                            
                                 {{ rule.action_outbound }}
                            
                            
                                 {{ t('Inverted') }}
                            
                            
                                 {{ t('Disabled') }}
                            
                        
    
                    
    

                    
                    
    
                        
                        
                    
    
                
    • 
            


            
            

                

                    
{{ t('Edit Rule') }}

                

                

                    

                        

                            
                            

                                
                            

                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                            

                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                            

                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                            

                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                            

                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                            

                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                            

                        

                        

                            

                                
                                
                            

                        

                    

                

            


            
            

                
                
            

        

    `,
    data: function() {
        return {
            localRules: [],
            originalRules: [],
            draggingIndex: null,
            editingRule: null,
            editForm: this.getEmptyEditForm(),
            hasChanges: false
        };
    },
    watch: {
        rules: {
            immediate: true,
            handler: function(newRules) {
                this.localRules = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(newRules || []));
                this.originalRules = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(newRules || []));
                this.hasChanges = false;
            }
        }
    },
    methods: {
        t: function(key) {
            if (window.singbox_i18n && window.singbox_i18n[key]) {
                return window.singbox_i18n[key];
            }
            return key;
        },
        getEmptyEditForm: function() {
            return {
                rule_type: 'domain',
                value: '',
                action: 'direct',
                action_outbound: '',
                description: '',
                invert: false,
                enabled: true
            };
        },
        actionBadgeClass: function(action) {
            if (action === 'direct') return 'sb-badge-active';
            if (action === 'reject') return 'sb-badge-disabled';
            return 'badge-warning';
        },
        // Drag and Drop
        dragStart: function(index, event) {
            this.draggingIndex = index;
            event.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
            event.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', index);
            // Add visual feedback
            var el = event.target.closest('.visual-rule-item');
            if (el) {
                setTimeout(function() { el.classList.add('dragging'); }, 0);
            }
        },
        dragOver: function(index, event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
        },
        drop: function(targetIndex, event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            var fromIndex = this.draggingIndex;
            if (fromIndex === null || fromIndex === targetIndex) return;

            // Reorder array
            var item = this.localRules.splice(fromIndex, 1)[0];
            this.localRules.splice(targetIndex, 0, item);

            this.draggingIndex = null;
            this.hasChanges = true;

            // Emit reorder event
            var reordered = this.localRules.map(function(r, i) {
                return { uuid: r.uuid, priority: i + 1 };
            });
            this.$emit('reorder', reordered);
        },
        dragEnd: function() {
            this.draggingIndex = null;
            // Remove dragging class from all items
            document.querySelectorAll('.visual-rule-item.dragging').forEach(function(el) {
                el.classList.remove('dragging');
            });
        },
        // Edit
        editRule: function(index) {
            this.editingRule = index;
            var rule = this.localRules[index];
            this.editForm = {
                rule_type: rule.rule_type || 'domain',
                value: rule.value || '',
                action: rule.action || 'direct',
                action_outbound: rule.action_outbound || '',
                description: rule.description || '',
                invert: rule.invert === '1' || rule.invert === true || rule.invert === 'true',
                enabled: rule.enabled !== '0' && rule.enabled !== false && rule.enabled !== 'false'
            };
        },
        saveEdit: function() {
            if (this.editingRule === null) return;

            var rule = this.localRules[this.editingRule];
            rule.rule_type = this.editForm.rule_type;
            rule.value = this.editForm.value;
            rule.action = this.editForm.action;
            rule.action_outbound = this.editForm.action_outbound;
            rule.description = this.editForm.description;
            rule.invert = this.editForm.invert ? '1' : '0';
            rule.enabled = this.editForm.enabled ? '1' : '0';

            this.hasChanges = true;
            this.editingRule = null;
            this.editForm = this.getEmptyEditForm();

            // Emit save
            this.$emit('save', this.localRules);
        },
        cancelEdit: function() {
            this.editingRule = null;
            this.editForm = this.getEmptyEditForm();
        },
        deleteRule: function(index) {
            var rule = this.localRules[index];
            var name = rule.description || rule.value || 'this rule';
            if (typeof SingBoxAPI !== 'undefined' && SingBoxAPI.confirmDialog) {
                SingBoxAPI.confirmDialog('Delete "' + name + '"?', function() {
                    this.localRules.splice(index, 1);
                    this.hasChanges = true;
                    this.$emit('save', this.localRules);
                }.bind(this));
            } else {
                if (confirm('Delete "' + name + '"?')) {
                    this.localRules.splice(index, 1);
                    this.hasChanges = true;
                    this.$emit('save', this.localRules);
                }
            }
        },
        saveOrder: function() {
            // Update priorities
            var reordered = this.localRules.map(function(r, i) {
                r.priority = i + 1;
                return { uuid: r.uuid, priority: i + 1 };
            });
            this.originalRules = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.localRules));
            this.hasChanges = false;
            this.$emit('reorder', reordered);
        },
        resetOrder: function() {
            this.localRules = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.originalRules));
            this.hasChanges = false;
        }
    }
};

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/www/js/sing-box/dashboard.js} ~~~~
/**
 * dashboard.js - sing-box Dashboard
 * Handles service status display, stats, traffic charts with Chart.js, and auto-refresh.
 */

var dashboardIntervals = [];
var trafficChart5m = null;
var trafficChart1h = null;
var trafficChart24h = null;

$(document).ready(function() {
    // Load initial data
    loadDashboard();
    loadTraffic();
    loadOutbounds();
    initCharts();

    // Auto-refresh every 5 seconds
    var dashInterval = setInterval(function() {
        loadDashboard();
        loadOutbounds();
    }, 5000);
    dashboardIntervals.push(dashInterval);

    // Traffic chart refresh every 10 seconds
    var trafficInterval = setInterval(loadTraffic, 10000);
    dashboardIntervals.push(trafficInterval);
});

// Cleanup intervals on page leave
$(window).on('beforeunload', function() {
    for (var i = 0; i < dashboardIntervals.length; i++) {
        clearInterval(dashboardIntervals[i]);
    }
    dashboardIntervals = [];
    // Destroy charts to free memory
    if (trafficChart5m) { trafficChart5m.destroy(); trafficChart5m = null; }
    if (trafficChart1h) { trafficChart1h.destroy(); trafficChart1h = null; }
    if (trafficChart24h) { trafficChart24h.destroy(); trafficChart24h = null; }
});

/**
 * Initialize Chart.js traffic charts
 */
function initCharts() {
    if (typeof Chart === 'undefined') {
        console.warn('Chart.js not loaded. Traffic charts will not be available.');
        return;
    }

    var commonOptions = {
        responsive: true,
        maintainAspectRatio: false,
        interaction: {
            mode: 'index',
            intersect: false
        },
        plugins: {
            legend: {
                display: true,
                position: 'top'
            },
            tooltip: {
                callbacks: {
                    label: function(context) {
                        return context.dataset.label + ': ' + SingBoxAPI.formatBytes(context.parsed.y);
                    }
                }
            }
        },
        scales: {
            x: {
                display: true,
                title: { display: false }
            },
            y: {
                display: true,
                beginAtZero: true,
                ticks: {
                    callback: function(value) {
                        return SingBoxAPI.formatBytes(value);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    };

    // 5 Minutes Chart
    var ctx5m = document.getElementById('chart-traffic-5m');
    if (ctx5m) {
        trafficChart5m = new Chart(ctx5m.getContext('2d'), {
            type: 'line',
            data: {
                labels: [],
                datasets: [
                    {
                        label: 'Download',
                        data: [],
                        borderColor: '#5cb85c',
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(92, 184, 92, 0.1)',
                        fill: true,
                        tension: 0.4,
                        pointRadius: 0,
                        borderWidth: 2
                    },
                    {
                        label: 'Upload',
                        data: [],
                        borderColor: '#337ab7',
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(51, 122, 183, 0.1)',
                        fill: true,
                        tension: 0.4,
                        pointRadius: 0,
                        borderWidth: 2
                    }
                ]
            },
            options: commonOptions
        });
    }

    // 1 Hour Chart
    var ctx1h = document.getElementById('chart-traffic-1h');
    if (ctx1h) {
        trafficChart1h = new Chart(ctx1h.getContext('2d'), {
            type: 'line',
            data: {
                labels: [],
                datasets: [
                    {
                        label: 'Download',
                        data: [],
                        borderColor: '#5cb85c',
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(92, 184, 92, 0.1)',
                        fill: true,
                        tension: 0.3,
                        pointRadius: 1,
                        borderWidth: 2
                    },
                    {
                        label: 'Upload',
                        data: [],
                        borderColor: '#337ab7',
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(51, 122, 183, 0.1)',
                        fill: true,
                        tension: 0.3,
                        pointRadius: 1,
                        borderWidth: 2
                    }
                ]
            },
            options: commonOptions
        });
    }

    // 24 Hours Chart
    var ctx24h = document.getElementById('chart-traffic-24h');
    if (ctx24h) {
        trafficChart24h = new Chart(ctx24h.getContext('2d'), {
            type: 'line',
            data: {
                labels: [],
                datasets: [
                    {
                        label: 'Download',
                        data: [],
                        borderColor: '#5cb85c',
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(92, 184, 92, 0.1)',
                        fill: true,
                        tension: 0.2,
                        pointRadius: 2,
                        borderWidth: 2
                    },
                    {
                        label: 'Upload',
                        data: [],
                        borderColor: '#337ab7',
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(51, 122, 183, 0.1)',
                        fill: true,
                        tension: 0.2,
                        pointRadius: 2,
                        borderWidth: 2
                    }
                ]
            },
            options: commonOptions
        });
    }
}

/**
 * Load dashboard statistics
 */
function loadDashboard() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dashboard/stats', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            updateDashboardUI(data);
        })
        .fail(function() {
            // Show unknown state
            updateDashboardUI({
                running: false,
                uptime: null,
                connections: 0,
                rules_count: 0
            });
        });
}

/**
 * Update dashboard UI elements with stats data
 */
function updateDashboardUI(data) {
    // Service status
    var $dot = $('#status-dot');
    var $text = $('#status-text');
    var $panel = $('#status-panel');

    if (data.running) {
        $dot.removeClass('status-stopped status-warning').addClass('status-running');
        $text.text('Running');
        $panel.removeClass('panel-default panel-danger').addClass('panel-success');
    } else {
        $dot.removeClass('status-running status-warning').addClass('status-stopped');
        $text.text('Stopped');
        $panel.removeClass('panel-default panel-success').addClass('panel-danger');
    }

    // Uptime
    $('#stat-uptime').text(data.uptime ? SingBoxAPI.formatDuration(data.uptime) : '--');

    // Connections
    $('#stat-connections').text(data.connections !== undefined ? data.connections : 0);

    // Rules count
    $('#stat-rules').text(data.rules_count !== undefined ? data.rules_count : 0);
}

/**
 * Load traffic data for charts
 */
function loadTraffic() {
    // Load with range parameter for different time periods
    var ranges = ['5m', '1h', '24h'];
    for (var i = 0; i < ranges.length; i++) {
        (function(range) {
            SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dashboard/traffic?range=' + range, 'GET')
                .done(function(data) {
                    updateTrafficChart(range, data);
                })
                .fail(function() {
                    // Silently fail on auto-refresh
                });
        })(ranges[i]);
    }
}

/**
 * Update Chart.js traffic chart with data
 */
function updateTrafficChart(range, data) {
    var chart = null;
    if (range === '5m') chart = trafficChart5m;
    else if (range === '1h') chart = trafficChart1h;
    else if (range === '24h') chart = trafficChart24h;

    if (!chart || !data || !data.points || data.points.length === 0) return;

    var labels = [];
    var downData = [];
    var upData = [];

    for (var i = 0; i < data.points.length; i++) {
        var pt = data.points[i];
        labels.push(pt.time || '');
        downData.push(pt.download || 0);
        upData.push(pt.upload || 0);
    }

    chart.data.labels = labels;
    chart.data.datasets[0].data = downData;
    chart.data.datasets[1].data = upData;
    chart.update('none'); // 'none' mode for performance

    // Update numeric display on 5m chart only
    if (range === '5m' && data.points.length > 0) {
        var last = data.points[data.points.length - 1];
        $('#traffic-in').text(SingBoxAPI.formatBytes(last.download || 0));
        $('#traffic-out').text(SingBoxAPI.formatBytes(last.upload || 0));
    }
}

/**
 * Load outbound health data
 */
function loadOutbounds() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dashboard/outbounds', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            updateOutboundsTable(data);
        })
        .fail(function() {
            $('#outbound-health-body').html(
                '' +
                'Unable to load outbound health data'
            );
        });
}

/**
 * Update outbound health check table
 */
function updateOutboundsTable(data) {
    var outbounds = data.outbounds || [];
    var $tbody = $('#outbound-health-body');

    if (outbounds.length === 0) {
        $tbody.html('' +
            'No outbounds configured');
        return;
    }

    var html = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < outbounds.length; i++) {
        var ob = outbounds[i];
        var latencyClass = 'outbound-latency-good';
        var latencyText = ob.latency ? ob.latency + ' ms' : '--';

        if (ob.latency) {
            if (ob.latency > 500) latencyClass = 'outbound-latency-bad';
            else if (ob.latency > 200) latencyClass = 'outbound-latency-medium';
        }

        var statusBadge = '';
        if (!ob.alive) {
            statusBadge = '';
            latencyClass = 'outbound-latency-bad';
            latencyText = 'timeout';
        } else if (ob.latency === null || ob.latency === undefined) {
            statusBadge = '?';
        }

        html += '';
        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(ob.name) + '';
        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(ob.type) + '';
        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(ob.server || '--') + '';
        html += '' + latencyText + '';
        html += '' + statusBadge + '';
        html += '';
    }
    $tbody.html(html);
}

/**
 * Service control functions
 */
function startService() {
    $('#btn-start').prop('disabled', true);
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/start', 'POST', {})
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('sing-box service started');
            setTimeout(loadDashboard, 1000);
        })
        .always(function() {
            $('#btn-start').prop('disabled', false);
        });
}

function stopService() {
    $('#btn-stop').prop('disabled', true);
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/stop', 'POST', {})
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('sing-box service stopped');
            setTimeout(loadDashboard, 1000);
        })
        .always(function() {
            $('#btn-stop').prop('disabled', false);
        });
}

function restartService() {
    $('#btn-restart').prop('disabled', true);
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/restart', 'POST', {})
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('sing-box service restarted');
            setTimeout(loadDashboard, 2000);
        })
        .always(function() {
            $('#btn-restart').prop('disabled', false);
        });
}

function reloadService() {
    $('#btn-reload').prop('disabled', true);
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/reload', 'POST', {})
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('sing-box configuration reloaded');
        })
        .always(function() {
            $('#btn-reload').prop('disabled', false);
        });
}

function generateConfig() {
    $('#btn-generate').prop('disabled', true);
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/generate', 'POST', {})
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Configuration generated successfully');
        })
        .always(function() {
            $('#btn-generate').prop('disabled', false);
        });
}

function validateConfig() {
    var $result = $('#validation-result');
    $result.html(' Validating...');

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/validate', 'POST', {})
        .done(function(data) {
            if (data.valid) {
                $result.html('
 ' +
                    'Configuration is valid.
');
            } else {
                $result.html('
 ' +
                    'Configuration is invalid: ' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data.message || 'Unknown error') + '
');
            }
        })
        .fail(function() {
            $result.html('
 ' +
                'Validation failed. Check server connection.
');
        });
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/www/js/sing-box/dns.js} ~~~~
/**
 * dns.js - sing-box DNS Configuration
 * Handles DNS servers, DNS rules, FakeIP settings, and hosts management.
 */

var dnsServersTable = null;
var dnsRulesTable = null;
var deleteUuid = null;
var deleteType = null; // 'server' or 'rule'

$(document).ready(function() {
    initTables();
    loadDnsServers();
    loadDnsRules();
    loadFakeIPSettings();
    loadHosts();
});

/**
 * Initialize DataTables
 */
function initTables() {
    dnsServersTable = $('#dns-servers-table').DataTable({
        dom: 't',
        columns: [
            { data: 'tag',
              render: function(data) {
                  return SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data || '--');
              }
            },
            { data: 'address',
              render: function(data) {
                  return '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data) + '';
              }
            },
            { data: 'strategy',
              render: function(data) {
                  return data ? SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data) : 'default';
              }
            },
            { data: 'detour',
              render: function(data) {
                  return data ? SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data) : '--';
              }
            },
            { data: 'enabled',
              className: 'text-center',
              render: function(data) {
                  return data === '1' || data === true || data === 'true'
                      ? ''
                      : '';
              }
            },
            { data: 'uuid',
              orderable: false,
              className: 'table-actions',
              render: function(data, type, row) {
                  return '' +
                         '';
              }
            }
        ],
        order: [[0, 'asc']],
        language: { emptyTable: 'No DNS servers configured' }
    });

    dnsRulesTable = $('#dns-rules-table').DataTable({
        dom: 't',
        columns: [
            { data: 'rule_type',
              render: function(data) {
                  return '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data) + '';
              }
            },
            { data: 'value',
              render: function(data) {
                  return '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data) + '';
              }
            },
            { data: 'server',
              render: function(data) {
                  return SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data || '--');
              }
            },
            { data: 'enabled',
              className: 'text-center',
              render: function(data) {
                  return data === '1' || data === true || data === 'true'
                      ? ''
                      : '';
              }
            },
            { data: 'uuid',
              orderable: false,
              className: 'table-actions',
              render: function(data, type, row) {
                  return '' +
                         '';
              }
            }
        ],
        order: [[0, 'asc']],
        language: { emptyTable: 'No DNS rules configured' }
    });
}

/**
 * Load DNS servers
 */
function loadDnsServers() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dns/servers', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var servers = data.rows || [];
            if (dnsServersTable) {
                dnsServersTable.clear().rows.add(servers).draw();
            }
        });
}

/**
 * Load DNS rules
 */
function loadDnsRules() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dns/rules', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var rules = data.rows || [];
            if (dnsRulesTable) {
                dnsRulesTable.clear().rows.add(rules).draw();
            }
        });
}

/**
 * Load FakeIP settings
 */
function loadFakeIPSettings() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dns/fakeip', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            if (data.fakeip_enabled !== undefined) {
                $('#fakeip-enabled').prop('checked', data.fakeip_enabled === '1' || data.fakeip_enabled === true || data.fakeip_enabled === 'true');
            }
            if (data.fakeip_inet4_range) {
                $('#fakeip-inet4-range').val(data.fakeip_inet4_range);
            }
            if (data.fakeip_inet6_range) {
                $('#fakeip-inet6-range').val(data.fakeip_inet6_range);
            }
        });
}

/**
 * Load hosts
 */
function loadHosts() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dns/hosts', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            if (data.hosts) {
                $('#dns-hosts').val(data.hosts);
            }
        });
}

/**
 * Open modal for adding/editing DNS server
 */
function openServerModal() {
    deleteUuid = null;
    $('#dns-server-modal-title').text('Add DNS Server');
    $('#dns-server-form')[0].reset();
    $('#dns-server-uuid').val('');
    $('#dns-server-enabled').prop('checked', true);
    $('#dns-server-modal').modal('show');
}

/**
 * Edit DNS server
 */
function editDnsServer(uuid) {
    deleteUuid = uuid;
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dns/server?uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(uuid), 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var server = data.server || data;
            $('#dns-server-modal-title').text('Edit DNS Server');
            $('#dns-server-uuid').val(uuid);
            $('#dns-server-enabled').prop('checked', server.enabled !== '0');
            $('#dns-server-tag').val(server.tag || '');
            $('#dns-server-address').val(server.address || '');
            $('#dns-server-address_resolver').val(server.address_resolver || '');
            $('#dns-server-address_strategy').val(server.address_strategy || '');
            $('#dns-server-strategy').val(server.strategy || '');
            $('#dns-server-detour').val(server.detour || '');
            $('#dns-server-modal').modal('show');
        });
}

/**
 * Save DNS server
 */
function saveDnsServer() {
    var form = document.getElementById('dns-server-form');
    if (!form.checkValidity || !form.checkValidity()) {
        $('').hide().appendTo(form).click().remove();
        return;
    }

    var data = {
        enabled: $('#dns-server-enabled').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0',
        tag: $('#dns-server-tag').val().trim(),
        address: $('#dns-server-address').val().trim(),
        address_resolver: $('#dns-server-address_resolver').val().trim(),
        address_strategy: $('#dns-server-address_strategy').val(),
        strategy: $('#dns-server-strategy').val(),
        detour: $('#dns-server-detour').val().trim()
    };

    var uuid = $('#dns-server-uuid').val();
    var url = uuid ? 'dns/serverUpdate' : 'dns/serverAdd';
    if (uuid) data.uuid = uuid;

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall(url, 'POST', data)
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess(uuid ? 'DNS server updated' : 'DNS server added');
            $('#dns-server-modal').modal('hide');
            loadDnsServers();
        });
}

/**
 * Open modal for adding/editing DNS rule
 */
function openDnsRuleModal() {
    deleteUuid = null;
    $('#dns-rule-modal-title').text('Add DNS Rule');
    $('#dns-rule-form')[0].reset();
    $('#dns-rule-uuid').val('');
    $('#dns-rule-enabled').prop('checked', true);
    $('#dns-rule-modal').modal('show');
}

/**
 * Edit DNS rule
 */
function editDnsRule(uuid) {
    deleteUuid = uuid;
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dns/rule?uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(uuid), 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var rule = data.rule || data;
            $('#dns-rule-modal-title').text('Edit DNS Rule');
            $('#dns-rule-uuid').val(uuid);
            $('#dns-rule-enabled').prop('checked', rule.enabled !== '0');
            $('#dns-rule-type').val(rule.rule_type || 'domain');
            $('#dns-rule-value').val(rule.value || '');
            $('#dns-rule-server').val(rule.server || '');
            $('#dns-rule-modal').modal('show');
        });
}

/**
 * Save DNS rule
 */
function saveDnsRule() {
    var form = document.getElementById('dns-rule-form');
    if (!form.checkValidity || !form.checkValidity()) {
        $('').hide().appendTo(form).click().remove();
        return;
    }

    var data = {
        enabled: $('#dns-rule-enabled').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0',
        rule_type: $('#dns-rule-type').val(),
        value: $('#dns-rule-value').val().trim(),
        server: $('#dns-rule-server').val().trim()
    };

    var uuid = $('#dns-rule-uuid').val();
    var url = uuid ? 'dns/ruleUpdate' : 'dns/ruleAdd';
    if (uuid) data.uuid = uuid;

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall(url, 'POST', data)
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess(uuid ? 'DNS rule updated' : 'DNS rule added');
            $('#dns-rule-modal').modal('hide');
            loadDnsRules();
        });
}

/**
 * Save FakeIP settings
 */
function saveFakeIPSettings() {
    var data = {
        fakeip_enabled: $('#fakeip-enabled').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0',
        fakeip_inet4_range: $('#fakeip-inet4-range').val().trim(),
        fakeip_inet6_range: $('#fakeip-inet6-range').val().trim()
    };

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dns/fakeip', 'POST', data)
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('FakeIP settings saved');
        });
}

/**
 * Save hosts
 */
function saveHosts() {
    var data = {
        hosts: $('#dns-hosts').val()
    };

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('dns/hosts', 'POST', data)
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Hosts saved');
        });
}

/**
 * Show delete confirmation dialog
 */
function confirmDelete(uuid, type, name) {
    deleteUuid = uuid;
    deleteType = type;
    $('#delete-dns-message').html(
        'Are you sure you want to delete ' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(type) +
        ' ' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(name) + '?'
    );
    $('#delete-dns-modal').modal('show');
    $('#btn-confirm-delete-dns').off('click').on('click', function() {
        $('#delete-dns-modal').modal('hide');
        var url = deleteType === 'server' ? 'dns/serverDelete' : 'dns/ruleDelete';
        SingBoxAPI.apiCall(url, 'POST', { uuid: deleteUuid })
            .done(function() {
                SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Deleted');
                if (deleteType === 'server') loadDnsServers();
                else loadDnsRules();
            });
    });
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/www/js/sing-box/inbounds.js} ~~~~
/**
 * inbounds.js - sing-box Inbounds Management
 * Handles DataTable, CRUD operations for inbound listeners.
 */

var inboundsTable = null;
var deleteInboundUuid = null;

$(document).ready(function() {
    initTable();
    refreshTable();
});

/**
 * Initialize DataTable for inbounds
 */
function initTable() {
    inboundsTable = $('#inbounds-table').DataTable({
        ajax: {
            url: '/api/singbox/inbounds/search',
            dataSrc: 'rows',
            headers: {
                'X-CSRFToken': (typeof SingBoxAPI !== 'undefined' && SingBoxAPI.getCSRFToken) ? SingBoxAPI.getCSRFToken() : (window.CSRFToken || '')
            },
            error: function() {
                SingBoxAPI.showError('Failed to load inbounds data');
            }
        },
        columns: [
            { data: 'name' },
            { data: 'type',
              render: function(data) {
                  var labelClass = 'label-default';
                  if (data === 'tun') labelClass = 'label-primary';
                  else if (data === 'mixed') labelClass = 'label-info';
                  else if (data === 'shadowsocks') labelClass = 'label-warning';
                  return '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data) + '';
              }
            },
            { data: null,
              render: function(data) {
                  var listen = data.listen || '0.0.0.0';
                  var port = data.listen_port || '--';
                  return SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(listen) + ':' + port;
              }
            },
            { data: 'enabled',
              render: function(data) {
                  return data === '1' || data === true || data === 'true'
                      ? 'enabled'
                      : 'disabled';
              }
            },
            { data: 'active_clients',
              render: function(data) {
                  return data !== undefined ? data : '--';
              }
            },
            { data: 'uuid',
              orderable: false,
              className: 'sb-table-actions table-actions',
              render: function(data, type, row) {
                  return '' +
                         '' +
                         '';
              }
            }
        ],
        order: [[0, 'asc']],
        language: {
            emptyTable: 'No inbounds configured',
            zeroRecords: 'No matching inbounds found'
        },
        pageLength: 25
    });
}

/**
 * Refresh the DataTable
 */
function refreshTable() {
    if (inboundsTable) {
        inboundsTable.ajax.reload(null, false);
    }
}

/**
 * Search/filter inbounds
 */
function searchInbounds() {
    var term = $('#search-inbounds').val();
    if (inboundsTable) {
        inboundsTable.search(term).draw();
    }
}

/**
 * Handle inbound type change - show/hide relevant sections
 */
function onInboundTypeChange() {
    var type = $('#inbound-type').val();

    // Hide all sections
    $('.inbound-section').hide();

    // Show sections based on type
    if (type === 'mixed' || type === 'socks' || type === 'http') {
        $('#section-auth').show();
    }
    if (type === 'shadowsocks') {
        $('#section-shadowsocks').show();
    }
    if (type === 'vmess' || type === 'vless' || type === 'trojan') {
        $('#section-users').show();
    }
    if (type === 'tun') {
        $('#section-tun').show();
    }
    if (type === 'hysteria2') {
        $('#section-hysteria2-inbound').show();
    }
}

/**
 * Open modal for adding new inbound
 */
function openModal() {
    deleteInboundUuid = null;
    $('#inbound-modal-title').text('Add Inbound');
    $('#inbound-form')[0].reset();
    $('#inbound-uuid').val('');
    $('#inbound-enabled').prop('checked', true);
    $('#inbound-type').val('mixed');
    onInboundTypeChange();
    $('#inbound-modal').modal('show');
}

/**
 * Edit existing inbound
 */
function editInbound(uuid) {
    deleteInboundUuid = uuid;
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('inbounds/get?uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(uuid), 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var inbound = data.inbound || data;
            $('#inbound-modal-title').text('Edit Inbound');
            $('#inbound-uuid').val(uuid);
            $('#inbound-name').val(inbound.name || '');
            $('#inbound-type').val(inbound.type || 'mixed');
            $('#inbound-enabled').prop('checked', inbound.enabled === '1' || inbound.enabled === true || inbound.enabled === 'true');
            $('#inbound-listen').val(inbound.listen || '0.0.0.0');
            $('#inbound-listen_port').val(inbound.listen_port || '');
            $('#inbound-auth_username').val(inbound.auth_username || '');
            $('#inbound-auth_password').val(inbound.auth_password || '');
            $('#inbound-set_system_proxy').prop('checked', inbound.set_system_proxy === '1' || inbound.set_system_proxy === true);
            $('#inbound-ss_method').val(inbound.ss_method || 'aes-256-gcm');
            $('#inbound-ss_password').val(inbound.ss_password || '');
            $('#inbound-users').val(inbound.users || '');
            $('#inbound-tun_interface_name').val(inbound.tun_interface_name || 'sing0');
            $('#inbound-tun_mtu').val(inbound.tun_mtu || 9000);
            $('#inbound-tun_stack').val(inbound.tun_stack || 'system');
            $('#inbound-tun_gso').prop('checked', inbound.tun_gso === '1' || inbound.tun_gso === true);
            $('#inbound-tun_auto_route').prop('checked', inbound.tun_auto_route !== '0');
            $('#inbound-tun_strict_route').prop('checked', inbound.tun_strict_route !== '0');
            $('#inbound-h2_obfs').val(inbound.h2_obfs || '');
            $('#inbound-h2_obfs_password').val(inbound.h2_obfs_password || '');

            onInboundTypeChange();
            $('#inbound-modal').modal('show');
        })
        .fail(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showError('Failed to load inbound data');
        });
}

/**
 * Save inbound (add or update)
 */
function saveInbound() {
    var form = document.getElementById('inbound-form');
    if (!form.checkValidity || !form.checkValidity()) {
        // Trigger HTML5 validation
        $('').hide().appendTo(form).click().remove();
        return;
    }

    var data = {
        name: $('#inbound-name').val().trim(),
        type: $('#inbound-type').val(),
        enabled: $('#inbound-enabled').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0',
        listen: $('#inbound-listen').val(),
        listen_port: parseInt($('#inbound-listen_port').val()) || null
    };

    // Type-specific fields
    var type = data.type;
    if (type === 'mixed' || type === 'socks' || type === 'http') {
        data.auth_username = $('#inbound-auth_username').val();
        data.auth_password = $('#inbound-auth_password').val();
        data.set_system_proxy = $('#inbound-set_system_proxy').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0';
    }
    if (type === 'shadowsocks') {
        data.ss_method = $('#inbound-ss_method').val();
        data.ss_password = $('#inbound-ss_password').val();
    }
    if (type === 'vmess' || type === 'vless' || type === 'trojan') {
        data.users = $('#inbound-users').val();
    }
    if (type === 'tun') {
        data.tun_interface_name = $('#inbound-tun_interface_name').val();
        data.tun_mtu = parseInt($('#inbound-tun_mtu').val()) || 9000;
        data.tun_stack = $('#inbound-tun_stack').val();
        data.tun_gso = $('#inbound-tun_gso').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0';
        data.tun_auto_route = $('#inbound-tun_auto_route').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0';
        data.tun_strict_route = $('#inbound-tun_strict_route').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0';
    }
    if (type === 'hysteria2') {
        data.h2_obfs = $('#inbound-h2_obfs').val();
        data.h2_obfs_password = $('#inbound-h2_obfs_password').val();
    }

    var uuid = $('#inbound-uuid').val();
    var url = uuid ? 'inbounds/update' : 'inbounds/add';
    if (uuid) {
        data.uuid = uuid;
    }

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall(url, 'POST', data)
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess(uuid ? 'Inbound updated' : 'Inbound added');
            $('#inbound-modal').modal('hide');
            refreshTable();
        });
}

/**
 * Delete inbound
 */
function deleteInbound(uuid, name) {
    $('#delete-inbound-name').text(name);
    $('#delete-modal').modal('show');
    $('#btn-confirm-delete').off('click').on('click', function() {
        $('#delete-modal').modal('hide');
        SingBoxAPI.apiCall('inbounds/delete', 'POST', { uuid: uuid })
            .done(function() {
                SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Inbound deleted');
                refreshTable();
            });
    });
}

/**
 * Toggle inbound enabled/disabled
 */
function toggleInbound(uuid) {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('inbounds/toggle', 'POST', { uuid: uuid })
        .done(function() {
            refreshTable();
        });
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/www/js/sing-box/log.js} ~~~~
/**
 * log.js - sing-box Log Viewer and Connection Monitor
 * Handles LogViewer Vue component, connection table, filters, diagnostics.
 */

var logViewerApp = null;
var connectionRefreshInterval = null;
var connectionTableApp = null;

$(document).ready(function() {
    initLogViewerApp();
    initConnectionTable();
    loadConnections();
    loadOutboundFilter();

    // Auto-refresh connections every 3 seconds
    connectionRefreshInterval = setInterval(loadConnections, 3000);
});

/**
 * Initialize Vue.js app for LogViewer
 */
function initLogViewerApp() {
    if (typeof Vue === 'undefined') {
        console.warn('Vue.js not loaded. Log viewer will not be available.');
        return;
    }
    logViewerApp = Vue.createApp({
        data: function() {
            return {
                logLevel: 'info'
            };
        },
        methods: {
            onLogFilterChange: function(level) {
                this.logLevel = level;
            }
        }
    });
    logViewerApp.component('log-viewer', LogViewer);
    logViewerApp.mount('#log-viewer-app');
}

/**
 * Initialize Connection Table Vue component
 */
function initConnectionTable() {
    if (typeof Vue === 'undefined') return;
    connectionTableApp = Vue.createApp({
        data: function() {
            return {
                connections: []
            };
        },
        methods: {
            onKillConnection: function(connId) {
                killConnection(connId);
            },
            onFilterConnections: function(filters) {
                applyConnectionFilters(filters);
            }
        }
    });
    connectionTableApp.component('connection-table', ConnectionTable);
    // Mount on a hidden div for data management; actual rendering is manual
}

/**
 * Load active connections
 */
function loadConnections() {
    var filters = {
        outbound: $('#conn-filter-outbound').val(),
        ip: $('#conn-filter-ip').val(),
        status: $('#conn-filter-status').val()
    };

    var params = {};
    if (filters.outbound) params.outbound = filters.outbound;
    if (filters.ip) params.ip = filters.ip;
    if (filters.status) params.status = filters.status;

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('log/connections', 'GET', params)
        .done(function(data) {
            var connections = data.connections || [];
            renderConnections(connections);
        })
        .fail(function() {
            // Silently fail on auto-refresh
        });
}

/**
 * Render connections table
 */
function renderConnections(connections) {
    var $tbody = $('#connections-body');

    if (connections.length === 0) {
        $tbody.html('No active connections');
        return;
    }

    var html = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < connections.length; i++) {
        var c = connections[i];
        html += '';
        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(c.time || '--') + '';
        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(c.source || '--') + '';
        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(c.destination || '--') + '';
        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(c.outbound || '--') + '';

        var statusBadge = 'active';
        if (c.status === 'closed') statusBadge = 'closed';
        html += '' + statusBadge + '';

        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.formatBytes(c.download || 0) + '';
        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.formatBytes(c.upload || 0) + '';
        html += '' + SingBoxAPI.formatDuration(c.duration || 0) + '';

        html += '';
        html += '';
        html += '';
        html += '';
    }
    $tbody.html(html);
}

/**
 * Filter connections based on user input
 */
function filterConnections() {
    loadConnections();
}

/**
 * Apply connection filters programmatically
 */
function applyConnectionFilters(filters) {
    if (filters.outbound) $('#conn-filter-outbound').val(filters.outbound);
    if (filters.ip) $('#conn-filter-ip').val(filters.ip);
    if (filters.status) $('#conn-filter-status').val(filters.status);
    loadConnections();
}

/**
 * Load outbound names for filter dropdown
 */
function loadOutboundFilter() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('outbounds/search', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var outbounds = data.rows || [];
            var $select = $('#conn-filter-outbound');
            $select.empty();
            $select.append('');
            for (var i = 0; i < outbounds.length; i++) {
                $select.append('');
            }
        });
}

/**
 * Confirm and kill a connection
 */
function confirmKillConnection(connId, destination) {
    $('#kill-conn-info').text(destination || connId);
    $('#kill-conn-modal').modal('show');
    $('#btn-confirm-kill').off('click').on('click', function() {
        $('#kill-conn-modal').modal('hide');
        killConnection(connId);
    });
}

/**
 * Kill a connection
 */
function killConnection(connId) {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('log/connections/kill', 'POST', { id: connId })
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Connection closed');
            loadConnections();
        });
}

/**
 * Kill all connections
 */
function killAllConnections() {
    SingBoxAPI.confirmDialog('Are you sure you want to close all connections?', function() {
        SingBoxAPI.apiCall('log/connections/kill', 'POST', { all: true })
            .done(function() {
                SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('All connections closed');
                loadConnections();
            });
    });
}

/**
 * Refresh connections manually
 */
function refreshConnections() {
    loadConnections();
}

/**
 * Run traceroute diagnostic
 */
function runTraceroute() {
    var target = $('#traceroute-target').val().trim();
    if (!target) {
        SingBoxAPI.showError('Please enter a target host or IP');
        return;
    }

    var $result = $('#traceroute-result');
    $result.text('Running traceroute to ' + target + '...\n');

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/traceroute', 'POST', { target: target })
        .done(function(data) {
            $result.text(data.output || 'No output');
        })
        .fail(function() {
            $result.text('Traceroute failed. Service may not be available.');
        });
}

/**
 * Run DNS lookup diagnostic
 */
function runDnsLookup() {
    var domain = $('#dnslookup-domain').val().trim();
    if (!domain) {
        SingBoxAPI.showError('Please enter a domain name');
        return;
    }

    var $result = $('#dnslookup-result');
    $result.text('Looking up ' + domain + '...\n');

    var server = $('#dnslookup-server').val().trim();
    var params = { domain: domain };
    if (server) params.server = server;

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/dnslookup', 'GET', params)
        .done(function(data) {
            var output = '';
            if (data.results && data.results.length > 0) {
                for (var i = 0; i < data.results.length; i++) {
                    output += data.results[i] + '\n';
                }
            } else {
                output = 'No results found';
            }
            $result.text(output);
        })
        .fail(function() {
            $result.text('DNS lookup failed. Check server connection.');
        });
}

// Cleanup on page leave
$(window).on('beforeunload', function() {
    if (connectionRefreshInterval) {
        clearInterval(connectionRefreshInterval);
    }
});

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/www/js/sing-box/outbounds.js} ~~~~
/**
 * outbounds.js - sing-box Outbounds Management
 * Handles DataTable, CRUD operations, connection testing for outbounds.
 */

var outboundsTable = null;
var currentOutboundUuid = null;
var outboundFormApp = null;

$(document).ready(function() {
    initTable();
    refreshTable();
    initVueApp();
});

/**
 * Initialize DataTable for outbounds
 */
function initTable() {
    outboundsTable = $('#outbounds-table').DataTable({
        ajax: {
            url: '/api/singbox/outbounds/search',
            dataSrc: 'rows',
            headers: {
                'X-CSRFToken': (typeof SingBoxAPI !== 'undefined' && SingBoxAPI.getCSRFToken) ? SingBoxAPI.getCSRFToken() : (window.CSRFToken || '')
            },
            error: function() {
                SingBoxAPI.showError('Failed to load outbounds data');
            }
        },
        columns: [
            { data: 'name' },
            { data: 'type',
              render: function(data) {
                  return '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data) + '';
              }
            },
            { data: null,
              render: function(data) {
                  var server = data.server || '--';
                  var port = data.server_port || '';
                  return SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(server) + (port ? ':' + port : '');
              }
            },
            { data: 'enabled',
              render: function(data) {
                  return data === '1' || data === true || data === 'true'
                      ? 'enabled'
                      : 'disabled';
              }
            },
            { data: null,
              render: function(data) {
                  var latency = data.latency;
                  if (latency === null || latency === undefined) return '--';
                  var cls = latency > 500 ? 'outbound-latency-bad' : (latency > 200 ? 'outbound-latency-medium' : 'outbound-latency-good');
                  return '' + latency + ' ms';
              }
            },
            { data: 'uuid',
              orderable: false,
              className: 'sb-table-actions table-actions',
              render: function(data, type, row) {
                  return '' +
                         '' +
                         '' +
                         '';
              }
            }
        ],
        order: [[0, 'asc']],
        language: {
            emptyTable: 'No outbounds configured',
            zeroRecords: 'No matching outbounds found'
        },
        pageLength: 25
    });
}

/**
 * Initialize Vue.js app for the outbound form component
 */
function initVueApp() {
    if (typeof Vue === 'undefined') {
        console.warn('Vue.js not loaded. Outbound form will not be available.');
        return;
    }
    outboundFormApp = Vue.createApp({
        data: function() {
            return {
                currentOutbound: null
            };
        },
        methods: {
            saveOutbound: function(data) {
                saveOutboundData(data);
            },
            closeModal: function() {
                $('#outbound-modal').modal('hide');
            }
        }
    });
    outboundFormApp.component('outbound-form', OutboundForm);
    outboundFormApp.mount('#outbound-form-app');
}

/**
 * Refresh the DataTable
 */
function refreshTable() {
    if (outboundsTable) {
        outboundsTable.ajax.reload(null, false);
    }
}

/**
 * Search/filter outbounds
 */
function searchOutbounds() {
    var term = $('#search-outbounds').val();
    if (outboundsTable) {
        outboundsTable.search(term).draw();
    }
}

/**
 * Open modal for adding new outbound
 */
function openModal() {
    currentOutboundUuid = null;
    $('#outbound-modal-title').text('Add Outbound');
    if (outboundFormApp) {
        outboundFormApp.currentOutbound = null;
    }
    $('#outbound-modal').modal('show');
}

/**
 * Edit existing outbound
 */
function editOutbound(uuid) {
    currentOutboundUuid = uuid;
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('outbounds/get?uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(uuid), 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            $('#outbound-modal-title').text('Edit Outbound');
            if (outboundFormApp) {
                outboundFormApp.currentOutbound = data.outbound || data;
            }
            $('#outbound-modal').modal('show');
        })
        .fail(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showError('Failed to load outbound data');
        });
}

/**
 * Save outbound data (called from Vue component)
 */
function saveOutboundData(data) {
    var url = currentOutboundUuid ? 'outbounds/update' : 'outbounds/add';
    if (currentOutboundUuid) {
        data.uuid = currentOutboundUuid;
    }

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall(url, 'POST', data)
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess(currentOutboundUuid ? 'Outbound updated' : 'Outbound added');
            $('#outbound-modal').modal('hide');
            refreshTable();
        });
}

/**
 * Delete outbound
 */
function deleteOutbound(uuid, name) {
    $('#delete-outbound-name').text(name);
    $('#delete-modal').modal('show');
    $('#btn-confirm-delete').off('click').on('click', function() {
        $('#delete-modal').modal('hide');
        SingBoxAPI.apiCall('outbounds/delete', 'POST', { uuid: uuid })
            .done(function() {
                SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Outbound deleted');
                refreshTable();
            });
    });
}

/**
 * Toggle outbound enabled/disabled
 */
function toggleOutbound(uuid) {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('outbounds/toggle', 'POST', { uuid: uuid })
        .done(function() {
            refreshTable();
        });
}

/**
 * Test single outbound connection
 */
function testOutbound(uuid) {
    SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Testing outbound...');
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('outbounds/test', 'POST', { uuid: uuid })
        .done(function(data) {
            if (data.success) {
                SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Connection OK - ' + (data.latency || 'OK'));
            } else {
                SingBoxAPI.showError('Connection failed: ' + (data.message || 'Unknown'));
            }
            refreshTable();
        });
}

/**
 * Test all outbounds
 */
function testAllOutbounds() {
    $('#btn-test-all').prop('disabled', true)
        .html(' Testing...');

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('outbounds/testall', 'POST', {})
        .done(function(data) {
            var results = data.results || [];
            var passed = results.filter(function(r) { return r.success; }).length;
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Test complete: ' + passed + '/' + results.length + ' passed');
            refreshTable();
        })
        .always(function() {
            $('#btn-test-all').prop('disabled', false)
                .html(' Test All');
        });
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/www/js/sing-box/rules.js} ~~~~
/**
 * rules.js - sing-box Rules Management
 * Handles rule table with drag-and-drop priority ordering and CRUD operations.
 */

var rulesTable = null;
var rulesList = [];
var deleteRuleUuid = null;
var ruleEditorApp = null;

$(document).ready(function() {
    initTable();
    loadRules();
    initVueApp();
    initDragAndDrop();
    loadOutboundOptions();
});

/**
 * Initialize Vue.js app for the rule editor component
 */
function initVueApp() {
    if (typeof Vue === 'undefined') {
        console.warn('Vue.js not loaded. Rule editor will not be available.');
        return;
    }
    ruleEditorApp = Vue.createApp({
        data: function() {
            return {
                rulesList: []
            };
        },
        methods: {
            onRulesSave: function(rules) {
                loadRules(); // Refresh from server
            },
            onRulesReorder: function(rules) {
                updatePriority(rules);
            }
        }
    });
    ruleEditorApp.component('rule-editor', RuleEditor);
    ruleEditorApp.mount('#rule-editor-app');
}

/**
 * Initialize DataTable for rules
 */
function initTable() {
    rulesTable = $('#rules-table').DataTable({
        dom: 't', // No built-in controls (we have custom ones)
        ajax: {
            url: '/api/singbox/rules/search',
            dataSrc: 'rows',
            headers: {
                'X-CSRFToken': (typeof SingBoxAPI !== 'undefined' && SingBoxAPI.getCSRFToken) ? SingBoxAPI.getCSRFToken() : (window.CSRFToken || '')
            },
            error: function() {
                SingBoxAPI.showError('Failed to load rules data');
            }
        },
        columns: [
            { orderable: false,
              className: 'drag-handle',
              render: function() {
                  return '';
              }
            },
            { data: 'priority',
              className: 'text-center',
              render: function(data) {
                  return '' + data + '';
              }
            },
            { data: 'description',
              render: function(data) {
                  return SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data || '--');
              }
            },
            { data: 'rule_type',
              render: function(data) {
                  var typeClass = 'rule-type-' + data;
                  return '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data) + '';
              }
            },
            { data: 'value',
              render: function(data) {
                  return '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data) + '';
              }
            },
            { data: null,
              render: function(data) {
                  var action = data.action || 'direct';
                  var badgeClass = action === 'direct' ? 'sb-badge-active' : (action === 'reject' ? 'sb-badge-disabled' : 'badge-warning');
                  var outbound = data.action_outbound ? ' (' + data.action_outbound + ')' : '';
                  return '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(action) + '' +
                         (outbound ? '' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(outbound) + '' : '');
              }
            },
            { data: 'enabled',
              className: 'text-center',
              render: function(data) {
                  return data === '1' || data === true || data === 'true'
                      ? ''
                      : '';
              }
            },
            { data: 'uuid',
              orderable: false,
              className: 'sb-table-actions table-actions',
              render: function(data, type, row) {
                  return '' +
                         '';
              }
            }
        ],
        order: [[1, 'asc']],
        language: {
            emptyTable: 'No rules configured'
        },
        createdRow: function(row, data) {
            $(row).attr('data-uuid', data.uuid);
            $(row).attr('data-priority', data.priority);
            $(row).addClass('rule-row');
        }
    });
}

/**
 * Load rules from API
 */
function loadRules() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('rules/search', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            rulesList = data.rows || [];
            if (rulesTable) {
                rulesTable.clear().rows.add(rulesList).draw();
            }
            if (ruleEditorApp) {
                ruleEditorApp.rulesList = rulesList;
            }
            if (rulesList.length === 0) {
                $('#rules-empty').show();
            } else {
                $('#rules-empty').hide();
            }
        })
        .fail(function() {
            rulesList = [];
            if (rulesTable) rulesTable.clear().draw();
        });
}

/**
 * Initialize HTML5 drag-and-drop for rule rows
 */
function initDragAndDrop() {
    var $tbody = $('#rules-body');
    var draggedRow = null;

    $tbody.on('dragstart', 'tr', function(e) {
        draggedRow = this;
        $(this).addClass('dragging');
        e.originalEvent.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
        e.originalEvent.dataTransfer.setData('text/html', this.outerHTML);
    });

    $tbody.on('dragend', 'tr', function() {
        $(this).removeClass('dragging');
        $('tr').removeClass('drag-over');
        draggedRow = null;
    });

    $tbody.on('dragover', 'tr', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.originalEvent.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
        if (this !== draggedRow) {
            $(this).addClass('drag-over');
        }
    });

    $tbody.on('dragleave', 'tr', function() {
        $(this).removeClass('drag-over');
    });

    $tbody.on('drop', 'tr', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        $(this).removeClass('drag-over');
        if (draggedRow && this !== draggedRow) {
            // Reorder in DOM
            var $dragged = $(draggedRow);
            var $target = $(this);
            if ($dragged.index() < $target.index()) {
                $target.after($dragged);
            } else {
                $target.before($dragged);
            }
            // Update priorities
            rebuildPriorities();
        }
    });

    // Make rows draggable
    $tbody.on('mousedown', '.drag-handle', function() {
        $(this).closest('tr').attr('draggable', 'true');
    });

    $tbody.on('mouseup', '.drag-handle', function() {
        $(this).closest('tr').attr('draggable', 'false');
    });
}

/**
 * Rebuild priorities from current DOM order and send to API
 */
function rebuildPriorities() {
    var newOrder = [];
    $('#rules-body tr').each(function(index) {
        var uuid = $(this).data('uuid');
        if (uuid) {
            newOrder.push({ uuid: uuid, priority: index + 1 });
        }
    });
    updatePriority(newOrder);
}

/**
 * Send updated priorities to API
 */
function updatePriority(rules) {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('rules/reorder', 'POST', { rules: rules })
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Rule order updated');
            loadRules(); // Refresh to confirm
        });
}

/**
 * Search/filter rules
 */
function searchRules() {
    var term = $('#search-rules').val();
    if (rulesTable) {
        rulesTable.search(term).draw();
    }
}

/**
 * Open modal for adding a new rule
 */
function openModal() {
    deleteRuleUuid = null;
    $('#rule-modal-title').text('Add Rule');
    $('#rule-form')[0].reset();
    $('#rule-uuid').val('');
    $('#rule-priority').val('');
    $('#rule-enabled').prop('checked', true);
    $('#rule-invert').prop('checked', false);
    $('#rule-action-outbound-group').hide();
    onRuleTypeChange();
    $('#rule-modal').modal('show');
}

/**
 * Edit existing rule
 */
function editRule(uuid) {
    deleteRuleUuid = uuid;
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('rules/get?uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(uuid), 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var rule = data.rule || data;
            $('#rule-modal-title').text('Edit Rule');
            $('#rule-uuid').val(uuid);
            $('#rule-priority').val(rule.priority || '');
            $('#rule-enabled').prop('checked', rule.enabled === '1' || rule.enabled === true || rule.enabled === 'true');
            $('#rule-description').val(rule.description || '');
            $('#rule-type').val(rule.rule_type || 'domain');
            $('#rule-value').val(rule.value || '');
            $('#rule-action').val(rule.action || 'direct');
            $('#rule-action-outbound').val(rule.action_outbound || '');
            $('#rule-invert').prop('checked', rule.invert === '1' || rule.invert === true || rule.invert === 'true');
            onRuleTypeChange();
            onRuleActionChange();
            $('#rule-modal').modal('show');
        })
        .fail(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showError('Failed to load rule data');
        });
}

/**
 * Save rule (add or update)
 */
function saveRule() {
    var form = document.getElementById('rule-form');
    if (!form.checkValidity || !form.checkValidity()) {
        $('').hide().appendTo(form).click().remove();
        return;
    }

    var data = {
        enabled: $('#rule-enabled').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0',
        description: $('#rule-description').val().trim(),
        rule_type: $('#rule-type').val(),
        value: $('#rule-value').val().trim(),
        action: $('#rule-action').val(),
        action_outbound: $('#rule-action-outbound').val() || '',
        invert: $('#rule-invert').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0'
    };

    var uuid = $('#rule-uuid').val();
    var url = uuid ? 'rules/update' : 'rules/add';
    if (uuid) {
        data.uuid = uuid;
    }

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall(url, 'POST', data)
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess(uuid ? 'Rule updated' : 'Rule added');
            $('#rule-modal').modal('hide');
            loadRules();
        });
}

/**
 * Delete rule
 */
function deleteRule(uuid, description) {
    $('#delete-rule-desc').text(description || uuid);
    $('#delete-rule-modal').modal('show');
    $('#btn-confirm-delete-rule').off('click').on('click', function() {
        $('#delete-rule-modal').modal('hide');
        SingBoxAPI.apiCall('rules/delete', 'POST', { uuid: uuid })
            .done(function() {
                SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Rule deleted');
                loadRules();
            });
    });
}

/**
 * Handle rule type change - update help text
 */
function onRuleTypeChange() {
    var type = $('#rule-type').val();
    var helpText = '';

    switch(type) {
        case 'domain':
            helpText = 'Exact domain match, e.g. google.com';
            break;
        case 'domain_suffix':
            helpText = 'Match domain suffix, e.g. google.com matches www.google.com';
            break;
        case 'domain_keyword':
            helpText = 'Match domain containing keyword, e.g. google';
            break;
        case 'ip_cidr':
            helpText = 'IP CIDR range, e.g. 192.168.1.0/24 or 10.0.0.0/8';
            break;
        case 'port':
            helpText = 'Port number or range, e.g. 80 or 443,8080';
            break;
        case 'protocol':
            helpText = 'Network protocol, e.g. http, tls, bittorrent';
            break;
        case 'process_name':
            helpText = 'Process name (client-side only), e.g. chrome.exe';
            break;
        case 'rule_set':
            helpText = 'Tag of a configured rule set';
            break;
        case 'geoip':
            helpText = 'ISO country code, e.g. CN, US, RU';
            break;
        case 'geosite':
            helpText = 'Geosite category, e.g. category-ads, google';
            break;
    }

    $('#rule-value-help').text(helpText);
}

/**
 * Handle rule action change - show/hide outbound selector
 */
function onRuleActionChange() {
    var action = $('#rule-action').val();
    if (action === 'outbound') {
        $('#rule-action-outbound-group').show();
    } else {
        $('#rule-action-outbound-group').hide();
    }
}

/**
 * Load outbound names for the action dropdown
 */
function loadOutboundOptions() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('outbounds/search', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var outbounds = data.rows || [];
            var $select = $('#rule-action-outbound');
            $select.empty();
            $select.append('');
            for (var i = 0; i < outbounds.length; i++) {
                $select.append('');
            }
        });
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {src/www/js/sing-box/settings.js} ~~~~
/**
 * settings.js - sing-box General Settings
 * Handles settings form, backup/restore, updates, import/export, cron jobs.
 */

$(document).ready(function() {
    loadSettings();
    checkVersions();
});

/**
 * Load general settings from API
 */
function loadSettings() {
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('settings/get', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var settings = data.settings || data;

            // Apply to form
            if (settings.enabled !== undefined) {
                $('#setting-enabled').prop('checked', settings.enabled === '1' || settings.enabled === true || settings.enabled === 'true');
            }
            if (settings.loglevel) {
                $('#setting-loglevel').val(settings.loglevel);
            }
            if (settings.logoutput) {
                $('#setting-logoutput').val(settings.logoutput);
            }
            if (settings.logtimestamp !== undefined) {
                $('#setting-logtimestamp').prop('checked', settings.logtimestamp !== '0');
            }
            if (settings.experimental_api_enabled !== undefined) {
                $('#setting-api-enabled').prop('checked', settings.experimental_api_enabled !== '0');
            }
            if (settings.experimental_api_port) {
                $('#setting-api-port').val(settings.experimental_api_port);
            }
            if (settings.experimental_api_secret !== undefined) {
                $('#setting-api-secret').val(settings.experimental_api_secret);
            }
            if (settings.experimental !== undefined) {
                $('#setting-experimental').prop('checked', settings.experimental === '1' || settings.experimental === true);
            }
        })
        .fail(function() {
            console.warn('Failed to load settings');
        });
}

/**
 * Save general settings
 */
function saveSettings() {
    var data = {
        enabled: $('#setting-enabled').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0',
        loglevel: $('#setting-loglevel').val(),
        logoutput: $('#setting-logoutput').val().trim(),
        logtimestamp: $('#setting-logtimestamp').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0',
        experimental_api_enabled: $('#setting-api-enabled').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0',
        experimental_api_port: parseInt($('#setting-api-port').val()) || 9090,
        experimental_api_secret: $('#setting-api-secret').val(),
        experimental: $('#setting-experimental').is(':checked') ? '1' : '0'
    };

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('settings/set', 'POST', data)
        .done(function() {
            SingBoxAPI.showSuccess('Settings saved');
        });
}

/**
 * Check current and latest sing-box versions
 */
function checkVersions() {
    // Current version
    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/version', 'GET')
        .done(function(data) {
            var version = data.version || 'Unknown';
            $('#current-version').html('' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(version) + '');
        })
        .fail(function() {
            $('#current-version').html('' + 'Not installed' + '');
        });

    // Latest version (from GitHub)
    $.ajax({
        url: 'https://api.github.com/repos/SagerNet/sing-box/releases/latest',
        type: 'GET',
        dataType: 'json',
        timeout: 10000
    })
    .done(function(data) {
        var version = data.tag_name || 'Unknown';
        $('#latest-version').html('' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(version) + '');
    })
    .fail(function() {
        $('#latest-version').html('' + 'Unable to check' + '');
    });
}

/**
 * Update sing-box binary
 */
function updateSingBox() {
    SingBoxAPI.confirmDialog('This will download and install the latest sing-box binary. Continue?', function() {
        $('#btn-update-binary').prop('disabled', true)
            .html(' Updating...');
        $('#update-progress').show();
        $('#update-status').hide();

        SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/update', 'POST', {})
            .done(function(data) {
                $('#update-status').removeClass('alert-danger').addClass('alert-success')
                    .html(' ' + 'Update successful: ' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data.version || '')).show();
                checkVersions();
            })
            .fail(function(xhr) {
                var msg = 'Update failed';
                try {
                    var resp = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText);
                    msg = resp.message || msg;
                } catch(e) {}
                $('#update-status').removeClass('alert-success').addClass('alert-danger')
                    .html(' ' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(msg)).show();
            })
            .always(function() {
                $('#btn-update-binary').prop('disabled', false)
                    .html(' ' + 'Update sing-box');
                $('#update-progress').hide();
            });
    });
}

/**
 * Backup current configuration
 */
function backupNow() {
    var $btn = $('button[onclick="backupNow()"]');
    $btn.prop('disabled', true);
    $('#backup-status').hide();

    SingBoxAPI.apiCall('service/backup', 'POST', {})
        .done(function(data) {
            $('#backup-status').removeClass('alert-danger').addClass('alert-success')
                .html(' ' + 'Backup created: ' + SingBoxAPI.escapeHtml(data.path || '')).show();
        })
        .fail(function() {
            $('#backup-status').removeClass('alert-success').addClass('alert-danger')
                .html(' ' + 'Backup failed').show();
        })
        .always(function() {
            $btn.prop('disabled', false);
        });
}

/**
 * List all available backups in a modal dialog
 */
