        $result  = $backend->configdRun(
            'sing-box test-outbound ' . escapeshellarg($uuid)
        );

        $json = json_decode(trim($result), true);
        if ($json !== null) {
            return $json;
        }

        return [
            'status'   => 'success',
            'outbound' => $outboundName,
            'latency'  => null,
            'output'   => trim($result),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/outbounds/testall
     *
     * Test all enabled outbounds.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function testallAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $results = [];
        foreach ($this->model->outbounds->outbound->iterateItems() as $uuid => $outbound) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$outbound->enabled) {
                continue;
            }

            $type = (string)$outbound->type;
            if (in_array($type, ['direct', 'block', 'selector', 'urltest', 'load-balance'], true)) {
                continue;
            }

            $name = (string)$outbound->name;

            $backend = new \OPNsense\Core\Backend();
            $result  = $backend->configdRun(
                'sing-box test-outbound ' . escapeshellarg($uuid)
            );

            $json = json_decode(trim($result), true);
            if ($json !== null) {
                $results[] = array_merge($json, ['uuid' => $uuid, 'name' => $name]);
            } else {
                $results[] = [
                    'uuid'    => $uuid,
                    'name'    => $name,
                    'status'  => 'unknown',
                    'latency' => null,
                    'output'  => trim($result),
                ];
            }
        }

        return [
            'status'  => 'success',
            'results' => $results,
        ];
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Private helpers
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * Apply POST data to an outbound node.
     *
     * @param mixed $node
     * @param array $data
     * @return array Status array
     */
    private function applyOutboundData($node, array $data): array
    {
        $fields = [
            'enabled', 'name', 'type', 'server', 'server_port',
            'uuid', 'flow', 'packet_encoding',
            'alterId', 'security',
            'password',
            'method',
            'obfs', 'obfs_password', 'up_mbps', 'down_mbps',
            'local_address', 'private_key',
            'peer_public_key', 'peer_preshared_key', 'peer_endpoint',
            'peer_allowed_ips', 'peer_persistent_keepalive',
            'tls_enabled', 'tls_server_name', 'tls_insecure', 'tls_alpn',
            'transport_type', 'transport_path', 'transport_host',
            'group_outbounds', 'group_url', 'group_interval', 'group_tolerance',
        ];

        foreach ($fields as $field) {
            if (isset($data[$field])) {
                $node->$field = $data[$field];
            }
        }

        // Validate
        $validationMessages = $this->model->performValidation();
        if (!empty($validationMessages)) {
            $errors = [];
            foreach ($validationMessages as $msg) {
                $errors[] = (string)$msg;
            }
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => implode('; ', $errors)];
        }

        return ['status' => 'success'];
    }

    /**
     * Flatten an outbound model item into a plain array.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @param string $uuid
     * @return array
     */
    private function flattenOutbound($outbound, string $uuid): array
    {
        $row = ['uuid' => $uuid];
        foreach ($outbound->iterateItems() as $key => $value) {
            $row[$key] = (string)$value;
        }
        return $row;
    }
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {work/stage/usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/controllers/OPNsense/SingBox/Api/RulesController.php} ~~~~
model = new SingBox();
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  List / Search
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * GET /api/singbox/rules/search
     *
     * Search rules with optional filtering and pagination.
     * Results are always sorted by priority (ascending).
     *
     * Query params:
     *   - searchPhrase: filter string
     *   - rowCount:     items per page (default 50)
     *   - current:      page number (1-based)
     *   - rule_type:    filter by rule type
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function searchAction()
    {
        $searchPhrase = $this->request->get('searchPhrase', 'striptags', '');
        $rowCount     = (int)$this->request->get('rowCount', 'int', 50);
        $current      = (int)$this->request->get('current', 'int', 1);
        $filterType   = $this->request->get('rule_type', 'striptags', '');

        $allRules = [];
        foreach ($this->model->rules->rule->iterateItems() as $uuid => $rule) {
            $row = $this->flattenRule($rule, $uuid);

            // Apply type filter
            if ($filterType !== '' && $row['rule_type'] !== $filterType) {
                continue;
            }

            // Apply search phrase
            if ($searchPhrase !== '') {
                $phrase = strtolower($searchPhrase);
                $found  = false;
                foreach (['description', 'value', 'action', 'action_outbound'] as $field) {
                    if (stripos((string)($row[$field] ?? ''), $phrase) !== false) {
                        $found = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                if (!$found) {
                    continue;
                }
            }

            $allRules[] = $row;
        }

        // Sort by priority ascending
        usort($allRules, function ($a, $b) {
            return (int)$a['priority'] - (int)$b['priority'];
        });

        $total = count($allRules);

        // Pagination
        $offset = ($current - 1) * $rowCount;
        $page   = array_slice($allRules, $offset, $rowCount);

        return [
            'rows'        => $page,
            'rowCount'    => $rowCount,
            'current'     => $current,
            'total'       => $total,
        ];
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Single item
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * GET /api/singbox/rules/get
     *
     * Return a single rule by UUID.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getAction()
    {
        $uuid = $this->request->get('uuid', 'striptags', '');
        if ($uuid === '' || !isset($this->model->rules->rule->$uuid)) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'Rule not found'];
        }

        $rule = $this->model->rules->rule->$uuid;
        return [
            'status' => 'success',
            'rule'   => $this->flattenRule($rule, $uuid),
        ];
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Create / Update / Delete
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/rules/add
     *
     * Add a new routing rule.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function addAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $node = $this->model->rules->rule->add();
        $result = $this->applyRuleData($node, $this->request->getPost());

        if ($result['status'] !== 'success') {
            return $result;
        }

        $this->model->serializeToConfig();
        Config::getInstance()->save();

        return [
            'status'  => 'success',
            'uuid'    => $node->getAttribute('uuid'),
            'message' => 'Rule added',
        ];
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/rules/update
     *
     * Update an existing rule.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function updateAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $uuid = $this->request->getPost('uuid', 'striptags', '');
        if ($uuid === '' || !isset($this->model->rules->rule->$uuid)) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'Rule not found'];
        }

        $node = $this->model->rules->rule->$uuid;
        $result = $this->applyRuleData($node, $this->request->getPost());

        if ($result['status'] !== 'success') {
            return $result;
        }

        $this->model->serializeToConfig();
        Config::getInstance()->save();

        return ['status' => 'success', 'message' => 'Rule updated'];
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/rules/delete
     *
     * Delete a rule by UUID.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function deleteAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $uuid = $this->request->getPost('uuid', 'striptags', '');
        if ($uuid === '' || !isset($this->model->rules->rule->$uuid)) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'Rule not found'];
        }

        unset($this->model->rules->rule->$uuid);
        $this->model->serializeToConfig();
        Config::getInstance()->save();

        return ['status' => 'success', 'message' => 'Rule deleted'];
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Toggle
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/rules/toggle
     *
     * Toggle a rule enabled/disabled.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function toggleAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $uuid = $this->request->getPost('uuid', 'striptags', '');
        if ($uuid === '' || !isset($this->model->rules->rule->$uuid)) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'Rule not found'];
        }

        $rule    = $this->model->rules->rule->$uuid;
        $current = (bool)(int)$rule->enabled;
        $rule->enabled = $current ? '0' : '1';

        $this->model->serializeToConfig();
        Config::getInstance()->save();

        return [
            'status'  => 'success',
            'enabled' => !$current,
            'message' => 'Rule ' . (!$current ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'),
        ];
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Reorder
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/rules/reorder
     *
     * Reorder rules by updating priorities based on a UUID list.
     * The frontend sends the new order as an array of UUIDs.
     *
     * Request body: { order: ['uuid1', 'uuid2', ...] }
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function reorderAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $order = $this->request->getPost('order');
        if (!is_array($order) || empty($order)) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'Invalid order data'];
        }

        $priority = 1;
        $updated  = 0;

        foreach ($order as $uuid) {
            $uuid = preg_replace('/[^a-f0-9\-]/', '', strtolower((string)$uuid));
            if ($uuid !== '' && isset($this->model->rules->rule->$uuid)) {
                $this->model->rules->rule->$uuid->priority = (string)$priority;
                $priority++;
                $updated++;
            }
        }

        $this->model->serializeToConfig();
        Config::getInstance()->save();

        return [
            'status'  => 'success',
            'message' => sprintf('%d rule(s) reordered', $updated),
        ];
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Private helpers
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * Apply POST data to a rule node.
     *
     * @param mixed $node
     * @param array $data
     * @return array Status array
     */
    private function applyRuleData($node, array $data): array
    {
        $fields = [
            'enabled', 'priority', 'description',
            'rule_type', 'value', 'action', 'action_outbound', 'invert',
        ];

        foreach ($fields as $field) {
            if (isset($data[$field])) {
                $node->$field = $data[$field];
            }
        }

        // Validate
        $validationMessages = $this->model->performValidation();
        if (!empty($validationMessages)) {
            $errors = [];
            foreach ($validationMessages as $msg) {
                $errors[] = (string)$msg;
            }
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => implode('; ', $errors)];
        }

        return ['status' => 'success'];
    }

    /**
     * Flatten a rule model item into a plain array.
     *
     * @param mixed $rule
     * @param string $uuid
     * @return array
     */
    private function flattenRule($rule, string $uuid): array
    {
        $row = ['uuid' => $uuid];
        foreach ($rule->iterateItems() as $key => $value) {
            $row[$key] = (string)$value;
        }
        return $row;
    }
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {work/stage/usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/controllers/OPNsense/SingBox/Api/ServiceController.php} ~~~~
backend = new Backend();
        $this->model   = new SingBox();
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Service lifecycle
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * GET/POST /api/singbox/service/status
     *
     * Returns the current service status (running/stopped).
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function statusAction()
    {
        $isRunning = $this->model->isServiceRunning();
        return [
            'status'      => $isRunning ? 'running' : 'stopped',
            'running'     => $isRunning,
            'pid'         => $isRunning ? $this->getServicePid() : null,
            'enabled'     => (bool)(int)$this->model->general->enabled,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/start
     *
     * Start the sing-box service.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function startAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }
        $result = $this->backend->configdRun('sing-box start');
        return $this->parseBackendResult($result);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/stop
     *
     * Stop the sing-box service.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function stopAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }
        $result = $this->backend->configdRun('sing-box stop');
        return $this->parseBackendResult($result);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/restart
     *
     * Restart the sing-box service.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function restartAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }
        $result = $this->backend->configdRun('sing-box restart');
        return $this->parseBackendResult($result);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/reload
     *
     * Reload sing-box configuration (zero-downtime).
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function reloadAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }
        $result = $this->backend->configdRun('sing-box reload');
        return $this->parseBackendResult($result);
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Config management
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/generate
     *
     * Trigger config.json generation via configd.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function generateAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }
        $result = $this->backend->configdpRun('sing-box generate-config');
        return $this->parseBackendResult($result);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/validate
     *
     * Validate the current sing-box configuration.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function validateAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }
        $result = $this->backend->configdRun('sing-box validate');
        return $this->parseBackendResult($result);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/import
     *
     * Import a sing-box config.json (v1.x or v2.0.0 format) and save settings to config.xml.
     * Accepts either a file upload or raw JSON from a textarea.
     *
     * v2.0.0 format support: outbounds, inbounds, route, dns, experimental, endpoints,
     *                        services, ntp, inbound_providers, outbound_providers.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function importAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $jsonContent = '';

        // Handle file upload
        if ($this->request->hasFiles()) {
            foreach ($this->request->getUploadedFiles() as $file) {
                $jsonContent = file_get_contents($file->getTempName());
                break;
            }
        }

        // Handle raw JSON from textarea (supports both 'config_json' string and 'config' object)
        $rawJson = $this->request->getPost('config_json', 'string', '');
        if ($jsonContent === '' && $rawJson !== '') {
            $jsonContent = $rawJson;
        }

        // Also support 'config' parameter (used by frontend JS)
        if ($jsonContent === '') {
            $configParam = $this->request->getPost('config', null, '');
            if ($configParam !== '' && is_string($configParam)) {
                $jsonContent = $configParam;
            } elseif ($configParam !== '' && is_array($configParam)) {
                $jsonContent = json_encode($configParam);
            }
        }

        if ($jsonContent === '') {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'No configuration data provided'];
        }

        $config = json_decode($jsonContent, true);
        if ($config === null) {
            return [
                'status'  => 'error',
                'message' => 'Invalid JSON: ' . json_last_error_msg(),
            ];
        }

        // --- Validate v2.0.0 structure ---
        $validationResult = $this->validateV2Config($config);
        if ($validationResult !== true) {
            return [
                'status'  => 'error',
                'message' => 'Configuration validation failed: ' . $validationResult,
            ];
        }

        // Detect format version
        $formatVersion = 'unknown';
        if (isset($config['log']['version'])) {
            $formatVersion = (string)$config['log']['version'];
        } elseif ($this->isV2Format($config)) {
            $formatVersion = '2.0';
        }

        // Count items for summary
        $itemCounts = $this->countConfigItems($config);

        // Import via configd script which handles the detailed mapping to config.xml
        $tempFile = tempnam(sys_get_temp_dir(), 'sbimport_');
        file_put_contents($tempFile, $jsonContent);
        $result = $this->backend->configdRun('sing-box import-config ' . escapeshellarg($tempFile));
        @unlink($tempFile);

        $parsed = $this->parseBackendResult($result);

        // Enrich response with import summary
        if ($parsed['status'] === 'success') {
            $parsed['format_version'] = $formatVersion;
            $parsed['import_summary'] = $itemCounts;
        }

        return $parsed;
    }

    /**
     * Validate a v2.0.0 sing-box configuration structure.
     * Returns true if valid, or an error message string if invalid.
     *
     * @param array $config Parsed JSON config
     * @return true|string
     */
    private function validateV2Config(array $config)
    {
        // A valid config must have at least one key section
        $hasKeySection = false;
        $keySections = ['outbounds', 'inbounds', 'route', 'dns', 'endpoints',
                        'services', 'inbound_providers', 'outbound_providers'];
        foreach ($keySections as $section) {
            if (isset($config[$section]) && is_array($config[$section])) {
                $hasKeySection = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (!$hasKeySection) {
            return 'Configuration must contain at least one of: outbounds, inbounds, route, dns, endpoints, services';
        }

        // Validate outbounds structure
        if (isset($config['outbounds'])) {
            if (!is_array($config['outbounds'])) {
                return 'outbounds must be an array';
            }
            foreach ($config['outbounds'] as $i => $ob) {
                if (!is_array($ob) || !isset($ob['type'])) {
                    return 'outbounds[' . $i . '] missing required "type" field';
                }
            }
        }

        // Validate inbounds structure
        if (isset($config['inbounds'])) {
            if (!is_array($config['inbounds'])) {
                return 'inbounds must be an array';
            }
            foreach ($config['inbounds'] as $i => $ib) {
                if (!is_array($ib) || !isset($ib['type'])) {
                    return 'inbounds[' . $i . '] missing required "type" field';
                }
            }
        }

        // Validate route structure
        if (isset($config['route'])) {
            if (!is_array($config['route'])) {
                return 'route must be an object';
            }
            if (isset($config['route']['rules']) && !is_array($config['route']['rules'])) {
                return 'route.rules must be an array';
            }
        }

        // Validate DNS structure
        if (isset($config['dns'])) {
            if (!is_array($config['dns'])) {
                return 'dns must be an object';
            }
            if (isset($config['dns']['servers']) && !is_array($config['dns']['servers'])) {
                return 'dns.servers must be an array';
            }
        }

        // Validate NTP structure
        if (isset($config['ntp'])) {
            if (!is_array($config['ntp'])) {
                return 'ntp must be an object';
            }
            if (!isset($config['ntp']['enabled'])) {
                return 'ntp.enabled is required when NTP section is present';
            }
        }

        // Validate experimental structure
        if (isset($config['experimental'])) {
            if (!is_array($config['experimental'])) {
                return 'experimental must be an object';
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Detect if config follows v2.0 format.
     *
     * @param array $config
     * @return bool
     */
    private function isV2Format(array $config): bool
    {
        // v2.0+ indicators: endpoints, services, inbound_providers, outbound_providers
        $v2Keys = ['endpoints', 'services', 'inbound_providers', 'outbound_providers'];
        foreach ($v2Keys as $key) {
            if (isset($config[$key])) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        // Check for v2 route structure (route.rules is array of objects with 'action')
        if (isset($config['route']['rules']) && is_array($config['route']['rules'])) {
            foreach ($config['route']['rules'] as $rule) {
                if (isset($rule['action'])) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * Count items in each config section for import summary.
     *
     * @param array $config
     * @return array
     */
    private function countConfigItems(array $config): array
    {
        $counts = [];
        $sections = ['outbounds', 'inbounds', 'route_rules', 'dns_servers',
                     'endpoints', 'services', 'inbound_providers', 'outbound_providers'];
        $map = [
            'outbounds'           => 'outbounds',
            'inbounds'            => 'inbounds',
            'route_rules'         => ['route', 'rules'],
            'dns_servers'         => ['dns', 'servers'],
            'endpoints'           => 'endpoints',
            'services'            => 'services',
            'inbound_providers'   => 'inbound_providers',
            'outbound_providers'  => 'outbound_providers',
        ];

        foreach ($map as $key => $path) {
            if (is_string($path)) {
                $counts[$key] = isset($config[$path]) && is_array($config[$path]) ? count($config[$path]) : 0;
            } else {
                $val = $config;
                foreach ($path as $p) {
                    $val = $val[$p] ?? null;
                    if ($val === null) {
                        break;
                    }
                }
                $counts[$key] = is_array($val) ? count($val) : 0;
            }
        }

        return $counts;
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/export
     *
     * Export current config.xml settings as sing-box config.json.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function exportAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $config = $this->model->generateConfigJson();

        return [
            'status' => 'success',
            'config' => $config,
            'json'   => json_encode($config, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES),
        ];
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Sing-box API proxy
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * GET/POST /api/singbox/service/proxy/*
     *
     * Proxy requests to the sing-box experimental API at localhost:9090.
     * This avoids CORS issues by routing through PHP.
     *
     * @param string $path The API path to proxy
     * @return array|string
     */
    public function proxyAction($path = '')
    {
        $apiPort   = (int)(string)$this->model->general->experimental_api_port ?: 9090;
        $apiSecret = (string)$this->model->general->experimental_api_secret;

        // Build target URL from remaining path segments
        $requestPath = $path !== '' ? $path : implode('/', $this->dispatcher->getParams() ?: []);
        $requestPath = ltrim($requestPath, '/');

        // Validate path: only allow alphanumeric, dash, underscore, and forward slash
        if ($requestPath !== '' && !preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-\/]+$/', $requestPath)) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'Invalid proxy path'];
        }

        $targetUrl = sprintf('http://127.0.0.1:%d/%s', $apiPort, $requestPath);

        // Forward query parameters safely via OPNsense request object
        $queryParams = $this->request->getQuery();
        unset($queryParams['_url']); // internal Phalcon routing parameter
        if (!empty($queryParams)) {
            $targetUrl .= '?' . http_build_query($queryParams);
        }

        $ch = curl_init($targetUrl);
        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 30,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => false,
        ]);

        // Add API secret header if configured
        if ($apiSecret !== '') {
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER, [
                'Authorization: Bearer ' . $apiSecret,
            ]);
        }

        // Forward request method and body
        $method = strtoupper($this->request->getMethod());
        if ($method === 'POST') {
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_POST, true);
            $postData = $this->request->getRawBody();
            if ($postData !== false && $postData !== '') {
                curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS, $postData);
            }
        } elseif ($method === 'PUT' || $method === 'PATCH') {
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST, $method);
            $putData = $this->request->getRawBody();
            if ($putData !== false && $putData !== '') {
                curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS, $putData);
            }
        } elseif ($method !== 'GET') {
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST, $method);
        }

        $response = curl_exec($ch);
        $httpCode = (int)curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        $curlErr  = curl_error($ch);
        curl_close($ch);

        if ($response === false) {
            return [
                'status'  => 'error',
                'message' => 'Proxy request failed: ' . $curlErr,
            ];
        }

        // Return raw JSON response for the frontend
        $decoded = json_decode($response, true);
        if ($decoded !== null) {
            $this->response->setContentType('application/json');
            return $decoded;
        }

        return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'Invalid response from sing-box API'];
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Backup / Rollback management
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * GET /api/singbox/service/backups
     *
     * List available backups with metadata.
     * Returns sorted array (newest first) of backup objects.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function backupsAction()
    {
        $backupBase = '/root/sing-box-backup';
        $backups = [];

        if (!is_dir($backupBase)) {
            return ['status' => 'success', 'backups' => $backups];
        }

        $dirs = glob($backupBase . '/sing-box-backup-*', GLOB_ONLYDIR);
        if ($dirs === false) {
            return ['status' => 'success', 'backups' => $backups];
        }

        foreach ($dirs as $dir) {
            $basename = basename($dir);
            // Extract timestamp: sing-box-backup-YYYYMMDDhhmmss
            if (!preg_match('/^sing-box-backup-(\d{14})$/', $basename, $matches)) {
                continue;
            }
            $timestamp = $matches[1];

            // Format date: YYYYMMDDhhmmss -> YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss
            $dateFormatted = sprintf(
                '%s-%s-%s %s:%s:%s',
                substr($timestamp, 0, 4),
                substr($timestamp, 4, 2),
                substr($timestamp, 6, 2),
                substr($timestamp, 8, 2),
                substr($timestamp, 10, 2),
                substr($timestamp, 12, 2)
            );

            // Calculate size
            $size = '0B';
            if (is_dir($dir)) {
                $sizeRaw = @shell_exec('du -sh ' . escapeshellarg($dir) . ' 2>/dev/null');
                if ($sizeRaw !== null) {
                    $size = preg_replace('/\s+.*$/', '', trim($sizeRaw));
                }
            }

            // Detect contents
            $contents = [];
            if (is_file($dir . '/config.json')) {
                $contents[] = 'config';
            }
            if (is_file($dir . '/sing-box')) {
                $contents[] = 'binary';
            }
            if (is_file($dir . '/config.xml.singbox')) {
                $contents[] = 'xml-section';
            }
            if (is_file($dir . '/config.xml.backup')) {
                $contents[] = 'full-xml';
            }
            if (is_dir($dir . '/rule-sets') && count(glob($dir . '/rule-sets/*')) > 0) {
                $contents[] = 'rule-sets';
            }
            if (is_dir($dir . '/controllers')) {
                $contents[] = 'plugin-files';
            }

            $backups[] = [
                'timestamp' => $timestamp,
                'date'      => $dateFormatted,
                'path'      => $dir,
                'size'      => $size,
                'contents'  => $contents,
            ];
        }

        // Sort by timestamp descending (newest first)
        usort($backups, function ($a, $b) {
            return strcmp($b['timestamp'], $a['timestamp']);
        });

        return ['status' => 'success', 'count' => count($backups), 'backups' => $backups];
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/backup
     *
     * Trigger a backup of current sing-box configuration.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function backupAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }
        $result = $this->backend->configdRun('sing-box backup');
        return $this->parseBackendResult($result);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/rollback
     *
     * Rollback sing-box to a previous backup.
     * Accepts optional 'timestamp' parameter to restore specific backup.
     * Without timestamp, restores the latest backup.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function rollbackAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $timestamp = $this->request->getPost('timestamp', 'string', '');
        $cmd = 'sing-box rollback';
        if ($timestamp !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{14}$/', $timestamp)) {
            $cmd .= ' ' . escapeshellarg($timestamp);
        }

        $result = $this->backend->configdRun($cmd);
        $parsed = $this->parseBackendResult($result);

        // Include the restored timestamp in response
        if ($parsed['status'] === 'success') {
            $parsed['restored_timestamp'] = $timestamp !== '' ? $timestamp : 'latest';
        }

        return $parsed;
    }

    /**
     * GET /api/singbox/service/version
     *
     * Get the current sing-box binary version.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function versionAction()
    {
        $output = @shell_exec('/usr/local/bin/sing-box version 2>/dev/null | head -1');
        if ($output !== null && trim($output) !== '') {
            return ['status' => 'success', 'version' => trim($output)];
        }
        return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'sing-box binary not found or not executable'];
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/service/update
     *
     * Update sing-box binary to the latest version.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function updateAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }
        $result = $this->backend->configdRun('sing-box update-binary');
        return $this->parseBackendResult($result);
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Private helpers
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * Get the sing-box service PID from pidfile.
     *
     * @return int|null
     */
    private function getServicePid(): ?int
    {
        $pidFile = '/var/run/sing-box.pid';
        if (!file_exists($pidFile)) {
            return null;
        }
        $pid = (int)trim(file_get_contents($pidFile));
        return $pid > 0 ? $pid : null;
    }

    /**
     * Parse backend configd result into a structured response.
     *
     * @param string $result Raw backend output
     * @return array
     */
    private function parseBackendResult(string $result): array
    {
        $trimmed = trim($result);

        // Try JSON response first
        $json = json_decode($trimmed, true);
        if ($json !== null) {
            return $json;
        }

        // Simple string parsing
        if (stripos($trimmed, 'error') !== false || stripos($trimmed, 'failed') !== false) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => $trimmed];
        }

        if ($trimmed === '' || stripos($trimmed, 'ok') !== false || stripos($trimmed, 'done') !== false) {
            return ['status' => 'success', 'message' => $trimmed ?: 'OK'];
        }

        return ['status' => 'success', 'output' => $trimmed];
    }
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {work/stage/usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/controllers/OPNsense/SingBox/Api/SettingsController.php} ~~~~
model = new SingBox();
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  CRUD operations
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * GET /api/singbox/settings/get
     *
     * Return the current general settings.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getAction()
    {
        return $this->fetchAndReturnSettings();
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/settings/set
     *
     * Save general settings from POST data.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function setAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $result = ['status' => 'success', 'message' => 'Settings saved'];

        $this->model->general->enabled =
            $this->request->getPost('enabled', 'int', (int)(string)$this->model->general->enabled);
        $this->model->general->loglevel =
            $this->request->getPost('loglevel', 'striptags', (string)$this->model->general->loglevel);
        $this->model->general->logoutput =
            $this->request->getPost('logoutput', 'striptags', (string)$this->model->general->logoutput);
        $this->model->general->logtimestamp =
            $this->request->getPost('logtimestamp', 'int', (int)(string)$this->model->general->logtimestamp);
        $this->model->general->experimental_api_enabled =
            $this->request->getPost('experimental_api_enabled', 'int', (int)(string)$this->model->general->experimental_api_enabled);
        $this->model->general->experimental_api_port =
            $this->request->getPost('experimental_api_port', 'int', (int)(string)$this->model->general->experimental_api_port);
        $this->model->general->experimental_api_secret =
            $this->request->getPost('experimental_api_secret', 'striptags', (string)$this->model->general->experimental_api_secret);

        // Validate
        $validationMessages = $this->model->performValidation();
        if (!empty($validationMessages)) {
            $errors = [];
            foreach ($validationMessages as $msg) {
                $errors[] = (string)$msg;
            }
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => implode('; ', $errors)];
        }

        // Save
        $this->model->serializeToConfig();
        Config::getInstance()->save();

        return $result;
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Helpers
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * Fetch general settings and return as a flat array.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function fetchAndReturnSettings(): array
    {
        return [
            'enabled'                    => (string)$this->model->general->enabled,
            'loglevel'                   => (string)$this->model->general->loglevel,
            'logoutput'                  => (string)$this->model->general->logoutput,
            'logtimestamp'               => (string)$this->model->general->logtimestamp,
            'experimental_api_enabled'   => (string)$this->model->general->experimental_api_enabled,
            'experimental_api_port'      => (string)$this->model->general->experimental_api_port,
            'experimental_api_secret'    => (string)$this->model->general->experimental_api_secret,
        ];
    }
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~ {work/stage/usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/controllers/OPNsense/SingBox/Api/TunController.php} ~~~~
model = new SingBox();
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  CRUD operations
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * GET /api/singbox/tun/get
     *
     * Return current TUN settings.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getAction()
    {
        return [
            'status'                     => 'success',
            'enabled'                    => (string)$this->model->tun->enabled,
            'interface_name'             => (string)$this->model->tun->interface_name,
            'mtu'                        => (string)$this->model->tun->mtu,
            'gso'                        => (string)$this->model->tun->gso,
            'auto_route'                 => (string)$this->model->tun->auto_route,
            'strict_route'               => (string)$this->model->tun->strict_route,
            'endpoint_independent_nat'   => (string)$this->model->tun->endpoint_independent_nat,
            'stack'                      => (string)$this->model->tun->stack,
            'inet4_address'             => (string)$this->model->tun->inet4_address,
            'inet6_address'             => (string)$this->model->tun->inet6_address,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/singbox/tun/set
     *
     * Save TUN settings.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function setAction()
    {
        if (!$this->request->isPost()) {
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => 'POST required'];
        }

        $fields = [
            'enabled', 'interface_name', 'mtu', 'gso',
            'auto_route', 'strict_route', 'endpoint_independent_nat',
            'stack', 'inet4_address', 'inet6_address',
        ];

        foreach ($fields as $field) {
            $value = $this->request->getPost($field);
            if ($value !== null) {
                $this->model->tun->$field = $value;
            }
        }

        // Validate
        $validationMessages = $this->model->performValidation();
        if (!empty($validationMessages)) {
            $errors = [];
            foreach ($validationMessages as $msg) {
                $errors[] = (string)$msg;
            }
            return ['status' => 'error', 'message' => implode('; ', $errors)];
        }

        $this->model->serializeToConfig();
        Config::getInstance()->save();

        return ['status' => 'success', 'message' => 'TUN settings saved'];
    }
}

~~~~ {work/stage/usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/models/OPNsense/SingBox/SingBox.php} ~~~~
 (string)$this->general->enabled,
            'loglevel'                   => (string)$this->general->loglevel,
            'logoutput'                  => (string)$this->general->logoutput,
            'logtimestamp'               => (string)$this->general->logtimestamp,
            'experimental_api_enabled'   => (string)$this->general->experimental_api_enabled,
            'experimental_api_port'      => (string)$this->general->experimental_api_port,
            'experimental_api_secret'    => (string)$this->general->experimental_api_secret,
        ];

        // ---- outbounds ----
        $result['outbounds'] = [];
        foreach ($this->outbounds->outbound->iterateItems() as $uuid => $outbound) {
            $result['outbounds'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($outbound);
        }

        // ---- inbounds ----
        $result['inbounds'] = [];
        foreach ($this->inbounds->inbound->iterateItems() as $uuid => $inbound) {
            $result['inbounds'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($inbound);
        }

        // ---- rules ----
        $result['rules'] = [];
        foreach ($this->rules->rule->iterateItems() as $uuid => $rule) {
            $result['rules'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($rule);
        }

        // ---- dns ----
        $result['dns'] = [
            'servers'           => [],
            'rules'             => [],
            'fakeip_enabled'    => (string)$this->dns->fakeip_enabled,
            'fakeip_inet4_range'=> (string)$this->dns->fakeip_inet4_range,
            'fakeip_inet6_range'=> (string)$this->dns->fakeip_inet6_range,
            'hosts'             => (string)$this->dns->hosts,
        ];
        foreach ($this->dns->servers->server->iterateItems() as $uuid => $server) {
            $result['dns']['servers'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($server);
        }
        foreach ($this->dns->rules->dns_rule->iterateItems() as $uuid => $rule) {
            $result['dns']['rules'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($rule);
        }

        // ---- tun ----
        $result['tun'] = [
            'enabled'                     => (string)$this->tun->enabled,
            'interface_name'              => (string)$this->tun->interface_name,
            'mtu'                         => (string)$this->tun->mtu,
            'gso'                         => (string)$this->tun->gso,
            'auto_route'                  => (string)$this->tun->auto_route,
            'strict_route'                => (string)$this->tun->strict_route,
            'endpoint_independent_nat'    => (string)$this->tun->endpoint_independent_nat,
            'stack'                       => (string)$this->tun->stack,
            'inet4_address'              => (string)$this->tun->inet4_address,
            'inet6_address'              => (string)$this->tun->inet6_address,
        ];

        // ---- rule_sets ----
        $result['rule_sets'] = [];
        foreach ($this->rule_sets->rule_set->iterateItems() as $uuid => $ruleSet) {
            $result['rule_sets'][$uuid] = $this->flattenItem($ruleSet);
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * Generate a sing-box compatible config.json structure.
     *
     * @return array The configuration array ready for json_encode()
     */
    public function generateConfigJson(): array
    {
        $cfg = [];

        // ---- log ----
        $cfg['log'] = [
            'level'        => (string)$this->general->loglevel ?: 'info',
            'output'       => (string)$this->general->logoutput ?: '/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log',
            'timestamp'    => (bool)(int)$this->general->logtimestamp,
        ];

        // ---- experimental API ----
        if ((bool)(int)$this->general->experimental_api_enabled) {
            $cfg['experimental'] = [
                'clash_api' => [
                    'external_controller' => '0.0.0.0:' . ((int)$this->general->experimental_api_port ?: 9090),
                    'secret'              => (string)$this->general->experimental_api_secret,
                    'store_selected'      => true,
                ],
            ];
        }

        // ---- DNS ----
        $cfg['dns'] = $this->buildDnsConfig();

        // ---- inbounds ----
        $cfg['inbounds'] = $this->buildInboundsConfig();

        // ---- outbounds ----
        $cfg['outbounds'] = $this->buildOutboundsConfig();

        // ---- route ----
        $cfg['route'] = $this->buildRouteConfig();

        return $cfg;
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Private builders
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * Build DNS configuration section.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildDnsConfig(): array
    {
        $dns = [
            'servers' => [],
            'rules'   => [],
        ];

        // DNS servers
        foreach ($this->dns->servers->server->iterateItems() as $server) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$server->enabled) {
                continue;
            }
            $s = [
                'tag'     => (string)$server->tag,
                'address' => (string)$server->address,
            ];
            if ((string)$server->address_resolver !== '') {
                $s['address_resolver'] = (string)$server->address_resolver;
            }
            if ((string)$server->address_strategy !== '') {
                $s['address_strategy'] = (string)$server->address_strategy;
            }
            if ((string)$server->strategy !== '') {
                $s['strategy'] = (string)$server->strategy;
            }
            if ((string)$server->detour !== '') {
                $s['detour'] = (string)$server->detour;
            }
            $dns['servers'][] = $s;
        }

        // DNS rules
        foreach ($this->dns->rules->dns_rule->iterateItems() as $rule) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$rule->enabled) {
                continue;
            }
            $r = [];
            $type  = (string)$rule->rule_type;
            $value = (string)$rule->value;
            if ($type !== '' && $value !== '') {
                $r[$type] = $this->parseCommaList($value);
            }
            if ((string)$rule->server !== '') {
                $r['server'] = (string)$rule->server;
            }
            if (!empty($r)) {
                $dns['rules'][] = $r;
            }
        }

        // FakeIP
        if ((bool)(int)$this->dns->fakeip_enabled) {
            $dns['fakeip'] = [
                'enabled'    => true,
                'inet4_range'=> (string)$this->dns->fakeip_inet4_range ?: '198.18.0.0/15',
                'inet6_range'=> (string)$this->dns->fakeip_inet6_range ?: 'fc00::/18',
            ];
        }

        return $dns;
    }

    /**
     * Build inbounds configuration section.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildInboundsConfig(): array
    {
        $inbounds = [];

        foreach ($this->inbounds->inbound->iterateItems() as $inbound) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$inbound->enabled) {
                continue;
            }

            $type = (string)$inbound->type;
            $item = [
                'type' => $type,
                'tag'  => (string)$inbound->name,
            ];

            // Common listen settings
            if (!in_array($type, ['tun'], true)) {
                $item['listen']      = (string)$inbound->listen ?: '0.0.0.0';
                $item['listen_port'] = (int)(string)$inbound->listen_port;
            }

            switch ($type) {
                case 'tun':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildTunInbound($inbound));
                    break;

                case 'mixed':
                case 'socks':
                case 'http':
                    if ((string)$inbound->auth_username !== '') {
                        $item['users'] = [[
                            'username' => (string)$inbound->auth_username,
                            'password' => (string)$inbound->auth_password,
                        ]];
                    }
                    if ($type === 'mixed') {
                        $item['set_system_proxy'] = (bool)(int)$inbound->set_system_proxy;
                    }
                    break;

                case 'shadowsocks':
                    $item['method']   = (string)$inbound->ss_method;
                    $item['password'] = (string)$inbound->ss_password;
                    break;

                case 'vmess':
                case 'vless':
                case 'trojan':
                    $users = $this->parseUsersJson((string)$inbound->users);
                    if (!empty($users)) {
                        $item['users'] = $users;
                    }
                    break;

                case 'hysteria2':
                    if ((string)$inbound->h2_obfs !== '') {
                        $item['obfs'] = [
                            'type'     => (string)$inbound->h2_obfs,
                            'password' => (string)$inbound->h2_obfs_password,
                        ];
                    }
                    $users = $this->parseUsersJson((string)$inbound->users);
                    if (!empty($users)) {
                        $item['users'] = $users;
                    }
                    break;
            }

            $inbounds[] = $item;
        }

        return $inbounds;
    }

    /**
     * Build TUN-specific inbound settings.
     *
     * @param mixed $inbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildTunInbound($inbound): array
    {
        $tun = [
            'interface_name'              => (string)$inbound->tun_interface_name ?: (string)$this->tun->interface_name ?: 'sing0',
            'mtu'                         => (int)((string)$inbound->tun_mtu ?: (string)$this->tun->mtu ?: 9000),
            'gso'                         => (bool)(int)($inbound->tun_gso ?: $this->tun->gso ?: 0),
            'auto_route'                  => (bool)(int)($inbound->tun_auto_route ?: $this->tun->auto_route ?: 1),
            'strict_route'                => (bool)(int)($inbound->tun_strict_route ?: $this->tun->strict_route ?: 1),
            'endpoint_independent_nat'    => (bool)(int)($inbound->tun_endpoint_independent_nat ?: $this->tun->endpoint_independent_nat ?: 0),
            'stack'                       => (string)$inbound->tun_stack ?: (string)$this->tun->stack ?: 'system',
            'inet4_address'              => (string)$this->tun->inet4_address ?: '172.19.0.1/30',
            'inet6_address'              => (string)$this->tun->inet6_address ?: 'fdfe:dcba:9876::1/126',
        ];
        return $tun;
    }

    /**
     * Build outbounds configuration section.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildOutboundsConfig(): array
    {
        $outbounds = [];

        foreach ($this->outbounds->outbound->iterateItems() as $outbound) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$outbound->enabled) {
                continue;
            }

            $type = (string)$outbound->type;
            $item = [
                'type' => $type,
                'tag'  => (string)$outbound->name,
            ];

            switch ($type) {
                case 'vless':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildVlessOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'vmess':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildVmessOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'trojan':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildTrojanOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'shadowsocks':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildShadowsocksOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'hysteria2':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildHysteria2Outbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'wireguard':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildWireGuardOutbound($outbound));
                    break;

                case 'selector':
                case 'urltest':
                case 'load-balance':
                    $item = array_merge($item, $this->buildGroupOutbound($outbound, $type));
                    break;

                case 'direct':
                    // direct has no extra settings
                    break;

                case 'block':
                    // block has no extra settings
                    break;
            }

            $outbounds[] = $item;
        }

        // Ensure 'direct' and 'block' outbounds exist if referenced
        $this->ensureDefaultOutbounds($outbounds);

        return $outbounds;
    }

    /**
     * Build VLESS outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildVlessOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'         => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port'    => (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'uuid'           => (string)$outbound->uuid,
            'flow'           => (string)$outbound->flow,
            'packet_encoding'=> (string)$outbound->packet_encoding ?: 'xudp',
        ];

        // Remove empty optional fields
        if ($item['flow'] === '') {
            unset($item['flow']);
        }

        // TLS
        $tls = $this->buildTlsConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($tls)) {
            $item['tls'] = $tls;
        }

        // Transport
        $transport = $this->buildTransportConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($transport)) {
            $item['transport'] = $transport;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build VMess outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildVmessOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'    => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port'=> (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'uuid'      => (string)$outbound->uuid,
            'security'  => (string)$outbound->security ?: 'auto',
            'alter_id'  => (int)(string)$outbound->alterId,
        ];

        // TLS
        $tls = $this->buildTlsConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($tls)) {
            $item['tls'] = $tls;
        }

        // Transport
        $transport = $this->buildTransportConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($transport)) {
            $item['transport'] = $transport;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build Trojan outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildTrojanOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'      => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port' => (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'password'    => (string)$outbound->password,
        ];

        // TLS
        $tls = $this->buildTlsConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($tls)) {
            $item['tls'] = $tls;
        }

        // Transport
        $transport = $this->buildTransportConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($transport)) {
            $item['transport'] = $transport;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build Shadowsocks outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildShadowsocksOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'      => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port' => (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'method'      => (string)$outbound->method,
            'password'    => (string)$outbound->password,
        ];

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build Hysteria2 outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildHysteria2Outbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'server'      => (string)$outbound->server,
            'server_port' => (int)(string)$outbound->server_port,
            'password'    => (string)$outbound->password,
        ];

        if ((string)$outbound->obfs !== '') {
            $item['obfs'] = [
                'type'     => (string)$outbound->obfs,
                'password' => (string)$outbound->obfs_password,
            ];
        }

        if ((string)$outbound->up_mbps !== '') {
            $item['up_mbps'] = (int)(string)$outbound->up_mbps;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->down_mbps !== '') {
            $item['down_mbps'] = (int)(string)$outbound->down_mbps;
        }

        // TLS
        $tls = $this->buildTlsConfig($outbound);
        if (!empty($tls)) {
            $item['tls'] = $tls;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build WireGuard outbound configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildWireGuardOutbound($outbound): array
    {
        $item = [
            'local_address'  => $this->parseCommaList((string)$outbound->local_address),
            'private_key'    => (string)$outbound->private_key,
            'peers'          => [],
        ];

        $peer = [];
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_public_key !== '') {
            $peer['public_key'] = (string)$outbound->peer_public_key;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_preshared_key !== '') {
            $peer['pre_shared_key'] = (string)$outbound->peer_preshared_key;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_endpoint !== '') {
            $peer['endpoint'] = (string)$outbound->peer_endpoint;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_allowed_ips !== '') {
            $peer['allowed_ips'] = $this->parseCommaList((string)$outbound->peer_allowed_ips);
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->peer_persistent_keepalive !== '') {
            $peer['persistent_keepalive_interval'] = (int)(string)$outbound->peer_persistent_keepalive;
        }

        if (!empty($peer)) {
            $item['peers'][] = $peer;
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build group outbound (selector/urltest/load-balance) configuration.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @param string $type
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildGroupOutbound($outbound, string $type): array
    {
        $item = [];

        $groupOutbounds = $this->parseCommaList((string)$outbound->group_outbounds);
        if (!empty($groupOutbounds)) {
            $item['outbounds'] = $groupOutbounds;
        } else {
            $item['outbounds'] = ['direct'];
        }

        if ($type === 'urltest' || $type === 'load-balance') {
            $item['url']      = (string)$outbound->group_url ?: 'https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204';
            $item['interval'] = (string)$outbound->group_interval . 's' ?: '300s';
            if ($type === 'urltest') {
                $item['tolerance'] = (int)(string)$outbound->group_tolerance ?: 50;
            }
        }

        return $item;
    }

    /**
     * Build TLS configuration from outbound fields.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array|null
     */
    private function buildTlsConfig($outbound): ?array
    {
        if (!(bool)(int)$outbound->tls_enabled) {
            return null;
        }

        $tls = [
            'enabled' => true,
        ];

        if ((string)$outbound->tls_server_name !== '') {
            $tls['server_name'] = (string)$outbound->tls_server_name;
        }
        if ((bool)(int)$outbound->tls_insecure) {
            $tls['insecure'] = true;
        }
        if ((string)$outbound->tls_alpn !== '') {
            $tls['alpn'] = $this->parseCommaList((string)$outbound->tls_alpn);
        }

        return $tls;
    }

    /**
     * Build transport configuration from outbound fields.
     *
     * @param mixed $outbound
     * @return array|null
     */
    private function buildTransportConfig($outbound): ?array
    {
        $transportType = (string)$outbound->transport_type;
        if ($transportType === '') {
            return null;
        }

        $transport = [
            'type' => $transportType,
        ];

        switch ($transportType) {
            case 'ws':
            case 'httpupgrade':
                if ((string)$outbound->transport_path !== '') {
                    $transport['path'] = (string)$outbound->transport_path;
                }
                if ((string)$outbound->transport_host !== '') {
                    $transport['host'] = (string)$outbound->transport_host;
                }
                break;

            case 'grpc':
                if ((string)$outbound->transport_path !== '') {
                    $transport['service_name'] = (string)$outbound->transport_path;
                }
                break;
        }

        return $transport;
    }

    /**
     * Build route configuration section.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    private function buildRouteConfig(): array
    {
        $route = [];

        // Collect rule sets
        $ruleSetTags = [];
        foreach ($this->rule_sets->rule_set->iterateItems() as $ruleSet) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$ruleSet->enabled) {
                continue;
            }
            $tag = (string)$ruleSet->tag;
            $ruleSetTags[] = $tag;
            if (!isset($route['rule_set'])) {
                $route['rule_set'] = [];
            }
            $rs = [
                'tag'      => $tag,
                'type'     => (string)$ruleSet->type,
                'format'   => (string)$ruleSet->format ?: 'source',
            ];
            if ((string)$ruleSet->type === 'remote') {
                if ((string)$ruleSet->url !== '') {
                    $rs['url'] = (string)$ruleSet->url;
                }
                if ((string)$ruleSet->update_interval !== '') {
                    $rs['update_interval'] = (string)$ruleSet->update_interval;
                }
            } else {
                if ((string)$ruleSet->path !== '') {
                    $rs['path'] = (string)$ruleSet->path;
                }
            }
            $route['rule_set'][] = $rs;
        }

        // Route rules
        $route['rules'] = [];
        $sortedRules = [];
        foreach ($this->rules->rule->iterateItems() as $rule) {
            if (!(bool)(int)$rule->enabled) {
                continue;
            }
            $sortedRules[] = $rule;
        }

        // Sort by priority ascending (lower number = higher priority)
        usort($sortedRules, function ($a, $b) {
            return (int)(string)$a->priority - (int)(string)$b->priority;
        });

        foreach ($sortedRules as $rule) {
            $r = [];

            $ruleType = (string)$rule->rule_type;
            $value    = (string)$rule->value;
            $action   = (string)$rule->action;

            // Rule condition
            if (in_array($ruleType, ['geoip', 'geosite'], true)) {
                $r[$ruleType] = $this->parseCommaList($value);
            } elseif ($ruleType === 'rule_set') {
                $r['rule_set'] = $this->parseCommaList($value);
            } elseif ($ruleType === 'port') {
                $r['port'] = array_map('intval', $this->parseCommaList($value));
            } elseif ($ruleType !== '') {
                $r[$ruleType] = $this->parseCommaList($value);
            }

            // Invert
            if ((bool)(int)$rule->invert) {
                $r['invert'] = true;
            }

            // Action
            if ($action === 'outbound') {
                $outboundTag = (string)$rule->action_outbound;
                $r['outbound'] = $outboundTag !== '' ? $outboundTag : 'direct';
            } elseif ($action === 'reject') {
                $r['outbound'] = 'block';
            } else {
                $r['outbound'] = $action;
            }

            if (!empty($r)) {
                $route['rules'][] = $r;
            }
        }

        // Auto route from TUN settings
        $route['auto_detect_interface'] = true;

        return $route;
    }

    /**
     * Ensure default 'direct' and 'block' outbounds exist.
     *
     * @param array &$outbounds
     * @return void
     */
    private function ensureDefaultOutbounds(array &$outbounds): void
    {
        $hasDirect = false;
        $hasBlock  = false;
        foreach ($outbounds as $o) {
            if ($o['type'] === 'direct') {
                $hasDirect = true;
            }
            if ($o['type'] === 'block') {
                $hasBlock = true;
            }
        }
        if (!$hasDirect) {
            $outbounds[] = ['type' => 'direct', 'tag' => 'direct'];
        }
        if (!$hasBlock) {
            $outbounds[] = ['type' => 'block', 'tag' => 'block'];
        }
    }

    // ================================================================
    //  Utility helpers
    // ================================================================

    /**
     * Flatten a model item (ArrayField child) into a plain array.
     *
     * @param mixed $item
     * @return array
     */
    private function flattenItem($item): array
    {
        $result = [];
        foreach ($item->iterateItems() as $key => $value) {
            $result[$key] = (string)$value;
        }
        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * Parse a comma-separated string into an array of trimmed values.
     *
     * @param string $input
     * @return array
     */
    private function parseCommaList(string $input): array
    {
        if ($input === '') {
            return [];
        }
        return array_values(array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $input))));
    }

    /**
     * Parse a JSON users string into an array.
     *
     * @param string $json
     * @return array
     */
    private function parseUsersJson(string $json): array
    {
        if ($json === '') {
            return [];
        }
        $decoded = json_decode($json, true);
        return is_array($decoded) ? $decoded : [];
    }

    /**
     * Get the final outbound tag for routing.
     *
     * @param string $action The action type (direct, reject, outbound)
     * @param string $outboundTag The outbound tag when action is 'outbound'
     * @return string The tag to use in route rules
     */
    public function resolveOutboundTag(string $action, string $outboundTag = ''): string
    {
        switch ($action) {
            case 'direct':
                return 'direct';
            case 'reject':
                return 'block';
            case 'outbound':
                return $outboundTag !== '' ? $outboundTag : 'direct';
            default:
                return $action;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Check if the sing-box service is currently running.
     *
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isServiceRunning(): bool
    {
        $pidFile = '/var/run/sing-box.pid';
        if (!file_exists($pidFile)) {
            return false;
        }
        $pid = (int)trim(file_get_contents($pidFile));
        if ($pid <= 0) {
            return false;
        }
        return posix_kill($pid, 0);
    }

    /**
     * Get the path to the generated sing-box config.json.
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getConfigJsonPath(): string
    {
        return '/usr/local/etc/sing-box/config.json';
    }

    /**
     * Get the path to the sing-box log file.
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getLogFilePath(): string
    {
        return (string)$this->general->logoutput ?: '/var/log/sing-box/sing-box.log';
    }
}

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

msgid ""
msgstr ""
"Project-Id-Version: OPNsense Sing-box Plugin 3.0.0\n"
"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
"POT-Creation-Date: 2024-01-01 00:00+0000\n"
"PO-Revision-Date: 2024-01-01 00:00+0000\n"
"Last-Translator: \n"
"Language: en_US\n"
"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"
"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"

msgstr "Optional secret token for API authentication"

msgstr "debug"

msgstr "Keepalive interval in seconds"

msgstr "URL for testing outbound connectivity"

msgstr "Test Interval"

msgstr "Health check interval in seconds"

msgstr "Test Tolerance"

msgstr "Latency tolerance in milliseconds"

msgstr "load-balance"

msgstr "Inbound Name"

msgstr "Unique name for this inbound configuration"

msgid "Listen Address"
msgstr "Listen Address"

msgstr "Address to listen on (0.0.0.0 for all interfaces)"

msgstr "Listen Port"

msgstr "Port number to listen on"

msgstr "Username"

msgstr "Authentication username"

msgstr "Set System Proxy"

msgstr "Automatically configure system proxy"

msgstr "Users"

msgstr "JSON array of user credentials"

msgstr "Interface Name"

msgstr "TUN interface name"

msgstr "MTU"

msgstr "Maximum Transmission Unit"

msgstr "GSO"

msgstr "Generic Segmentation Offload"

msgstr "Auto Route"

msgstr "Automatically configure routing rules"

msgstr "Strict Route"

msgstr "Enforce strict routing for transparent proxy"

msgstr "Endpoint Independent NAT"

msgstr "Enable endpoint-independent NAT"

msgstr "Stack"

msgstr "TUN implementation stack"

msgstr "system"

msgstr "gvisor"

msgstr "mixed"

msgstr "tcp"

msgstr "ws"

msgstr "grpc"

# Rule fields
msgid "httpupgrade"
msgstr "httpupgrade"

msgid "Rule Priority"
msgstr "Rule Priority"

msgid "Priority order for rule matching (lower = first)"
msgstr "Priority order for rule matching (lower = first)"

msgid "Description"
msgstr "Description"

msgid "Optional description for this rule"
msgstr "Optional description for this rule"

msgid "Rule Type"
msgstr "Rule Type"

msgid "Type of matching condition"
msgstr "Type of matching condition"

msgid "Rule Value"
msgstr "Rule Value"

msgid "Value to match against"
msgstr "Value to match against"

msgid "Action"
msgstr "Action"

msgid "Action to take when rule matches"
msgstr "Action to take when rule matches"

msgid "Action Outbound"
msgstr "Action Outbound"

msgid "Target outbound tag (when action is outbound)"
msgstr "Target outbound tag (when action is outbound)"

msgid "Invert"
msgstr "Invert"

# Rule types
msgid "Invert the match condition"
msgstr "Invert the match condition"

msgid "domain"
msgstr "domain"

msgid "domain_suffix"
msgstr "domain_suffix"

msgid "domain_keyword"
msgstr "domain_keyword"

msgid "ip_cidr"
msgstr "ip_cidr"

msgid "port"
msgstr "port"

msgid "protocol"
msgstr "protocol"

msgid "process_name"
msgstr "process_name"

msgid "rule_set"
msgstr "rule_set"

msgid "geoip"
msgstr "geoip"

# Rule actions
msgid "geosite"
msgstr "geosite"

msgid "reject"
msgstr "reject"

# DNS fields
msgid "outbound"
msgstr "outbound"

msgid "DNS Servers"
msgstr "DNS Servers"

~~~~ {work/stage/usr/local/opnsense/mvc/app/models/OPNsense/SingBox/i18n/ru_RU.po} ~~~~
msgid ""
msgstr ""
"Project-Id-Version: OPNsense Sing-box Plugin 3.0.0\n"
"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
"POT-Creation-Date: 2024-01-01 00:00+0000\n"
"PO-Revision-Date: 2024-01-01 00:00+0000\n"
"Last-Translator: \n"
"Language: ru_RU\n"
"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"
"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"
"Plural-Forms: nplurals=3; plural=(n%10==1 && n%100!=11 ? 0 : n%10>=2 && n%10<=4 && (n%100<10 || n%100>=20) ? 1 : 2);\n"

# Tab names
msgid "Dashboard"
msgstr "Панель управления"

msgid "Outbounds"
msgstr "Исходящие подключения"

msgid "Inbounds"
msgstr "Входящие подключения"

msgstr "Правила маршрутизации"

msgid "DNS"
msgstr "DNS"

msgstr "TUN/Сеть"

msgid "Log"
msgstr "Журнал"

msgid "Settings"
msgstr "Настройки"

# Button labels

msgstr "Sing-box"
